**Ngày 1: HTTP Protocol & Client-Server Architecture**

**🌐 Hiểu HTTP Protocol:**
```
HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) là giao thức truyền tải dữ liệu trên web

1. HTTP Methods:
   - GET: Lấy dữ liệu từ server
   - POST: Gửi dữ liệu lên server (tạo mới)
   - PUT: Cập nhật dữ liệu trên server
   - DELETE: Xóa dữ liệu trên server
   - PATCH: Cập nhật một phần dữ liệu

2. HTTP Status Codes:
   - 200: OK - Thành công
   - 201: Created - Tạo mới thành công
   - 400: Bad Request - Yêu cầu không hợp lệ
   - 401: Unauthorized - Chưa xác thực
   - 403: Forbidden - Không có quyền truy cập
   - 404: Not Found - Không tìm thấy
   - 500: Internal Server Error - Lỗi server

3. HTTP Headers:
   - Content-Type: Loại dữ liệu (application/json, text/html)
   - Authorization: Thông tin xác thực
   - Accept: Loại dữ liệu client chấp nhận
   - User-Agent: Thông tin trình duyệt
```

**🏗️ Client-Server Architecture:**
```
┌─────────────┐    HTTP Request     ┌─────────────┐
│   CLIENT    │ ──────────────────> │   SERVER    │
│ (Browser)   │                     │ (Web App)   │
│             │ <────────────────── │             │
└─────────────┘    HTTP Response    └─────────────┘

Luồng hoạt động:
1. Client gửi HTTP Request đến Server
2. Server xử lý request (business logic, database)
3. Server trả về HTTP Response cho Client
4. Client hiển thị kết quả cho user

Ví dụ thực tế:
- Client: Trình duyệt web (Chrome, Firefox)
- Server: Ứng dụng Spring Boot chạy trên port 8080
- Request: GET http://localhost:8080/api/users
- Response: JSON data chứa danh sách users
```

**Ngày 2: HTML5 Fundamentals**

**📄 HTML5 Cơ Bản:**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Học HTML5</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Semantic Elements -->
    <header>
        <nav>
            <ul>
                <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
                <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
                <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
        </nav>
    </header>

    <main>
        <section id="home">
            <h1>Welcome to My Website</h1>
            <p>This is a paragraph with <strong>bold text</strong> and <em>italic text</em>.</p>
        </section>

        <section id="about">
            <h2>About Me</h2>
            <article>
                <h3>My Story</h3>
                <p>I am learning web development...</p>
            </article>
        </section>

        <section id="contact">
            <h2>Contact Form</h2>
            <form action="/submit" method="POST">
                <div>
                    <label for="name">Name:</label>
                    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required>
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label for="email">Email:</label>
                    <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required>
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label for="message">Message:</label>
                    <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="4" required></textarea>
                </div>

                <button type="submit">Send Message</button>
            </form>
        </section>
    </main>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2024 My Website. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
```

**Ngày 3: CSS3 Fundamentals**

**🎨 CSS3 Cơ Bản:**
```css
/* Reset CSS */
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Typography */
body {
    font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #333;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* Layout với Flexbox */
.container {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 20px;
}

header {
    background-color: #333;
    color: white;
    padding: 1rem 0;
}

nav ul {
    display: flex;
    list-style: none;
    justify-content: center;
}

nav li {
    margin: 0 1rem;
}

nav a {
    color: white;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
}

nav a:hover {
    color: #007bff;
}

/* Grid Layout */
.grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
    margin: 2rem 0;
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav ul {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
    }

    nav li {
        margin: 0.5rem 0;
    }

    .grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
}

/* Animations */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.fade-in {
    animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
}
```

**🔄 Git Workflow Cơ Bản:**
```bash
# Kiểm tra status
git status

# Thêm files vào staging
git add .                    # Thêm tất cả files
git add filename.java        # Thêm file cụ thể

# Commit changes
git commit -m "Add user entity and repository"

# Push lên GitHub
git push origin main

# Pull changes từ remote
git pull origin main

# Tạo branch mới
git checkout -b feature/user-management
git push -u origin feature/user-management

# Merge branch
git checkout main
git merge feature/user-management
git push origin main
```

**📁 Hiểu @SpringBootApplication:**
```java
package dev.cuonghoang;

import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;

// @SpringBootApplication = @Configuration + @EnableAutoConfiguration + @ComponentScan
@SpringBootApplication
public class CuonghoangDevApplication {

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        SpringApplication.run(CuonghoangDevApplication.class, args);
    }
}

/*
Giải thích @SpringBootApplication:
1. @Configuration: Đánh dấu class này là configuration class
2. @EnableAutoConfiguration: Tự động cấu hình Spring Boot
3. @ComponentScan: Tự động scan và đăng ký beans trong package này và sub-packages

Khi chạy:
1. SpringApplication.run() khởi tạo Spring context
2. Auto-configuration kicks in
3. Embedded Tomcat server starts trên port 8080
4. Application ready to serve requests
*/
```

**🎯 Tạo Controller Đầu Tiên:**
```java
package dev.cuonghoang.controller;

import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.HashMap;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api")
public class HelloController {

    // GET endpoint đơn giản
    @GetMapping("/hello")
    public String hello() {
        return "Hello from CuongHoang Dev!";
    }

    // GET với path variable
    @GetMapping("/hello/{name}")
    public String helloName(@PathVariable String name) {
        return "Hello " + name + " from CuongHoang Dev!";
    }

    // GET với request parameter
    @GetMapping("/greet")
    public Map<String, Object> greet(@RequestParam(defaultValue = "World") String name) {
        Map<String, Object> response = new HashMap<>();
        response.put("message", "Hello " + name + "!");
        response.put("timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis());
        response.put("status", "success");
        return response;
    }

    // POST endpoint
    @PostMapping("/echo")
    public Map<String, Object> echo(@RequestBody Map<String, Object> request) {
        Map<String, Object> response = new HashMap<>();
        response.put("received", request);
        response.put("timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis());
        return response;
    }
}

/*
Giải thích annotations:
1. @RestController = @Controller + @ResponseBody
   - Tự động convert return value thành JSON
2. @RequestMapping("/api"): Base path cho tất cả endpoints
3. @GetMapping, @PostMapping: HTTP method mapping
4. @PathVariable: Lấy giá trị từ URL path
5. @RequestParam: Lấy giá trị từ query parameters
6. @RequestBody: Convert JSON request thành Java object
*/
```

./mvnw spring-boot:run

curl http://localhost:8080/api/hello/CuongHoang
curl "http://localhost:8080/api/greet?name=Developer"
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/echo \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "CuongHoang", "role": "Developer"}'

# Hoặc test với Postman:

# 2. Method: GET, URL: http://localhost:8080/api/hello
# 3. Send và kiểm tra response
```

# src/main/resources/application.yml
spring:
  application:
    name: cuonghoang-dev

  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/cuonghoang_dev
    username: cuonghoang
    password: password
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
    show-sql: true
    properties:
      hibernate:
        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect
        format_sql: true

  # H2 Console cho development (optional)
  h2:
    console:
      enabled: true
      path: /h2-console

server:
  port: 8080

logging:
  level:
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.type.descriptor.sql.BasicBinder: TRACE
```

**🏗️ Tạo Entity Đầu Tiên:**
```java
package dev.cuonghoang.entity;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.CreatedDate;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.LastModifiedDate;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.support.AuditingEntityListener;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;

// Base Entity cho tất cả entities
@MappedSuperclass
@EntityListeners(AuditingEntityListener.class)
public abstract class BaseEntity {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    private Long id;

    @CreatedDate
    @Column(name = "created_at", nullable = false, updatable = false)
    private LocalDateTime createdAt;

    @LastModifiedDate
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt;

    // Getters and Setters
    public Long getId() { return id; }
    public void setId(Long id) { this.id = id; }

    public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt() { return createdAt; }
    public void setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime createdAt) { this.createdAt = createdAt; }

    public LocalDateTime getUpdatedAt() { return updatedAt; }
    public void setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime updatedAt) { this.updatedAt = updatedAt; }
}

// User Entity
@Entity
@Table(name = "users")
public class User extends BaseEntity {

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 50)
    private String username;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false, length = 100)
    private String email;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String password;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private Boolean enabled = true;

    // Constructors
    public User() {}

    public User(String username, String email, String password) {
        this.username = username;
        this.email = email;
        this.password = password;
    }

    // Getters and Setters
    public String getUsername() { return username; }
    public void setUsername(String username) { this.username = username; }

    public String getEmail() { return email; }
    public void setEmail(String email) { this.email = email; }

    public String getPassword() { return password; }
    public void setPassword(String password) { this.password = password; }

    public Boolean getEnabled() { return enabled; }
    public void setEnabled(Boolean enabled) { this.enabled = enabled; }
}
```

package dev.cuonghoang.config;

import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.config.EnableJpaAuditing;

@Configuration
@EnableJpaAuditing
public class JpaConfig {
    // JPA Auditing configuration
    // Tự động set createdAt và updatedAt
}
```

**🧪 Test Database Connection:**
```java
package dev.cuonghoang.repository;

import dev.cuonghoang.entity.User;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;

import java.util.Optional;

@Repository
public interface UserRepository extends JpaRepository<User, Long> {
    Optional<User> findByUsername(String username);
    Optional<User> findByEmail(String email);
    boolean existsByUsername(String username);
    boolean existsByEmail(String email);
}

// Test Controller
package dev.cuonghoang.controller;

import dev.cuonghoang.entity.User;
import dev.cuonghoang.repository.UserRepository;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/test")
public class TestController {

    @Autowired
    private UserRepository userRepository;

    @GetMapping("/users")
    public List<User> getAllUsers() {
        return userRepository.findAll();
    }

    @PostMapping("/users")
    public User createUser(@RequestBody User user) {
        return userRepository.save(user);
    }

    @GetMapping("/db-test")
    public String testDatabase() {
        long count = userRepository.count();
        return "Database connection successful! User count: " + count;
    }
}
```

### **Tuần 2: Project Structure**

**📁 Tạo Package Structure Chuẩn:**

src/main/java/dev/cuonghoang/
├── CuonghoangDevApplication.java
├── config/                     # Configuration classes
│   ├── SecurityConfig.java
│   ├── WebConfig.java
│   ├── DatabaseConfig.java

│   └── JpaConfig.java
├── controller/                 # Controllers
│   ├── web/                   # Web controllers (Thymeleaf)
│   │   ├── HomeController.java
│   │   ├── BlogController.java

**🏗️ Setup BaseEntity và AuditableEntity:**
```java
// BaseEntity.java - Base class cho tất cả entities
package dev.cuonghoang.entity;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.Objects;

@MappedSuperclass
public abstract class BaseEntity implements Serializable {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    private Long id;

    public Long getId() {
        return id;
    }

    public void setId(Long id) {
        this.id = id;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean equals(Object o) {
        if (this == o) return true;
        if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass()) return false;
        BaseEntity that = (BaseEntity) o;
        return Objects.equals(id, that.id);
    }

    @Override
    public int hashCode() {
        return Objects.hash(id);
    }
}

// AuditableEntity.java - Cho entities cần audit
package dev.cuonghoang.entity;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.CreatedBy;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.CreatedDate;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.LastModifiedBy;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.LastModifiedDate;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.support.AuditingEntityListener;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;

@MappedSuperclass
@EntityListeners(AuditingEntityListener.class)
public abstract class AuditableEntity extends BaseEntity {

    @CreatedDate
    @Column(name = "created_at", nullable = false, updatable = false)
    private LocalDateTime createdAt;

    @LastModifiedDate
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private LocalDateTime updatedAt;

    @CreatedBy
    @Column(name = "created_by", length = 50, updatable = false)
    private String createdBy;

    @LastModifiedBy
    @Column(name = "updated_by", length = 50)
    private String updatedBy;

    // Getters and Setters
    public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt() { return createdAt; }
    public void setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime createdAt) { this.createdAt = createdAt; }

    public LocalDateTime getUpdatedAt() { return updatedAt; }
    public void setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime updatedAt) { this.updatedAt = updatedAt; }

    public String getCreatedBy() { return createdBy; }
    public void setCreatedBy(String createdBy) { this.createdBy = createdBy; }

    public String getUpdatedBy() { return updatedBy; }
    public void setUpdatedBy(String updatedBy) { this.updatedBy = updatedBy; }
}
```

**Ngày 11-14: Template Engine**

**🎨 Thymeleaf Configuration:**
```java
package dev.cuonghoang.config;

import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.ViewResolver;
import org.thymeleaf.spring6.SpringTemplateEngine;
import org.thymeleaf.spring6.view.ThymeleafViewResolver;
import org.thymeleaf.templateresolver.ClassLoaderTemplateResolver;

@Configuration
public class ThymeleafConfig {

    @Bean
    public ClassLoaderTemplateResolver templateResolver() {
        ClassLoaderTemplateResolver templateResolver = new ClassLoaderTemplateResolver();
        templateResolver.setPrefix("templates/");
        templateResolver.setSuffix(".html");
        templateResolver.setTemplateMode("HTML");
        templateResolver.setCharacterEncoding("UTF-8");
        templateResolver.setOrder(1);
        templateResolver.setCheckExistence(true);
        return templateResolver;
    }

    @Bean
    public SpringTemplateEngine templateEngine() {
        SpringTemplateEngine templateEngine = new SpringTemplateEngine();
        templateEngine.setTemplateResolver(templateResolver());
        templateEngine.setEnableSpringELCompiler(true);
        return templateEngine;
    }

    @Bean
    public ViewResolver viewResolver() {
        ThymeleafViewResolver viewResolver = new ThymeleafViewResolver();
        viewResolver.setTemplateEngine(templateEngine());
        viewResolver.setCharacterEncoding("UTF-8");
        return viewResolver;
    }
}
```

@Repository
public interface UserRepository extends JpaRepository<User, Long> {
    Optional<User> findByEmail(String email);
    Optional<User> findByUsername(String username);
    
    @Query("SELECT u FROM User u WHERE u.email = :emailOrUsername OR u.username = :emailOrUsername")
    Optional<User> findByEmailOrUsername(@Param("emailOrUsername") String emailOrUsername);
}

### **Tuần 4: Service Layer**
**Ngày 22-24: Business Logic Implementation**
```java
@Service
@Transactional
public class UserService {
    
    public UserResponseDto createUser(UserRequestDto request) {
        // 1. Validate input
        validateUserRequest(request);
        
        // 2. Check existence
        if (userRepository.existsByEmail(request.getEmail())) {
            throw new UserAlreadyExistsException("Email exists");
        }
        
        // 3. Map DTO to Entity
        User user = userMapper.toEntity(request);
        
        // 4. Encode password
        user.setPassword(passwordEncoder.encode(request.getPassword()));
        
        // 5. Save and return
        User savedUser = userRepository.save(user);
        return userMapper.toResponseDto(savedUser);
    }
}
```

**Ngày 25-28: Authentication Service**
```java
@Service
public class AuthService {
    
    public JwtAuthResponse login(LoginRequestDto request) {
        // 1. Authenticate
        Authentication auth = authenticationManager.authenticate(
            new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(
                request.getUsernameOrEmail(),
                request.getPassword()
            )
        );
        
        // 2. Generate token
        String token = jwtTokenProvider.generateToken(auth);
        
        // 3. Return response
        return JwtAuthResponse.builder()
            .accessToken(token)
            .tokenType("Bearer")
            .build();
    }
}
```

### **Tuần 5: Security Implementation**
**Ngày 29-31: JWT Configuration**
```java
@Component
public class JwtTokenProvider {
    
    public String generateToken(Authentication authentication) {
        UserPrincipal userPrincipal = (UserPrincipal) authentication.getPrincipal();
        Date expiryDate = new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + jwtExpirationInMs);
        
        return Jwts.builder()
                .setSubject(Long.toString(userPrincipal.getId()))
                .setIssuedAt(new Date())
                .setExpiration(expiryDate)
                .signWith(SignatureAlgorithm.HS512, jwtSecret)
                .compact();
    }
    
    public boolean validateToken(String authToken) {
        try {
            Jwts.parser().setSigningKey(jwtSecret).parseClaimsJws(authToken);
            return true;
        } catch (JwtException | IllegalArgumentException e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}
```

**Ngày 32-35: Security Configuration**
```java
@Configuration
@EnableWebSecurity
public class SecurityConfig {
    
    @Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
        http.csrf().disable()
            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS)
            .and()
            .authorizeHttpRequests(authz -> authz
                .requestMatchers("/api/auth/**").permitAll()
                .requestMatchers("/admin/**").hasRole("ADMIN")
                .requestMatchers("/api/**").authenticated()
                .anyRequest().permitAll()
            );
            
        http.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);
        return http.build();
    }
}
```

### **Tuần 6: OAuth2 & Advanced Security**
**Ngày 36-38: OAuth2 Configuration**
```java
// OAuth2UserService.java
@Service
public class CustomOAuth2UserService extends DefaultOAuth2UserService {

    @Override
    public OAuth2User loadUser(OAuth2UserRequest userRequest) throws OAuth2AuthenticationException {
        OAuth2User oAuth2User = super.loadUser(userRequest);
        return processOAuth2User(userRequest, oAuth2User);
    }

    private OAuth2User processOAuth2User(OAuth2UserRequest oAuth2UserRequest, OAuth2User oAuth2User) {
        OAuth2UserInfo oAuth2UserInfo = OAuth2UserInfoFactory.getOAuth2UserInfo(
                oAuth2UserRequest.getClientRegistration().getRegistrationId(),
                oAuth2User.getAttributes());

        Optional<User> userOptional = userRepository.findByEmail(oAuth2UserInfo.getEmail());
        User user;
        if(userOptional.isPresent()) {
            user = updateExistingUser(userOptional.get(), oAuth2UserInfo);
        } else {
            user = registerNewUser(oAuth2UserRequest, oAuth2UserInfo);
        }

        return UserPrincipal.create(user, oAuth2User.getAttributes());
    }
}
```

**Ngày 39-42: Advanced Security Features**

**🔒 Method-Level Security:**
```java
// MethodSecurityConfig.java
@Configuration
@EnableMethodSecurity(prePostEnabled = true, securedEnabled = true, jsr250Enabled = true)
public class MethodSecurityConfig {

    @Bean
    public MethodSecurityExpressionHandler methodSecurityExpressionHandler() {
        DefaultMethodSecurityExpressionHandler expressionHandler = new DefaultMethodSecurityExpressionHandler();
        expressionHandler.setPermissionEvaluator(new CustomPermissionEvaluator());
        return expressionHandler;
    }
}

// Custom Permission Evaluator
@Component
public class CustomPermissionEvaluator implements PermissionEvaluator {

    @Override
    public boolean hasPermission(Authentication authentication, Object targetDomainObject, Object permission) {
        if (authentication == null || targetDomainObject == null || !(permission instanceof String)) {
            return false;
        }

        String targetType = targetDomainObject.getClass().getSimpleName().toUpperCase();
        return hasPrivilege(authentication, targetType, permission.toString().toUpperCase());
    }

    @Override
    public boolean hasPermission(Authentication authentication, Serializable targetId, String targetType, Object permission) {
        if (authentication == null || targetType == null || !(permission instanceof String)) {
            return false;
        }
        return hasPrivilege(authentication, targetType.toUpperCase(), permission.toString().toUpperCase());
    }

    private boolean hasPrivilege(Authentication auth, String targetType, String permission) {
        UserPrincipal userPrincipal = (UserPrincipal) auth.getPrincipal();
        return userPrincipal.getAuthorities().stream()
            .anyMatch(grantedAuthority ->
                grantedAuthority.getAuthority().equals(permission + "_" + targetType) ||
                grantedAuthority.getAuthority().equals("ROLE_ADMIN"));
    }
}

// Service với method-level security
@Service
public class BlogService {

    @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN') or hasRole('AUTHOR')")
    public BlogResponseDto createBlog(BlogRequestDto request) {
        // Implementation
    }

    @PreAuthorize("hasPermission(#blogId, 'Blog', 'EDIT') or hasRole('ADMIN')")
    public BlogResponseDto updateBlog(Long blogId, BlogRequestDto request) {
        // Implementation
    }

    @PostAuthorize("hasPermission(returnObject, 'READ') or hasRole('ADMIN')")
    public BlogResponseDto getBlogById(Long id) {
        // Implementation
    }

    @PreAuthorize("@blogService.isOwner(#blogId, authentication.name) or hasRole('ADMIN')")
    public void deleteBlog(Long blogId) {
        // Implementation
    }

    public boolean isOwner(Long blogId, String username) {
        Blog blog = blogRepository.findById(blogId).orElse(null);
        return blog != null && blog.getAuthor().getUsername().equals(username);
    }
}
```

**🌐 Advanced CORS Configuration:**
```java
@Configuration
public class CorsConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {

    @Override
    public void addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry registry) {
        registry.addMapping("/api/**")
            .allowedOriginPatterns("http://localhost:*", "https://*.cuonghoang.dev")
            .allowedMethods("GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS", "PATCH")
            .allowedHeaders("*")
            .allowCredentials(true)
            .maxAge(3600);

        registry.addMapping("/ws/**")
            .allowedOriginPatterns("http://localhost:*", "https://*.cuonghoang.dev")
            .allowedMethods("GET", "POST")
            .allowCredentials(true);
    }

    @Bean
    public CorsConfigurationSource corsConfigurationSource() {
        CorsConfiguration configuration = new CorsConfiguration();
        configuration.setAllowedOriginPatterns(Arrays.asList("http://localhost:*", "https://*.cuonghoang.dev"));
        configuration.setAllowedMethods(Arrays.asList("GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS", "PATCH"));
        configuration.setAllowedHeaders(Arrays.asList("*"));
        configuration.setAllowCredentials(true);
        configuration.setMaxAge(3600L);

        UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource source = new UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource();
        source.registerCorsConfiguration("/api/**", configuration);
        source.registerCorsConfiguration("/ws/**", configuration);
        return source;
    }
}
```

**🛡️ Security Testing & Validation:**
```java
// SecurityTest.java
@SpringBootTest
@AutoConfigureTestDatabase(replace = AutoConfigureTestDatabase.Replace.NONE)
class SecurityTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @Autowired
    private JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider;

    @Test
    @DisplayName("Should deny access without authentication")
    void shouldDenyAccessWithoutAuthentication() throws Exception {
        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/admin/users"))
            .andExpect(status().isUnauthorized());
    }

    @Test
    @DisplayName("Should allow access with valid JWT token")
    void shouldAllowAccessWithValidJwtToken() throws Exception {
        String token = generateValidToken();

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/users/profile")
                .header("Authorization", "Bearer " + token))
            .andExpect(status().isOk());
    }

    @Test
    @DisplayName("Should enforce method-level security")
    void shouldEnforceMethodLevelSecurity() throws Exception {
        String userToken = generateUserToken();

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/admin/users")
                .header("Authorization", "Bearer " + userToken)
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content("{}"))
            .andExpect(status().isForbidden());
    }

    @Test
    @DisplayName("Should handle CORS preflight requests")
    void shouldHandleCorsPreflight() throws Exception {
        mockMvc.perform(options("/api/users")
                .header("Origin", "http://localhost:3000")
                .header("Access-Control-Request-Method", "POST")
                .header("Access-Control-Request-Headers", "Content-Type"))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(header().string("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "http://localhost:3000"))
            .andExpect(header().string("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", containsString("POST")));
    }
}

## **📝 PHASE 3: CONTENT MANAGEMENT (Tuần 7-10)**

### **Tuần 7: Blog System**
**Ngày 43-45: Blog Entity Design**
```java
@Entity
@Table(name = "blogs")
public class Blog extends AuditableEntity {

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String title;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false)
    private String slug;

    @Column(columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String excerpt;

    @Column(columnDefinition = "LONGTEXT")
    private String content;

    private String category;

    @ElementCollection
    @CollectionTable(name = "blog_tags", joinColumns = @JoinColumn(name = "blog_id"))
    @Column(name = "tag")
    private Set<String> tags = new HashSet<>();

    @Column(columnDefinition = "boolean default false")
    private Boolean published = false;

    @Column(columnDefinition = "boolean default false")
    private Boolean featured = false;

    private String imageUrl;
    private Integer viewCount = 0;

    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    @JoinColumn(name = "author_id")
    private User author;
}
```

**Ngày 46-49: Advanced Blog Features**

**🚀 Caching Implementation:**
```java
// CacheConfig.java
@Configuration
@EnableCaching
public class CacheConfig {

    @Bean
    public CacheManager cacheManager() {
        RedisCacheManager.Builder builder = RedisCacheManager
            .RedisCacheManagerBuilder
            .fromConnectionFactory(redisConnectionFactory())
            .cacheDefaults(cacheConfiguration());

        return builder.build();
    }

    @Bean
    public RedisConnectionFactory redisConnectionFactory() {
        LettuceConnectionFactory factory = new LettuceConnectionFactory(
            new RedisStandaloneConfiguration("localhost", 6379));
        return factory;
    }

    private RedisCacheConfiguration cacheConfiguration() {
        return RedisCacheConfiguration.defaultCacheConfig()
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofMinutes(30))
            .serializeKeysWith(RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair
                .fromSerializer(new StringRedisSerializer()))
            .serializeValuesWith(RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair
                .fromSerializer(new GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer()));
    }
}

// Event-driven architecture
@Component
public class BlogEventListener {

    private final NotificationService notificationService;
    private final SearchService searchService;
    private final SitemapService sitemapService;

    @EventListener
    @Async
    public void handleBlogCreated(BlogCreatedEvent event) {
        log.info("Blog created: {}", event.getBlog().getTitle());

        // Send notifications
        notificationService.notifySubscribers(event.getBlog());

        // Update search index
        searchService.indexBlog(event.getBlog());

        // Update sitemap
        sitemapService.updateSitemap();
    }

    @EventListener
    @Async
    public void handleBlogPublished(BlogPublishedEvent event) {
        log.info("Blog published: {}", event.getBlog().getTitle());

        // Send email to subscribers
        emailService.sendBlogNotificationToSubscribers(event.getBlog());

        // Post to social media
        socialMediaService.postBlogAnnouncement(event.getBlog());
    }

    @EventListener
    @Async
    public void handleBlogDeleted(BlogDeletedEvent event) {
        log.info("Blog deleted: {}", event.getBlog().getTitle());

        // Remove from search index
        searchService.removeBlogFromIndex(event.getBlog().getId());

        // Update sitemap
        sitemapService.updateSitemap();
    }
}
```

**🔍 Advanced Repository with Custom Queries:**
```java
@Repository
public interface BlogRepository extends JpaRepository<Blog, Long>, BlogRepositoryCustom {

    // Basic queries
    Optional<Blog> findBySlug(String slug);
    List<Blog> findByPublishedTrueOrderByCreatedAtDesc();

    // Custom queries with JPQL
    @Query("SELECT b FROM Blog b WHERE b.published = true AND " +
           "(LOWER(b.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%')) OR " +
           "LOWER(b.content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%')))")
    Page<Blog> searchPublishedBlogs(@Param("keyword") String keyword, Pageable pageable);

    @Query("SELECT b FROM Blog b WHERE b.category = :category AND b.published = true")
    List<Blog> findByCategory(@Param("category") String category);

    @Query("SELECT b FROM Blog b JOIN b.tags t WHERE t IN :tags AND b.published = true")
    List<Blog> findByTagsIn(@Param("tags") Set<String> tags);

    // Native SQL for complex queries
    @Query(value = "SELECT * FROM blogs b WHERE " +
                   "MATCH(b.title, b.content) AGAINST(?1 IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) " +
                   "AND b.published = true ORDER BY " +
                   "MATCH(b.title, b.content) AGAINST(?1 IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) DESC",
           nativeQuery = true)
    List<Blog> fullTextSearch(String searchTerm);

    // Modifying queries
    @Modifying
    @Query("UPDATE Blog b SET b.viewCount = b.viewCount + 1 WHERE b.id = :id")
    void incrementViewCount(@Param("id") Long id);

    @Modifying
    @Query("UPDATE Blog b SET b.featured = :featured WHERE b.id = :id")
    void updateFeaturedStatus(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("featured") boolean featured);

    // Statistical queries
    @Query("SELECT COUNT(b) FROM Blog b WHERE b.published = true")
    long countPublishedBlogs();

    @Query("SELECT b.category, COUNT(b) FROM Blog b WHERE b.published = true GROUP BY b.category")
    List<Object[]> getBlogCountByCategory();

    @Query("SELECT DATE(b.createdAt), COUNT(b) FROM Blog b WHERE b.createdAt >= :startDate GROUP BY DATE(b.createdAt)")
    List<Object[]> getBlogCountByDate(@Param("startDate") LocalDateTime startDate);
}

// Custom repository implementation
@Repository
public class BlogRepositoryCustomImpl implements BlogRepositoryCustom {

    @PersistenceContext
    private EntityManager entityManager;

    @Override
    public List<Blog> findBlogsWithComplexCriteria(BlogSearchCriteria criteria) {
        CriteriaBuilder cb = entityManager.getCriteriaBuilder();
        CriteriaQuery<Blog> query = cb.createQuery(Blog.class);
        Root<Blog> blog = query.from(Blog.class);

        List<Predicate> predicates = new ArrayList<>();

        // Add published filter
        predicates.add(cb.equal(blog.get("published"), true));

        // Add category filter
        if (criteria.getCategory() != null) {
            predicates.add(cb.equal(blog.get("category"), criteria.getCategory()));
        }

        // Add date range filter
        if (criteria.getStartDate() != null) {
            predicates.add(cb.greaterThanOrEqualTo(blog.get("createdAt"), criteria.getStartDate()));
        }

        if (criteria.getEndDate() != null) {
            predicates.add(cb.lessThanOrEqualTo(blog.get("createdAt"), criteria.getEndDate()));
        }

        // Add search filter
        if (criteria.getSearchTerm() != null) {
            String searchPattern = "%" + criteria.getSearchTerm().toLowerCase() + "%";
            Predicate titlePredicate = cb.like(cb.lower(blog.get("title")), searchPattern);
            Predicate contentPredicate = cb.like(cb.lower(blog.get("content")), searchPattern);
            predicates.add(cb.or(titlePredicate, contentPredicate));
        }

        query.where(predicates.toArray(new Predicate[0]));
        query.orderBy(cb.desc(blog.get("createdAt")));

        return entityManager.createQuery(query).getResultList();
    }
}
```

**Ngày 46-49: Blog Service & Repository**
```java
@Service
@Transactional
public class BlogService {

    public BlogResponseDto createBlog(BlogRequestDto request) {
        // 1. Validate request
        validateBlogRequest(request);

        // 2. Generate SEO-friendly slug
        String slug = slugService.generateSlug(request.getTitle());

        // 3. Check slug uniqueness
        if (blogRepository.findBySlug(slug).isPresent()) {
            slug = slugService.generateUniqueSlug(slug, blogRepository::findBySlug);
        }

        // 4. Map to entity
        Blog blog = blogMapper.toEntity(request);
        blog.setSlug(slug);

        // 5. Handle image upload
        if (request.getImageFile() != null) {
            String imageUrl = fileService.uploadImage(request.getImageFile());
            blog.setImageUrl(imageUrl);
        }

        // 6. Set author
        User currentUser = getCurrentUser();
        blog.setAuthor(currentUser);

        // 7. Save blog
        Blog savedBlog = blogRepository.save(blog);

        // 8. Send notifications if published
        if (savedBlog.getPublished()) {
            notificationService.notifySubscribers(savedBlog);
        }

        return blogMapper.toResponseDto(savedBlog);
    }

    // Advanced features
    @Cacheable(value = "blogs", key = "#slug")
    public BlogResponseDto getBlogBySlug(String slug) {
        Blog blog = blogRepository.findBySlug(slug)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new BlogNotFoundException("Blog not found with slug: " + slug));

        // Increment view count asynchronously
        incrementViewCountAsync(blog.getId());

        return blogMapper.toResponseDto(blog);
    }

    @Async
    @EventListener
    public void handleBlogCreatedEvent(BlogCreatedEvent event) {
        // Send notifications to subscribers
        notificationService.notifySubscribers(event.getBlog());

        // Update search index
        searchService.indexBlog(event.getBlog());

        // Generate sitemap
        sitemapService.updateSitemap();
    }

    @Transactional
    @CacheEvict(value = "blogs", allEntries = true)
    public void deleteBlog(Long id) {
        Blog blog = blogRepository.findById(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new BlogNotFoundException("Blog not found"));

        // Publish event before deletion
        applicationEventPublisher.publishEvent(new BlogDeletedEvent(blog));

        blogRepository.delete(blog);
    }

    @Async
    private void incrementViewCountAsync(Long blogId) {
        blogRepository.incrementViewCount(blogId);
    }
}

```java
@Service
public class PortfolioService {

    public ProjectResponseDto createProject(ProjectRequestDto request) {
        // Validate project data
        validateProjectRequest(request);

        // Generate slug
        String slug = slugService.generateSlug(request.getTitle());

        // Map to entity
        Project project = projectMapper.toEntity(request);
        project.setSlug(slug);

        // Handle multiple image uploads
        if (request.getImageFiles() != null && !request.getImageFiles().isEmpty()) {
            List<String> imageUrls = fileService.uploadMultipleImages(request.getImageFiles());
            project.setImages(imageUrls);
            project.setImageUrl(imageUrls.get(0)); // Set first as main image
        }

        // Save project
        Project savedProject = projectRepository.save(project);

        return projectMapper.toResponseDto(savedProject);
    }

    public List<ProjectResponseDto> getFeaturedProjects() {
        List<Project> projects = projectRepository.findFeaturedProjects();
        return projects.stream()
            .map(projectMapper::toResponseDto)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
}

**Ngày 60-63: Shopping Cart Service**
```java
@Service
public class CartService {

    public CartResponseDto addToCart(Long productId, Integer quantity) {
        User currentUser = getCurrentUser();
        Product product = productRepository.findById(productId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new ProductNotFoundException("Product not found"));

        Cart cart = cartRepository.findByUser(currentUser)
            .orElse(new Cart(currentUser));

        CartItem existingItem = cart.getItems().stream()
            .filter(item -> item.getProduct().getId().equals(productId))
            .findFirst()
            .orElse(null);

        if (existingItem != null) {
            existingItem.setQuantity(existingItem.getQuantity() + quantity);
        } else {
            CartItem newItem = new CartItem(product, quantity);
            cart.addItem(newItem);
        }

        Cart savedCart = cartRepository.save(cart);
        return cartMapper.toResponseDto(savedCart);
    }

    // Advanced cart operations
    public CartResponseDto applyCoupon(String couponCode) {
        User currentUser = getCurrentUser();
        Cart cart = cartRepository.findByUser(currentUser)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException("Cart not found"));

        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeAndActiveTrue(couponCode)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new CouponNotFoundException("Invalid coupon code"));

        if (coupon.isExpired()) {
            throw new CouponExpiredException("Coupon has expired");
        }

        BigDecimal discount = calculateDiscount(cart, coupon);
        cart.setDiscountAmount(discount);
        cart.setCouponCode(couponCode);

        Cart savedCart = cartRepository.save(cart);
        return cartMapper.toResponseDto(savedCart);
    }

    public OrderResponseDto checkout(CheckoutRequestDto request) {
        User currentUser = getCurrentUser();
        Cart cart = cartRepository.findByUser(currentUser)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException("Cart not found"));

        if (cart.getItems().isEmpty()) {
            throw new EmptyCartException("Cannot checkout empty cart");
        }

        // Validate stock availability
        validateStockAvailability(cart);

        // Create order
        Order order = createOrderFromCart(cart, request);

        // Process payment
        PaymentResult paymentResult = paymentService.processPayment(order, request.getPaymentMethod());

        if (paymentResult.isSuccessful()) {
            order.setStatus(OrderStatus.CONFIRMED);
            orderRepository.save(order);

            // Update stock
            updateProductStock(cart);

            // Clear cart
            cartRepository.delete(cart);

            // Send confirmation email
            emailService.sendOrderConfirmation(order);

            return orderMapper.toResponseDto(order);
        } else {
            throw new PaymentFailedException("Payment processing failed: " + paymentResult.getErrorMessage());
        }
    }
}
```

@Entity
@Table(name = "playlists")
public class Playlist extends AuditableEntity {

    private List<PlaylistTrack> tracks = new ArrayList<>();

// MusicService
@Service
@Transactional
public class MusicService {

    private final MusicTrackRepository musicTrackRepository;
    private final PlaylistRepository playlistRepository;
    private final FileService fileService;
    private final AudioMetadataExtractor audioMetadataExtractor;

    public MusicTrackResponseDto uploadMusicTrack(MultipartFile file, MusicTrackRequestDto request) {
        // Validate file
        validateAudioFile(file);

        // Extract metadata
        AudioMetadata metadata = audioMetadataExtractor.extract(file);

        // Upload file
        FileUploadResult uploadResult = fileService.uploadFile(file, "music");

        // Create track entity
        MusicTrack track = new MusicTrack();
        track.setTitle(request.getTitle() != null ? request.getTitle() : metadata.getTitle());
        track.setSlug(slugService.generateSlug(track.getTitle()));
        track.setArtist(request.getArtist() != null ? request.getArtist() : metadata.getArtist());
        track.setAlbum(request.getAlbum() != null ? request.getAlbum() : metadata.getAlbum());
        track.setGenre(request.getGenre() != null ? request.getGenre() : metadata.getGenre());
        track.setDurationSeconds(metadata.getDurationSeconds());
        track.setFileUrl(uploadResult.getUrl());
        track.setFileSize(file.getSize());
        track.setBitRate(metadata.getBitRate());
        track.setSampleRate(metadata.getSampleRate());
        track.setFormat(AudioFormat.fromMimeType(file.getContentType()));
        track.setUploadedBy(getCurrentUser());
        track.setIsPublic(request.getIsPublic());
        track.setIsDownloadable(request.getIsDownloadable());

        // Generate cover image if not provided
        if (request.getCoverImageUrl() == null && metadata.getCoverImage() != null) {
            String coverUrl = fileService.saveCoverImage(metadata.getCoverImage(), track.getSlug());
            track.setCoverImageUrl(coverUrl);
        }

        MusicTrack savedTrack = musicTrackRepository.save(track);

        // Index for search
        searchService.indexMusicTrack(savedTrack);

        return musicTrackMapper.toResponseDto(savedTrack);
    }

    public PlaylistResponseDto createPlaylist(PlaylistRequestDto request) {
        User currentUser = getCurrentUser();

        Playlist playlist = new Playlist();
        playlist.setName(request.getName());
        playlist.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        playlist.setIsPublic(request.getIsPublic());
        playlist.setCreatedBy(currentUser);

        if (request.getCoverImageFile() != null) {
            FileUploadResult coverResult = fileService.uploadFile(request.getCoverImageFile(), "playlist-covers");
            playlist.setCoverImageUrl(coverResult.getUrl());
        }

        Playlist savedPlaylist = playlistRepository.save(playlist);
        return playlistMapper.toResponseDto(savedPlaylist);
    }

    public PlaylistResponseDto addTrackToPlaylist(Long playlistId, Long trackId, Integer position) {
        Playlist playlist = playlistRepository.findById(playlistId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PlaylistNotFoundException("Playlist not found"));

        MusicTrack track = musicTrackRepository.findById(trackId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new MusicTrackNotFoundException("Track not found"));

        // Check if user owns playlist or playlist is collaborative
        if (!canModifyPlaylist(playlist)) {
            throw new UnauthorizedException("Cannot modify this playlist");
        }

        // Check if track already in playlist
        boolean trackExists = playlist.getTracks().stream()
            .anyMatch(pt -> pt.getTrack().getId().equals(trackId));

        if (trackExists) {
            throw new TrackAlreadyInPlaylistException("Track already in playlist");
        }

        // Add track to playlist
        PlaylistTrack playlistTrack = new PlaylistTrack();
        playlistTrack.setPlaylist(playlist);
        playlistTrack.setTrack(track);
        playlistTrack.setPosition(position != null ? position : playlist.getTracks().size() + 1);

        playlist.getTracks().add(playlistTrack);
        playlist.setTrackCount(playlist.getTracks().size());
        playlist.setTotalDuration(calculateTotalDuration(playlist));

        Playlist savedPlaylist = playlistRepository.save(playlist);
        return playlistMapper.toResponseDto(savedPlaylist);
    }

    @Async
    public void incrementPlayCount(Long trackId) {
        musicTrackRepository.incrementPlayCount(trackId);
    }

    public StreamingResponseDto streamTrack(Long trackId, HttpServletRequest request) {
        MusicTrack track = musicTrackRepository.findById(trackId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new MusicTrackNotFoundException("Track not found"));

        if (!track.getIsPublic() && !isTrackOwner(track)) {
            throw new UnauthorizedException("Track is private");
        }

        // Increment play count asynchronously
        incrementPlayCount(trackId);

        // Support range requests for audio streaming
        String range = request.getHeader("Range");
        return fileService.streamFile(track.getFileUrl(), range);
    }
}
```

**💳 Advanced Payment Integration System:**
```java
// Payment Entity
@Entity
@Table(name = "payments")
public class Payment extends AuditableEntity {

    @Column(name = "payment_id", unique = true, nullable = false)
    private String paymentId;

    @OneToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    @JoinColumn(name = "order_id", nullable = false)
    private Order order;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private PaymentMethod method; // STRIPE, PAYPAL, VNPAY, BANK_TRANSFER

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    private PaymentStatus status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;

    @Column(name = "amount", precision = 10, scale = 2, nullable = false)
    private BigDecimal amount;

    @Column(name = "currency", length = 3)
    private String currency = "USD";

    @Column(name = "gateway_transaction_id")
    private String gatewayTransactionId;

    @Column(name = "gateway_response", columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String gatewayResponse;

    @Column(name = "processed_at")
    private LocalDateTime processedAt;

    @Column(name = "refunded_amount", precision = 10, scale = 2)
    private BigDecimal refundedAmount;

    @Column(name = "refunded_at")
    private LocalDateTime refundedAt;

    // Getters and Setters
}

// PaymentService
@Service
@Transactional
public class PaymentService {

    private final StripePaymentProcessor stripeProcessor;
    private final PayPalPaymentProcessor paypalProcessor;
    private final VNPayPaymentProcessor vnpayProcessor;
    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;

    public PaymentResult processPayment(Order order, PaymentRequestDto request) {
        Payment payment = createPayment(order, request);

        try {
            PaymentProcessor processor = getPaymentProcessor(request.getMethod());
            PaymentResult result = processor.processPayment(payment, request);

            if (result.isSuccessful()) {
                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.COMPLETED);
                payment.setGatewayTransactionId(result.getTransactionId());
                payment.setProcessedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
            } else {
                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
            }

            payment.setGatewayResponse(result.getGatewayResponse());
            paymentRepository.save(payment);

            return result;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
            payment.setGatewayResponse(e.getMessage());
            paymentRepository.save(payment);

            throw new PaymentProcessingException("Payment processing failed", e);
        }
    }

    private PaymentProcessor getPaymentProcessor(PaymentMethod method) {
        return switch (method) {
            case STRIPE -> stripeProcessor;
            case PAYPAL -> paypalProcessor;
            case VNPAY -> vnpayProcessor;
            default -> throw new UnsupportedPaymentMethodException("Unsupported payment method: " + method);
        };
    }
}

// Stripe Payment Processor
@Component
public class StripePaymentProcessor implements PaymentProcessor {

    @Value("${stripe.secret-key}")
    private String stripeSecretKey;

    @PostConstruct
    public void init() {
        Stripe.apiKey = stripeSecretKey;
    }

    @Override
    public PaymentResult processPayment(Payment payment, PaymentRequestDto request) {
        try {
            PaymentIntentCreateParams params = PaymentIntentCreateParams.builder()
                .setAmount(payment.getAmount().multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).longValue()) // Convert to cents
                .setCurrency(payment.getCurrency().toLowerCase())
                .setPaymentMethod(request.getPaymentMethodId())
                .setConfirm(true)
                .setReturnUrl(request.getReturnUrl())
                .build();

            PaymentIntent intent = PaymentIntent.create(params);

            return PaymentResult.builder()
                .successful(intent.getStatus().equals("succeeded"))
                .transactionId(intent.getId())
                .gatewayResponse(intent.toJson())
                .build();

        } catch (StripeException e) {
            return PaymentResult.builder()
                .successful(false)
                .errorMessage(e.getMessage())
                .gatewayResponse(e.toString())
                .build();
        }
    }
}

// VNPay Payment Processor (for Vietnamese market)
@Component
public class VNPayPaymentProcessor implements PaymentProcessor {

    @Value("${vnpay.tmn-code}")
    private String tmnCode;

    @Value("${vnpay.secret-key}")
    private String secretKey;

    @Value("${vnpay.url}")
    private String vnpayUrl;

    @Override
    public PaymentResult processPayment(Payment payment, PaymentRequestDto request) {
        try {
            Map<String, String> vnpParams = new HashMap<>();
            vnpParams.put("vnp_Version", "2.1.0");
            vnpParams.put("vnp_Command", "pay");
            vnpParams.put("vnp_TmnCode", tmnCode);
            vnpParams.put("vnp_Amount", payment.getAmount().multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).toString());
            vnpParams.put("vnp_CurrCode", "VND");
            vnpParams.put("vnp_TxnRef", payment.getPaymentId());
            vnpParams.put("vnp_OrderInfo", "Payment for order " + payment.getOrder().getOrderNumber());
            vnpParams.put("vnp_OrderType", "other");
            vnpParams.put("vnp_Locale", "vn");
            vnpParams.put("vnp_ReturnUrl", request.getReturnUrl());
            vnpParams.put("vnp_IpAddr", request.getClientIp());
            vnpParams.put("vnp_CreateDate", LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMMddHHmmss")));

            String queryUrl = buildQuery(vnpParams);
            String hashData = buildHashData(vnpParams);
            String vnpSecureHash = hmacSHA512(secretKey, hashData);
            queryUrl += "&vnp_SecureHash=" + vnpSecureHash;

            String paymentUrl = vnpayUrl + "?" + queryUrl;

            return PaymentResult.builder()
                .successful(true)
                .redirectUrl(paymentUrl)
                .transactionId(payment.getPaymentId())
                .build();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            return PaymentResult.builder()
                .successful(false)
                .errorMessage(e.getMessage())
                .build();
        }
    }
}
```

```java
// Document Entity
@Entity
@Table(name = "documents")
public class Document extends AuditableEntity {

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String title;

    @Column(unique = true, nullable = false)
    private String slug;

    @Column(columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String description;

    @Column(name = "file_name", nullable = false)
    private String fileName;

    @Column(name = "original_file_name", nullable = false)
    private String originalFileName;

    @Column(name = "file_path", nullable = false)
    private String filePath;

    @Column(name = "file_url", nullable = false)
    private String fileUrl;

    @Column(name = "file_size", nullable = false)
    private Long fileSize;

    @Column(name = "mime_type", nullable = false)
    private String mimeType;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    private DocumentType type; // PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PPT, PPTX, TXT

    @Column(name = "page_count")
    private Integer pageCount;

    @Column(name = "word_count")
    private Integer wordCount;

    @Column(name = "thumbnail_url")
    private String thumbnailUrl;

    @Column(name = "preview_url")
    private String previewUrl;

    @Column(name = "download_count", columnDefinition = "INT DEFAULT 0")
    private Integer downloadCount = 0;

    @Column(name = "view_count", columnDefinition = "INT DEFAULT 0")
    private Integer viewCount = 0;

    @Column(name = "is_public", columnDefinition = "BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE")
    private Boolean isPublic = true;

    @Column(name = "is_downloadable", columnDefinition = "BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE")
    private Boolean isDownloadable = true;

    @Column(name = "password_protected", columnDefinition = "BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE")
    private Boolean passwordProtected = false;

    @Column(name = "access_password")
    private String accessPassword;

    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    @JoinColumn(name = "uploaded_by", nullable = false)
    private User uploadedBy;

    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    @JoinColumn(name = "category_id")
    private DocumentCategory category;

    @OneToMany(mappedBy = "document", cascade = CascadeType.ALL)
    private List<DocumentVersion> versions = new ArrayList<>();

    @ElementCollection
    @CollectionTable(name = "document_tags", joinColumns = @JoinColumn(name = "document_id"))
    @Column(name = "tag")
    private Set<String> tags = new HashSet<>();

    // Getters and Setters
}

// DocumentService
@Service
@Transactional
public class DocumentService {

    private final DocumentRepository documentRepository;
    private final DocumentProcessor documentProcessor;
    private final FileService fileService;
    private final ThumbnailGenerator thumbnailGenerator;
    private final TextExtractor textExtractor;

    public DocumentResponseDto uploadDocument(MultipartFile file, DocumentRequestDto request) {
        // Validate file
        validateDocumentFile(file);

        // Upload file
        FileUploadResult uploadResult = fileService.uploadFile(file, "documents");

        // Process document
        DocumentMetadata metadata = documentProcessor.extractMetadata(file);

        // Create document entity
        Document document = new Document();
        document.setTitle(request.getTitle() != null ? request.getTitle() : file.getOriginalFilename());
        document.setSlug(slugService.generateSlug(document.getTitle()));
        document.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        document.setFileName(uploadResult.getFileName());
        document.setOriginalFileName(file.getOriginalFilename());
        document.setFilePath(uploadResult.getPath());
        document.setFileUrl(uploadResult.getUrl());
        document.setFileSize(file.getSize());
        document.setMimeType(file.getContentType());
        document.setType(DocumentType.fromMimeType(file.getContentType()));
        document.setPageCount(metadata.getPageCount());
        document.setWordCount(metadata.getWordCount());
        document.setUploadedBy(getCurrentUser());
        document.setIsPublic(request.getIsPublic());
        document.setIsDownloadable(request.getIsDownloadable());

        if (request.getTags() != null) {
            document.setTags(new HashSet<>(request.getTags()));
        }

        // Generate thumbnail
        if (canGenerateThumbnail(document.getType())) {
            String thumbnailUrl = thumbnailGenerator.generateThumbnail(uploadResult.getPath());
            document.setThumbnailUrl(thumbnailUrl);
        }

        // Generate preview for supported formats
        if (canGeneratePreview(document.getType())) {
            String previewUrl = documentProcessor.generatePreview(uploadResult.getPath());
            document.setPreviewUrl(previewUrl);
        }

        // Extract text for search indexing
        String extractedText = textExtractor.extractText(file);

        Document savedDocument = documentRepository.save(document);

        // Index for search
        searchService.indexDocument(savedDocument, extractedText);

        return documentMapper.toResponseDto(savedDocument);
    }

    public DocumentResponseDto createNewVersion(Long documentId, MultipartFile file, String versionNotes) {
        Document originalDocument = documentRepository.findById(documentId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new DocumentNotFoundException("Document not found"));

        if (!isDocumentOwner(originalDocument)) {
            throw new UnauthorizedException("Cannot update this document");
        }

        // Create new version
        DocumentVersion version = new DocumentVersion();
        version.setDocument(originalDocument);
        version.setVersionNumber(getNextVersionNumber(originalDocument));
        version.setVersionNotes(versionNotes);
        version.setFilePath(originalDocument.getFilePath()); // Store old file path
        version.setFileSize(originalDocument.getFileSize());
        version.setCreatedBy(getCurrentUser());

        originalDocument.getVersions().add(version);

        // Update document with new file
        FileUploadResult uploadResult = fileService.uploadFile(file, "documents");
        DocumentMetadata metadata = documentProcessor.extractMetadata(file);

        originalDocument.setFileName(uploadResult.getFileName());
        originalDocument.setFilePath(uploadResult.getPath());
        originalDocument.setFileUrl(uploadResult.getUrl());
        originalDocument.setFileSize(file.getSize());
        originalDocument.setPageCount(metadata.getPageCount());
        originalDocument.setWordCount(metadata.getWordCount());
        originalDocument.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());

        Document savedDocument = documentRepository.save(originalDocument);
        return documentMapper.toResponseDto(savedDocument);
    }

    public StreamingResponseDto downloadDocument(Long documentId, String password) {
        Document document = documentRepository.findById(documentId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new DocumentNotFoundException("Document not found"));

        if (!document.getIsDownloadable()) {
            throw new DownloadNotAllowedException("Document download is not allowed");
        }

        if (!document.getIsPublic() && !isDocumentOwner(document)) {
            throw new UnauthorizedException("Document is private");
        }

        if (document.getPasswordProtected()) {
            if (password == null || !passwordEncoder.matches(password, document.getAccessPassword())) {
                throw new InvalidPasswordException("Invalid password");
            }
        }

        // Increment download count
        documentRepository.incrementDownloadCount(documentId);

        return fileService.downloadFile(document.getFilePath(), document.getOriginalFileName());
    }

    public DocumentPreviewResponseDto previewDocument(Long documentId, Integer page) {
        Document document = documentRepository.findById(documentId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new DocumentNotFoundException("Document not found"));

        if (!document.getIsPublic() && !isDocumentOwner(document)) {
            throw new UnauthorizedException("Document is private");
        }

        // Increment view count
        documentRepository.incrementViewCount(documentId);

        if (document.getPreviewUrl() != null) {
            return DocumentPreviewResponseDto.builder()
                .previewUrl(document.getPreviewUrl())
                .pageCount(document.getPageCount())
                .currentPage(page != null ? page : 1)
                .build();
        } else {
            throw new PreviewNotAvailableException("Preview not available for this document type");
        }
    }
}
```
