## **🔧 PHASE 9: DEBUGGING & TROUBLESHOOTING (Tuần 23)**

### **Tuần 23: Advanced Debugging & Troubleshooting**

**Ngày 155-157: Debugging Configuration & Tools**
```java
// Advanced Debugging Configuration
@Configuration
@ConditionalOnProperty(name = "app.debug.enabled", havingValue = "true")
public class DebugConfig {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DebugConfig.class);

    @Bean
    public LoggingFilter loggingFilter() {
        logger.info("Enabling debug logging filter");
        return new LoggingFilter();
    }

    @Bean
    public PerformanceMonitoringFilter performanceFilter() {
        return new PerformanceMonitoringFilter();
    }

    @Bean
    public RequestResponseLoggingFilter requestResponseFilter() {
        return new RequestResponseLoggingFilter();
    }

    @EventListener
    public void handleContextRefresh(ContextRefreshedEvent event) {
        logger.info("Application context refreshed - Debug mode active");
        logBeanDefinitions(event.getApplicationContext());
    }

    private void logBeanDefinitions(ApplicationContext context) {
        String[] beanNames = context.getBeanDefinitionNames();
        logger.debug("Total beans registered: {}", beanNames.length);

        for (String beanName : beanNames) {
            Object bean = context.getBean(beanName);
            logger.debug("Bean: {} - Type: {}", beanName, bean.getClass().getSimpleName());
        }
    }
}

// Custom Logging Filter for Request/Response Debugging
@Component
@Order(1)
public class LoggingFilter implements Filter {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LoggingFilter.class);
    private static final Set<String> SENSITIVE_HEADERS = Set.of(
        "authorization", "cookie", "x-api-key", "x-auth-token"
    );

    @Override
    public void doFilter(ServletRequest request, ServletResponse response,
                        FilterChain chain) throws IOException, ServletException {

        if (!(request instanceof HttpServletRequest) || !(response instanceof HttpServletResponse)) {
            chain.doFilter(request, response);
            return;
        }

        HttpServletRequest httpRequest = (HttpServletRequest) request;
        HttpServletResponse httpResponse = (HttpServletResponse) response;

        // Wrap request and response for logging
        ContentCachingRequestWrapper wrappedRequest = new ContentCachingRequestWrapper(httpRequest);
        ContentCachingResponseWrapper wrappedResponse = new ContentCachingResponseWrapper(httpResponse);

        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        String requestId = UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8);

        try {
            // Log incoming request
            logRequest(wrappedRequest, requestId);

            // Process request
            chain.doFilter(wrappedRequest, wrappedResponse);

            // Log outgoing response
            logResponse(wrappedResponse, requestId, System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime);

        } finally {
            // Ensure response body is copied back
            wrappedResponse.copyBodyToResponse();
        }
    }

    private void logRequest(ContentCachingRequestWrapper request, String requestId) {
        StringBuilder logMessage = new StringBuilder();
        logMessage.append("\n=== INCOMING REQUEST [").append(requestId).append("] ===\n");
        logMessage.append("Method: ").append(request.getMethod()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("URI: ").append(request.getRequestURI()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Query: ").append(request.getQueryString()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Remote Address: ").append(getClientIpAddress(request)).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("User Agent: ").append(request.getHeader("User-Agent")).append("\n");

        // Log headers (excluding sensitive ones)
        logMessage.append("Headers:\n");
        Collections.list(request.getHeaderNames()).forEach(headerName -> {
            if (!SENSITIVE_HEADERS.contains(headerName.toLowerCase())) {
                logMessage.append("  ").append(headerName).append(": ")
                    .append(request.getHeader(headerName)).append("\n");
            } else {
                logMessage.append("  ").append(headerName).append(": [REDACTED]\n");
            }
        });

        // Log request body for POST/PUT requests
        if ("POST".equals(request.getMethod()) || "PUT".equals(request.getMethod())) {
            String contentType = request.getContentType();
            if (contentType != null && contentType.contains("application/json")) {
                byte[] content = request.getContentAsByteArray();
                if (content.length > 0) {
                    String body = new String(content, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
                    logMessage.append("Body: ").append(sanitizeRequestBody(body)).append("\n");
                }
            }
        }

        logger.debug(logMessage.toString());
    }

    private void logResponse(ContentCachingResponseWrapper response, String requestId, long duration) {
        StringBuilder logMessage = new StringBuilder();
        logMessage.append("\n=== OUTGOING RESPONSE [").append(requestId).append("] ===\n");
        logMessage.append("Status: ").append(response.getStatus()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Duration: ").append(duration).append("ms\n");

        // Log response headers
        logMessage.append("Headers:\n");
        response.getHeaderNames().forEach(headerName -> {
            logMessage.append("  ").append(headerName).append(": ")
                .append(response.getHeader(headerName)).append("\n");
        });

        // Log response body for JSON responses
        String contentType = response.getContentType();
        if (contentType != null && contentType.contains("application/json")) {
            byte[] content = response.getContentAsByteArray();
            if (content.length > 0 && content.length < 10000) { // Limit size
                String body = new String(content, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
                logMessage.append("Body: ").append(body).append("\n");
            }
        }

        logger.debug(logMessage.toString());
    }

    private String getClientIpAddress(HttpServletRequest request) {
        String[] headerNames = {"X-Forwarded-For", "X-Real-IP", "Proxy-Client-IP", "WL-Proxy-Client-IP"};

        for (String headerName : headerNames) {
            String ip = request.getHeader(headerName);
            if (ip != null && !ip.isEmpty() && !"unknown".equalsIgnoreCase(ip)) {
                return ip.split(",")[0].trim();
            }
        }

        return request.getRemoteAddr();
    }

    private String sanitizeRequestBody(String body) {
        // Remove sensitive information from request body
        return body.replaceAll("\"password\"\\s*:\\s*\"[^\"]*\"", "\"password\":\"[REDACTED]\"")
                  .replaceAll("\"token\"\\s*:\\s*\"[^\"]*\"", "\"token\":\"[REDACTED]\"")
                  .replaceAll("\"apiKey\"\\s*:\\s*\"[^\"]*\"", "\"apiKey\":\"[REDACTED]\"");
    }
}

// Performance Monitoring Filter
@Component
@Order(2)
public class PerformanceMonitoringFilter implements Filter {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PerformanceMonitoringFilter.class);
    private final MeterRegistry meterRegistry;

    public PerformanceMonitoringFilter(MeterRegistry meterRegistry) {
        this.meterRegistry = meterRegistry;
    }

    @Override
    public void doFilter(ServletRequest request, ServletResponse response,
                        FilterChain chain) throws IOException, ServletException {

        HttpServletRequest httpRequest = (HttpServletRequest) request;
        HttpServletResponse httpResponse = (HttpServletResponse) response;

        String uri = httpRequest.getRequestURI();
        String method = httpRequest.getMethod();

        Timer.Sample sample = Timer.start(meterRegistry);
        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();

        try {
            chain.doFilter(request, response);
        } finally {
            long duration = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime;

            // Record metrics
            sample.stop(Timer.builder("http.request.duration")
                .tag("method", method)
                .tag("uri", uri)
                .tag("status", String.valueOf(httpResponse.getStatus()))
                .register(meterRegistry));

            // Log slow requests
            if (duration > 1000) { // More than 1 second
                logger.warn("SLOW REQUEST: {} {} took {}ms - Status: {}",
                    method, uri, duration, httpResponse.getStatus());

                // Send alert for very slow requests
                if (duration > 5000) {
                    sendSlowRequestAlert(method, uri, duration, httpResponse.getStatus());
                }
            }

            // Log error responses
            if (httpResponse.getStatus() >= 400) {
                logger.error("ERROR RESPONSE: {} {} - Status: {} - Duration: {}ms",
                    method, uri, httpResponse.getStatus(), duration);
            }
        }
    }

    private void sendSlowRequestAlert(String method, String uri, long duration, int status) {
        // Implementation to send alert (email, Slack, etc.)
        logger.error("CRITICAL: Very slow request detected - {} {} took {}ms (Status: {})",
            method, uri, duration, status);
    }
}

// Exception Debugging and Analysis
@ControllerAdvice
@Order(Ordered.HIGHEST_PRECEDENCE)
public class DebugExceptionHandler {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DebugExceptionHandler.class);

    @Value("${app.debug.enabled:false}")
    private boolean debugEnabled;

    @Value("${spring.profiles.active:}")
    private String activeProfiles;

    @ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)
    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleGenericException(Exception ex, WebRequest request) {
        String requestId = UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8);

        // Log detailed exception information
        logException(ex, request, requestId);

        // Create error response
        ErrorResponse errorResponse = ErrorResponse.builder()
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .message("An unexpected error occurred")
            .requestId(requestId)
            .path(getRequestPath(request))
            .build();

        // Add debug information in development
        if (debugEnabled || isDevelopmentProfile()) {
            errorResponse.setDebugMessage(ex.getMessage());
            errorResponse.setExceptionType(ex.getClass().getSimpleName());
            errorResponse.setStackTrace(getStackTraceAsString(ex));
        }

        return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR).body(errorResponse);
    }

    @ExceptionHandler(ValidationException.class)
    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleValidationException(ValidationException ex, WebRequest request) {
        String requestId = UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8);

        logger.warn("Validation error [{}]: {}", requestId, ex.getMessage());

        ErrorResponse errorResponse = ErrorResponse.builder()
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .message("Validation failed")
            .requestId(requestId)
            .path(getRequestPath(request))
            .validationErrors(ex.getErrors())
            .build();

        return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST).body(errorResponse);
    }

    @ExceptionHandler(DataAccessException.class)
    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleDataAccessException(DataAccessException ex, WebRequest request) {
        String requestId = UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8);

        logger.error("Database error [{}]: {}", requestId, ex.getMessage(), ex);

        ErrorResponse errorResponse = ErrorResponse.builder()
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .message("Database operation failed")
            .requestId(requestId)
            .path(getRequestPath(request))
            .build();

        if (debugEnabled) {
            errorResponse.setDebugMessage(ex.getMostSpecificCause().getMessage());
        }

        return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR).body(errorResponse);
    }

    private void logException(Exception ex, WebRequest request, String requestId) {
        StringBuilder logMessage = new StringBuilder();
        logMessage.append("\n=== EXCEPTION DETAILS [").append(requestId).append("] ===\n");
        logMessage.append("Exception Type: ").append(ex.getClass().getName()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Message: ").append(ex.getMessage()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Request Path: ").append(getRequestPath(request)).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Request Parameters: ").append(getRequestParameters(request)).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("User: ").append(getCurrentUsername()).append("\n");
        logMessage.append("Timestamp: ").append(LocalDateTime.now()).append("\n");

        if (ex.getCause() != null) {
            logMessage.append("Root Cause: ").append(ex.getCause().getClass().getName())
                .append(" - ").append(ex.getCause().getMessage()).append("\n");
        }

        logMessage.append("Stack Trace:\n").append(getStackTraceAsString(ex));

        logger.error(logMessage.toString());
    }

    private boolean isDevelopmentProfile() {
        return activeProfiles.contains("dev") || activeProfiles.contains("local");
    }

    private String getRequestPath(WebRequest request) {
        if (request instanceof ServletWebRequest) {
            return ((ServletWebRequest) request).getRequest().getRequestURI();
        }
        return "Unknown";
    }

    private String getRequestParameters(WebRequest request) {
        Map<String, String[]> parameterMap = request.getParameterMap();
        return parameterMap.entrySet().stream()
            .map(entry -> entry.getKey() + "=" + Arrays.toString(entry.getValue()))
            .collect(Collectors.joining(", "));
    }

    private String getCurrentUsername() {
        try {
            Authentication auth = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();
            return auth != null ? auth.getName() : "Anonymous";
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return "Unknown";
        }
    }

    private String getStackTraceAsString(Exception ex) {
        StringWriter sw = new StringWriter();
        PrintWriter pw = new PrintWriter(sw);
        ex.printStackTrace(pw);
        return sw.toString();
    }
}
```

**Ngày 158-161: Troubleshooting Tools & Utilities**
```java
// Database Connection Troubleshooting
@Component
public class DatabaseTroubleshooter {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DatabaseTroubleshooter.class);

    @Autowired
    private DataSource dataSource;

    @Autowired
    private EntityManager entityManager;

    @EventListener
    public void handleApplicationReady(ApplicationReadyEvent event) {
        performDatabaseHealthCheck();
    }

    public void performDatabaseHealthCheck() {
        logger.info("Performing database health check...");

        try {
            // Test basic connectivity
            testDatabaseConnection();

            // Test query execution
            testQueryExecution();

            // Check database metadata
            checkDatabaseMetadata();

            // Analyze connection pool
            analyzeConnectionPool();

            logger.info("Database health check completed successfully");

        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Database health check failed", e);
            sendDatabaseAlert(e);
        }
    }

    private void testDatabaseConnection() throws SQLException {
        try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
            boolean isValid = connection.isValid(5); // 5 second timeout
            logger.info("Database connection valid: {}", isValid);

            if (!isValid) {
                throw new SQLException("Database connection is not valid");
            }

            // Test transaction
            connection.setAutoCommit(false);
            connection.rollback();
            connection.setAutoCommit(true);

            logger.info("Database transaction test passed");
        }
    }

    private void testQueryExecution() {
        try {
            // Test simple query
            Query query = entityManager.createNativeQuery("SELECT 1");
            Object result = query.getSingleResult();
            logger.info("Database query test result: {}", result);

            // Test table access
            Query countQuery = entityManager.createQuery("SELECT COUNT(u) FROM User u");
            Long userCount = (Long) countQuery.getSingleResult();
            logger.info("User table accessible, count: {}", userCount);

        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Database query test failed", e);
            throw new RuntimeException("Database query execution failed", e);
        }
    }

    private void checkDatabaseMetadata() throws SQLException {
        try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
            DatabaseMetaData metaData = connection.getMetaData();

            logger.info("Database Product: {} {}",
                metaData.getDatabaseProductName(),
                metaData.getDatabaseProductVersion());

            logger.info("Driver: {} {}",
                metaData.getDriverName(),
                metaData.getDriverVersion());

            logger.info("Max Connections: {}", metaData.getMaxConnections());
            logger.info("Transaction Isolation: {}", connection.getTransactionIsolation());
        }
    }

    private void analyzeConnectionPool() {
        if (dataSource instanceof HikariDataSource) {
            HikariDataSource hikariDS = (HikariDataSource) dataSource;
            HikariPoolMXBean poolBean = hikariDS.getHikariPoolMXBean();

            logger.info("Connection Pool Stats:");
            logger.info("  Active Connections: {}", poolBean.getActiveConnections());
            logger.info("  Idle Connections: {}", poolBean.getIdleConnections());
            logger.info("  Total Connections: {}", poolBean.getTotalConnections());
            logger.info("  Threads Awaiting Connection: {}", poolBean.getThreadsAwaitingConnection());

            // Alert if pool is under stress
            if (poolBean.getThreadsAwaitingConnection() > 0) {
                logger.warn("Connection pool under stress - {} threads waiting",
                    poolBean.getThreadsAwaitingConnection());
            }
        }
    }

    private void sendDatabaseAlert(Exception e) {
        // Implementation to send alert to administrators
        logger.error("CRITICAL: Database health check failed - {}", e.getMessage());
    }
}

// Memory and Performance Troubleshooting
@Component
public class PerformanceTroubleshooter {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PerformanceTroubleshooter.class);

    @Scheduled(fixedRate = 60000) // Every minute
    public void monitorSystemHealth() {
        logMemoryUsage();
        logThreadInfo();
        logGarbageCollectionStats();
    }

    private void logMemoryUsage() {
        MemoryMXBean memoryBean = ManagementFactory.getMemoryMXBean();
        MemoryUsage heapUsage = memoryBean.getHeapMemoryUsage();
        MemoryUsage nonHeapUsage = memoryBean.getNonHeapMemoryUsage();

        long heapUsed = heapUsage.getUsed();
        long heapMax = heapUsage.getMax();
        double heapUsagePercent = (double) heapUsed / heapMax * 100;

        logger.debug("Memory Usage - Heap: {}MB/{}MB ({}%), Non-Heap: {}MB",
            heapUsed / 1024 / 1024,
            heapMax / 1024 / 1024,
            String.format("%.2f", heapUsagePercent),
            nonHeapUsage.getUsed() / 1024 / 1024);

        // Alert if memory usage is high
        if (heapUsagePercent > 85) {
            logger.warn("HIGH MEMORY USAGE: {}% heap used", String.format("%.2f", heapUsagePercent));
        }
    }

    private void logThreadInfo() {
        ThreadMXBean threadBean = ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean();

        int threadCount = threadBean.getThreadCount();
        int daemonThreadCount = threadBean.getDaemonThreadCount();
        long totalStartedThreadCount = threadBean.getTotalStartedThreadCount();

        logger.debug("Thread Info - Active: {}, Daemon: {}, Total Started: {}",
            threadCount, daemonThreadCount, totalStartedThreadCount);

        // Alert if thread count is high
        if (threadCount > 200) {
            logger.warn("HIGH THREAD COUNT: {} active threads", threadCount);

            // Log thread details for debugging
            ThreadInfo[] threadInfos = threadBean.getThreadInfo(threadBean.getAllThreadIds());
            for (ThreadInfo threadInfo : threadInfos) {
                if (threadInfo != null) {
                    logger.debug("Thread: {} - State: {} - CPU Time: {}ms",
                        threadInfo.getThreadName(),
                        threadInfo.getThreadState(),
                        threadBean.getThreadCpuTime(threadInfo.getThreadId()) / 1000000);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private void logGarbageCollectionStats() {
        List<GarbageCollectorMXBean> gcBeans = ManagementFactory.getGarbageCollectorMXBeans();

        for (GarbageCollectorMXBean gcBean : gcBeans) {
            long collectionCount = gcBean.getCollectionCount();
            long collectionTime = gcBean.getCollectionTime();

            logger.debug("GC {} - Collections: {}, Time: {}ms",
                gcBean.getName(), collectionCount, collectionTime);
        }
    }

    @EventListener
    public void handleOutOfMemoryError(OutOfMemoryError error) {
        logger.error("OUT OF MEMORY ERROR DETECTED", error);

        // Generate heap dump
        generateHeapDump();

        // Send critical alert
        sendCriticalAlert("Out of Memory Error", error.getMessage());
    }

    private void generateHeapDump() {
        try {
            MBeanServer server = ManagementFactory.getPlatformMBeanServer();
            HotSpotDiagnosticMXBean mxBean = ManagementFactory.newPlatformMXBeanProxy(
                server, "com.sun.management:type=HotSpotDiagnostic", HotSpotDiagnosticMXBean.class);

            String fileName = "heap-dump-" + LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMMdd-HHmmss")) + ".hprof";
            mxBean.dumpHeap(fileName, true);

            logger.info("Heap dump generated: {}", fileName);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Failed to generate heap dump", e);
        }
    }

    private void sendCriticalAlert(String subject, String message) {
        // Implementation to send critical alert
        logger.error("CRITICAL ALERT: {} - {}", subject, message);
    }
}
```

```java
// Advanced Custom Metrics Configuration
@Component
public class CustomMetrics {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CustomMetrics.class);

    private final MeterRegistry meterRegistry;
    private final Counter userRegistrationCounter;
    private final Counter loginAttemptCounter;
    private final Counter loginSuccessCounter;
    private final Counter loginFailureCounter;
    private final Timer apiResponseTimer;
    private final Timer databaseQueryTimer;
    private final Gauge activeUsersGauge;
    private final DistributionSummary requestSizeSummary;

    public CustomMetrics(MeterRegistry meterRegistry) {
        this.meterRegistry = meterRegistry;

        // Initialize counters
        this.userRegistrationCounter = Counter.builder("user.registration.total")
            .description("Total number of user registrations")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        this.loginAttemptCounter = Counter.builder("user.login.attempts.total")
            .description("Total number of login attempts")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        this.loginSuccessCounter = Counter.builder("user.login.success.total")
            .description("Total number of successful logins")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        this.loginFailureCounter = Counter.builder("user.login.failure.total")
            .description("Total number of failed logins")
            .tag("reason", "unknown")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        // Initialize timers
        this.apiResponseTimer = Timer.builder("api.response.time")
            .description("API response time")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        this.databaseQueryTimer = Timer.builder("database.query.time")
            .description("Database query execution time")
            .register(meterRegistry);

        // Initialize gauges
        this.activeUsersGauge = Gauge.builder("user.active.count")
            .description("Number of currently active users")
            .register(meterRegistry, this, CustomMetrics::getActiveUserCount);

        // Initialize distribution summaries
        this.requestSizeSummary = DistributionSummary.builder("http.request.size")
            .description("HTTP request size distribution")
            .baseUnit("bytes")
            .register(meterRegistry);
    }

    // User metrics
    public void incrementUserRegistration() {
        userRegistrationCounter.increment();
        logger.debug("User registration metric incremented");
    }

    public void incrementLoginAttempt() {
        loginAttemptCounter.increment();
    }

    public void incrementLoginSuccess() {
        loginSuccessCounter.increment();
    }

    public void incrementLoginFailure(String reason) {
        Counter.builder("user.login.failure.total")
            .tag("reason", reason)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    // API metrics
    public void recordApiResponseTime(String endpoint, String method, int statusCode, long duration) {
        Timer.builder("api.response.time")
            .tag("endpoint", endpoint)
            .tag("method", method)
            .tag("status", String.valueOf(statusCode))
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .record(duration, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
    }

    public void recordRequestSize(String endpoint, long sizeInBytes) {
        DistributionSummary.builder("http.request.size")
            .tag("endpoint", endpoint)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .record(sizeInBytes);
    }

    // Database metrics
    public void recordDatabaseQueryTime(String queryType, String table, long duration) {
        Timer.builder("database.query.time")
            .tag("type", queryType)
            .tag("table", table)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .record(duration, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
    }

    public void incrementDatabaseConnectionError(String errorType) {
        Counter.builder("database.connection.errors.total")
            .tag("error_type", errorType)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    // Business metrics
    public void recordBlogPost(String category) {
        Counter.builder("blog.posts.total")
            .tag("category", category)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    public void recordFileUpload(String fileType, long fileSizeBytes) {
        Counter.builder("file.uploads.total")
            .tag("type", fileType)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();

        DistributionSummary.builder("file.upload.size")
            .tag("type", fileType)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .record(fileSizeBytes);
    }

    public void recordEmailSent(String emailType, boolean success) {
        Counter.builder("email.sent.total")
            .tag("type", emailType)
            .tag("status", success ? "success" : "failure")
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    // Cache metrics
    public void recordCacheHit(String cacheName) {
        Counter.builder("cache.requests.total")
            .tag("cache", cacheName)
            .tag("result", "hit")
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    public void recordCacheMiss(String cacheName) {
        Counter.builder("cache.requests.total")
            .tag("cache", cacheName)
            .tag("result", "miss")
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    // Security metrics
    public void recordSecurityEvent(String eventType, String severity) {
        Counter.builder("security.events.total")
            .tag("type", eventType)
            .tag("severity", severity)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    public void recordRateLimitExceeded(String endpoint, String clientIp) {
        Counter.builder("rate.limit.exceeded.total")
            .tag("endpoint", endpoint)
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();

        logger.warn("Rate limit exceeded for endpoint {} from IP {}", endpoint, clientIp);
    }

    // Helper methods
    private double getActiveUserCount() {
        // Implementation to get current active user count
        // This could query a cache or database
        return 0.0; // Placeholder
    }

    // Custom metric for application health
    @EventListener
    public void handleApplicationEvent(ApplicationEvent event) {
        if (event instanceof ContextRefreshedEvent) {
            recordApplicationStart();
        } else if (event instanceof ContextClosedEvent) {
            recordApplicationStop();
        }
    }

    private void recordApplicationStart() {
        Counter.builder("application.lifecycle.total")
            .tag("event", "start")
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }

    private void recordApplicationStop() {
        Counter.builder("application.lifecycle.total")
            .tag("event", "stop")
            .register(meterRegistry)
            .increment();
    }
}

// Advanced Health Checks
@Component
public class CustomHealthIndicators {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CustomHealthIndicators.class);

    @Autowired
    private DataSource dataSource;

    @Autowired
    private RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;

    @Value("${app.external-services.enabled:true}")
    private boolean externalServicesEnabled;

    // Database Health Check
    @Component("database")
    public static class DatabaseHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

        private final DataSource dataSource;

        public DatabaseHealthIndicator(DataSource dataSource) {
            this.dataSource = dataSource;
        }

        @Override
        public Health health() {
            try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
                // Test connection validity
                if (!connection.isValid(5)) {
                    return Health.down()
                        .withDetail("database", "Connection invalid")
                        .build();
                }

                // Test query execution
                try (PreparedStatement stmt = connection.prepareStatement("SELECT 1")) {
                    ResultSet rs = stmt.executeQuery();
                    if (!rs.next() || rs.getInt(1) != 1) {
                        return Health.down()
                            .withDetail("database", "Query test failed")
                            .build();
                    }
                }

                // Get connection pool info if available
                Map<String, Object> details = new HashMap<>();
                details.put("database", "Available");
                details.put("validationQuery", "Passed");

                if (dataSource instanceof HikariDataSource) {
                    HikariDataSource hikariDS = (HikariDataSource) dataSource;
                    HikariPoolMXBean poolBean = hikariDS.getHikariPoolMXBean();

                    details.put("activeConnections", poolBean.getActiveConnections());
                    details.put("idleConnections", poolBean.getIdleConnections());
                    details.put("totalConnections", poolBean.getTotalConnections());
                    details.put("threadsAwaitingConnection", poolBean.getThreadsAwaitingConnection());
                }

                return Health.up().withDetails(details).build();

            } catch (SQLException e) {
                return Health.down()
                    .withDetail("database", "Connection failed")
                    .withDetail("error", e.getMessage())
                    .build();
            }
        }
    }

    // Redis Health Check
    @Component("redis")
    public static class RedisHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

        private final RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;

        public RedisHealthIndicator(RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate) {
            this.redisTemplate = redisTemplate;
        }

        @Override
        public Health health() {
            try {
                // Test Redis connection
                String testKey = "health:check:" + System.currentTimeMillis();
                String testValue = "test";

                redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(testKey, testValue, Duration.ofSeconds(10));
                String retrievedValue = (String) redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(testKey);
                redisTemplate.delete(testKey);

                if (!testValue.equals(retrievedValue)) {
                    return Health.down()
                        .withDetail("redis", "Read/write test failed")
                        .build();
                }

                // Get Redis info
                RedisConnection connection = redisTemplate.getConnectionFactory().getConnection();
                Properties info = connection.info();
                connection.close();

                Map<String, Object> details = new HashMap<>();
                details.put("redis", "Available");
                details.put("version", info.getProperty("redis_version"));
                details.put("mode", info.getProperty("redis_mode"));
                details.put("connectedClients", info.getProperty("connected_clients"));
                details.put("usedMemory", info.getProperty("used_memory_human"));

                return Health.up().withDetails(details).build();

            } catch (Exception e) {
                return Health.down()
                    .withDetail("redis", "Connection failed")
                    .withDetail("error", e.getMessage())
                    .build();
            }
        }
    }

    // External Services Health Check
    @Component("externalServices")
    public static class ExternalServicesHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

        private final RestTemplate restTemplate;
        private final boolean externalServicesEnabled;

        public ExternalServicesHealthIndicator(RestTemplate restTemplate,
                                             @Value("${app.external-services.enabled:true}") boolean externalServicesEnabled) {
            this.restTemplate = restTemplate;
            this.externalServicesEnabled = externalServicesEnabled;
        }

        @Override
        public Health health() {
            if (!externalServicesEnabled) {
                return Health.up()
                    .withDetail("externalServices", "Disabled")
                    .build();
            }

            Map<String, Object> details = new HashMap<>();
            boolean allHealthy = true;

            // Check email service
            try {
                ResponseEntity<String> response = restTemplate.getForEntity(
                    "https://api.mailgun.net/v3/domains", String.class);
                details.put("emailService", Map.of(
                    "status", response.getStatusCode().is2xxSuccessful() ? "UP" : "DOWN",
                    "responseTime", "< 1s"
                ));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                details.put("emailService", Map.of(
                    "status", "DOWN",
                    "error", e.getMessage()
                ));
                allHealthy = false;
            }

            // Check payment service (if configured)
            try {
                // Stripe API health check
                ResponseEntity<String> response = restTemplate.getForEntity(
                    "https://api.stripe.com/v1/charges?limit=1", String.class);
                details.put("paymentService", Map.of(
                    "status", response.getStatusCode().is2xxSuccessful() ? "UP" : "DOWN"
                ));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                details.put("paymentService", Map.of(
                    "status", "DOWN",
                    "error", e.getMessage()
                ));
                allHealthy = false;
            }

            return allHealthy ? Health.up().withDetails(details).build()
                             : Health.down().withDetails(details).build();
        }
    }

    // Disk Space Health Check
    @Component("diskSpace")
    public static class DiskSpaceHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

        private final long threshold = 1024 * 1024 * 1024; // 1GB threshold

        @Override
        public Health health() {
            File diskPartition = new File(".");
            long freeSpace = diskPartition.getFreeSpace();
            long totalSpace = diskPartition.getTotalSpace();
            long usedSpace = totalSpace - freeSpace;

            double usagePercentage = (double) usedSpace / totalSpace * 100;

            Map<String, Object> details = new HashMap<>();
            details.put("total", formatBytes(totalSpace));
            details.put("free", formatBytes(freeSpace));
            details.put("used", formatBytes(usedSpace));
            details.put("usagePercentage", String.format("%.2f%%", usagePercentage));
            details.put("threshold", formatBytes(threshold));

            if (freeSpace < threshold) {
                return Health.down()
                    .withDetail("diskSpace", "Low disk space")
                    .withDetails(details)
                    .build();
            }

            return Health.up()
                .withDetail("diskSpace", "Sufficient")
                .withDetails(details)
                .build();
        }

        private String formatBytes(long bytes) {
            if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + " B";
            int exp = (int) (Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(1024));
            String pre = "KMGTPE".charAt(exp - 1) + "";
            return String.format("%.1f %sB", bytes / Math.pow(1024, exp), pre);
        }
    }
}
```

**Ngày 165-168: Advanced Security Hardening**
```java
// Advanced Rate Limiting Implementation
@Component
@Order(1)
public class RateLimitFilter implements Filter {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RateLimitFilter.class);

    private final Map<String, TokenBucket> buckets = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private final Map<String, AtomicInteger> attemptCounts = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private final Set<String> blacklistedIPs = ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet();

    // Rate limit configurations
    private static final int DEFAULT_CAPACITY = 100;
    private static final int DEFAULT_REFILL_RATE = 10;
    private static final int MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_HOUR = 1000;
    private static final int BLACKLIST_THRESHOLD = 5000;

    @Override
    public void doFilter(ServletRequest request, ServletResponse response,
                        FilterChain chain) throws IOException, ServletException {

        HttpServletRequest httpRequest = (HttpServletRequest) request;
        HttpServletResponse httpResponse = (HttpServletResponse) response;

        String clientIp = getClientIpAddress(httpRequest);
        String endpoint = httpRequest.getRequestURI();
        String userAgent = httpRequest.getHeader("User-Agent");

        // Check if IP is blacklisted
        if (blacklistedIPs.contains(clientIp)) {
            logger.warn("Blocked request from blacklisted IP: {}", clientIp);
            httpResponse.setStatus(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN.value());
            httpResponse.getWriter().write("Access denied");
            return;
        }

        // Apply rate limiting
        if (!isRequestAllowed(clientIp, endpoint, userAgent)) {
            logger.warn("Rate limit exceeded for IP: {} on endpoint: {}", clientIp, endpoint);

            // Track excessive attempts
            trackExcessiveAttempts(clientIp);

            httpResponse.setStatus(HttpStatus.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS.value());
            httpResponse.setHeader("X-RateLimit-Limit", String.valueOf(DEFAULT_CAPACITY));
            httpResponse.setHeader("X-RateLimit-Remaining", "0");
            httpResponse.setHeader("Retry-After", "60");
            httpResponse.getWriter().write("Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.");
            return;
        }

        chain.doFilter(request, response);
    }

    private boolean isRequestAllowed(String clientIp, String endpoint, String userAgent) {
        // Different rate limits for different endpoints
        int capacity = getCapacityForEndpoint(endpoint);
        int refillRate = getRefillRateForEndpoint(endpoint);

        String bucketKey = clientIp + ":" + endpoint;
        TokenBucket bucket = buckets.computeIfAbsent(bucketKey,
            k -> new TokenBucket(capacity, capacity, refillRate));

        // Check for suspicious user agents
        if (isSuspiciousUserAgent(userAgent)) {
            capacity = capacity / 2; // Reduce capacity for suspicious agents
        }

        return bucket.tryConsume(1);
    }

    private int getCapacityForEndpoint(String endpoint) {
        // API endpoints have stricter limits
        if (endpoint.startsWith("/api/")) {
            return 50;
        }
        // Login endpoints have very strict limits
        if (endpoint.contains("/login") || endpoint.contains("/auth")) {
            return 10;
        }
        // Static resources have higher limits
        if (endpoint.startsWith("/css/") || endpoint.startsWith("/js/") || endpoint.startsWith("/img/")) {
            return 200;
        }
        return DEFAULT_CAPACITY;
    }

    private int getRefillRateForEndpoint(String endpoint) {
        if (endpoint.startsWith("/api/")) {
            return 5;
        }
        if (endpoint.contains("/login") || endpoint.contains("/auth")) {
            return 1;
        }
        return DEFAULT_REFILL_RATE;
    }

    private boolean isSuspiciousUserAgent(String userAgent) {
        if (userAgent == null || userAgent.trim().isEmpty()) {
            return true;
        }

        String lowerUserAgent = userAgent.toLowerCase();
        String[] suspiciousPatterns = {
            "bot", "crawler", "spider", "scraper", "curl", "wget", "python", "java"
        };

        for (String pattern : suspiciousPatterns) {
            if (lowerUserAgent.contains(pattern)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    private void trackExcessiveAttempts(String clientIp) {
        AtomicInteger attempts = attemptCounts.computeIfAbsent(clientIp, k -> new AtomicInteger(0));
        int currentAttempts = attempts.incrementAndGet();

        if (currentAttempts > BLACKLIST_THRESHOLD) {
            blacklistedIPs.add(clientIp);
            logger.error("IP {} blacklisted due to excessive attempts: {}", clientIp, currentAttempts);

            // Send security alert
            sendSecurityAlert("IP Blacklisted",
                String.format("IP %s has been blacklisted due to %d excessive attempts", clientIp, currentAttempts));
        }
    }

    private String getClientIpAddress(HttpServletRequest request) {
        String[] headerNames = {
            "X-Forwarded-For", "X-Real-IP", "Proxy-Client-IP",
            "WL-Proxy-Client-IP", "HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR", "HTTP_X_FORWARDED",
            "HTTP_X_CLUSTER_CLIENT_IP", "HTTP_CLIENT_IP", "HTTP_FORWARDED_FOR",
            "HTTP_FORWARDED", "HTTP_VIA", "REMOTE_ADDR"
        };

        for (String headerName : headerNames) {
            String ip = request.getHeader(headerName);
            if (ip != null && !ip.isEmpty() && !"unknown".equalsIgnoreCase(ip)) {
                // Handle multiple IPs in X-Forwarded-For
                if (ip.contains(",")) {
                    ip = ip.split(",")[0].trim();
                }
                return ip;
            }
        }

        return request.getRemoteAddr();
    }

    private void sendSecurityAlert(String subject, String message) {
        logger.error("SECURITY ALERT: {} - {}", subject, message);
        // Implementation to send alert to security team
    }

    // Cleanup old entries periodically
    @Scheduled(fixedRate = 3600000) // Every hour
    public void cleanupOldEntries() {
        // Remove old bucket entries
        buckets.entrySet().removeIf(entry -> {
            TokenBucket bucket = entry.getValue();
            return bucket.getLastRefillTime() < System.currentTimeMillis() - 3600000; // 1 hour old
        });

        // Reset attempt counts
        attemptCounts.clear();

        logger.debug("Cleaned up old rate limit entries");
    }
}

// Advanced Input Validation Service
@Component
public class InputValidationService {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(InputValidationService.class);

    // XSS patterns
    private static final Pattern[] XSS_PATTERNS = {
        Pattern.compile("<script[^>]*>.*?</script>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("javascript:", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("vbscript:", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("onload", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("onerror", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("onclick", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("onmouseover", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("<iframe[^>]*>.*?</iframe>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("<object[^>]*>.*?</object>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("<embed[^>]*>.*?</embed>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE)
    };

    // SQL injection patterns
    private static final Pattern[] SQL_INJECTION_PATTERNS = {
        Pattern.compile("('|(\\-\\-)|(;)|(\\|)|(\\*)|(%27)|(%2D%2D)|(%7C)|(%2A))", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("(union|select|insert|delete|update|drop|create|alter|exec|execute)", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("(script|javascript|vbscript|onload|onerror|onclick)", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE)
    };

    // Path traversal patterns
    private static final Pattern[] PATH_TRAVERSAL_PATTERNS = {
        Pattern.compile("(\\.\\./|\\.\\.\\\\)", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("(%2e%2e%2f|%2e%2e%5c)", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE),
        Pattern.compile("(\\.\\.%2f|\\.\\.%5c)", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE)
    };

    public void validateUserInput(UserRequestDto request) {
        List<String> errors = new ArrayList<>();

        // Validate username
        if (request.getUsername() == null || request.getUsername().trim().isEmpty()) {
            errors.add("Username is required");
        } else {
            validateUsername(request.getUsername(), errors);
        }

        // Validate email
        if (request.getEmail() == null || !isValidEmail(request.getEmail())) {
            errors.add("Valid email is required");
        } else {
            validateEmailSecurity(request.getEmail(), errors);
        }

        // Validate password
        if (request.getPassword() == null || !isValidPassword(request.getPassword())) {
            errors.add("Password must be 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character");
        }

        // Validate optional fields
        if (request.getFirstName() != null) {
            validateTextInput(request.getFirstName(), "First name", errors);
        }

        if (request.getLastName() != null) {
            validateTextInput(request.getLastName(), "Last name", errors);
        }

        if (request.getBio() != null) {
            validateTextInput(request.getBio(), "Bio", errors);
        }

        if (!errors.isEmpty()) {
            throw new ValidationException("Validation failed", errors);
        }
    }

    private void validateUsername(String username, List<String> errors) {
        // Length check
        if (username.length() < 3 || username.length() > 20) {
            errors.add("Username must be between 3 and 20 characters");
        }

        // Character check
        if (!username.matches("^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$")) {
            errors.add("Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscore, dot, and hyphen");
        }

        // Security checks
        if (containsXSS(username)) {
            errors.add("Username contains invalid characters");
            logSecurityViolation("XSS attempt in username", username);
        }

        // Reserved usernames
        String[] reservedUsernames = {"admin", "root", "system", "api", "www", "mail", "ftp"};
        if (Arrays.asList(reservedUsernames).contains(username.toLowerCase())) {
            errors.add("Username is reserved");
        }
    }

    private void validateEmailSecurity(String email, List<String> errors) {
        // Check for suspicious patterns
        if (containsXSS(email) || containsSQLInjection(email)) {
            errors.add("Email contains invalid characters");
            logSecurityViolation("Security violation in email", email);
        }

        // Check domain
        String domain = email.substring(email.indexOf("@") + 1);
        if (isDisposableEmailDomain(domain)) {
            errors.add("Disposable email addresses are not allowed");
        }
    }

    private void validateTextInput(String input, String fieldName, List<String> errors) {
        if (input.length() > 1000) {
            errors.add(fieldName + " is too long (maximum 1000 characters)");
        }

        if (containsXSS(input)) {
            errors.add(fieldName + " contains invalid characters");
            logSecurityViolation("XSS attempt in " + fieldName, input);
        }

        if (containsSQLInjection(input)) {
            errors.add(fieldName + " contains invalid characters");
            logSecurityViolation("SQL injection attempt in " + fieldName, input);
        }

        if (containsPathTraversal(input)) {
            errors.add(fieldName + " contains invalid characters");
            logSecurityViolation("Path traversal attempt in " + fieldName, input);
        }
    }

    private boolean isValidEmail(String email) {
        return email.matches("^[A-Za-z0-9+_.-]+@([A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Za-z]{2,})$");
    }

    private boolean isValidPassword(String password) {
        // At least 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
        return password.matches("^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\\d)(?=.*[@$!%*?&])[A-Za-z\\d@$!%*?&]{8,}$");
    }

    private boolean containsXSS(String input) {
        for (Pattern pattern : XSS_PATTERNS) {
            if (pattern.matcher(input).find()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private boolean containsSQLInjection(String input) {
        for (Pattern pattern : SQL_INJECTION_PATTERNS) {
            if (pattern.matcher(input).find()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private boolean containsPathTraversal(String input) {
        for (Pattern pattern : PATH_TRAVERSAL_PATTERNS) {
            if (pattern.matcher(input).find()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private boolean isDisposableEmailDomain(String domain) {
        // List of known disposable email domains
        String[] disposableDomains = {
            "10minutemail.com", "guerrillamail.com", "mailinator.com",
            "tempmail.org", "throwaway.email", "temp-mail.org"
        };

        return Arrays.asList(disposableDomains).contains(domain.toLowerCase());
    }

    private void logSecurityViolation(String violationType, String input) {
        logger.warn("SECURITY VIOLATION: {} - Input: {}", violationType,
            input.length() > 100 ? input.substring(0, 100) + "..." : input);

        // Send security alert
        // Implementation to notify security team
    }

    public String sanitizeInput(String input) {
        if (input == null) {
            return null;
        }

        // Remove potential XSS
        String sanitized = input;
        for (Pattern pattern : XSS_PATTERNS) {
            sanitized = pattern.matcher(sanitized).replaceAll("");
        }

        // Encode HTML entities
        sanitized = sanitized.replace("<", "&lt;")
                            .replace(">", "&gt;")
                            .replace("\"", "&quot;")
                            .replace("'", "&#x27;")
                            .replace("/", "&#x2F;");

        return sanitized.trim();
    }
}

// Token Bucket Implementation for Rate Limiting
public class TokenBucket {
    private final long capacity;
    private final long refillRate;
    private long tokens;
    private long lastRefillTime;

    public TokenBucket(long capacity, long initialTokens, long refillRate) {
        this.capacity = capacity;
        this.tokens = initialTokens;
        this.refillRate = refillRate;
        this.lastRefillTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
    }

    public synchronized boolean tryConsume(long tokensRequested) {
        refill();

        if (tokens >= tokensRequested) {
            tokens -= tokensRequested;
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    private void refill() {
        long now = System.currentTimeMillis();
        long timePassed = now - lastRefillTime;
        long tokensToAdd = (timePassed / 1000) * refillRate;

        if (tokensToAdd > 0) {
            tokens = Math.min(capacity, tokens + tokensToAdd);
            lastRefillTime = now;
        }
    }

    public long getLastRefillTime() {
        return lastRefillTime;
    }
}
```

**Ngày 169-172: Performance Optimization & Advanced Caching**
```java
// Advanced Caching Strategy Configuration
@Configuration
@EnableCaching
public class AdvancedCacheConfig {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AdvancedCacheConfig.class);

    @Bean
    @Primary
    public CacheManager cacheManager(RedisConnectionFactory redisConnectionFactory) {
        RedisCacheConfiguration defaultConfig = RedisCacheConfiguration.defaultCacheConfig()
            .serializeKeysWith(RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair
                .fromSerializer(new StringRedisSerializer()))
            .serializeValuesWith(RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair
                .fromSerializer(new GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer()))
            .disableCachingNullValues()
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofHours(1));

        // Configure specific cache settings
        Map<String, RedisCacheConfiguration> cacheConfigurations = new HashMap<>();

        // User cache - 30 minutes TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("users", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofMinutes(30))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("user:"));

        // Blog cache - 1 hour TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("blogs", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofHours(1))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("blog:"));

        // Static content cache - 24 hours TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("static-content", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofHours(24))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("static:"));

        // Search results cache - 15 minutes TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("search-results", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofMinutes(15))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("search:"));

        // Session cache - 2 hours TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("sessions", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofHours(2))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("session:"));

        // API response cache - 5 minutes TTL
        cacheConfigurations.put("api-responses", defaultConfig
            .entryTtl(Duration.ofMinutes(5))
            .prefixCacheNameWith("api:"));

        return RedisCacheManager.builder(redisConnectionFactory)
            .cacheDefaults(defaultConfig)
            .withInitialCacheConfigurations(cacheConfigurations)
            .build();
    }

    @Bean
    public CacheManager localCacheManager() {
        // Local cache for frequently accessed data
        CaffeineCacheManager cacheManager = new CaffeineCacheManager();
        cacheManager.setCaffeine(Caffeine.newBuilder()
            .maximumSize(1000)
            .expireAfterWrite(Duration.ofMinutes(10))
            .recordStats());

        return cacheManager;
    }

    @Bean
    @Primary
    public CacheManager compositeCacheManager(
            @Qualifier("cacheManager") CacheManager redisCacheManager,
            @Qualifier("localCacheManager") CacheManager localCacheManager) {

        // Multi-level caching: Local cache first, then Redis
        CompositeCacheManager compositeCacheManager = new CompositeCacheManager();
        compositeCacheManager.setCacheManagers(Arrays.asList(localCacheManager, redisCacheManager));
        compositeCacheManager.setFallbackToNoOpCache(false);

        return compositeCacheManager;
    }
}

// Optimized Repository with Custom Queries
@Repository
public interface OptimizedBlogRepository extends JpaRepository<Blog, Long> {

    @QueryHints(value = {
        @QueryHint(name = HINT_FETCH_SIZE, value = "50"),
        @QueryHint(name = HINT_CACHEABLE, value = "true"),
        @QueryHint(name = HINT_CACHE_REGION, value = "blog-queries")
    })
    @Query("SELECT b FROM Blog b WHERE b.published = true ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC")
    List<Blog> findPublishedBlogsOptimized();

    @EntityGraph(attributePaths = {"author", "category", "tags"})
    @Query("SELECT b FROM Blog b WHERE b.id = :id")
    Optional<Blog> findByIdWithAssociations(@Param("id") Long id);

    @Query(value = """
        SELECT b.* FROM blogs b
        WHERE b.published = true
        AND MATCH(b.title, b.content) AGAINST (:searchTerm IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
        ORDER BY MATCH(b.title, b.content) AGAINST (:searchTerm IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) DESC
        LIMIT :limit
        """, nativeQuery = true)
    List<Blog> findByFullTextSearch(@Param("searchTerm") String searchTerm, @Param("limit") int limit);

    @Modifying
    @Query("UPDATE Blog b SET b.viewCount = b.viewCount + 1 WHERE b.id = :id")
    void incrementViewCount(@Param("id") Long id);

    @Query(value = """
        SELECT b.*, COUNT(c.id) as comment_count
        FROM blogs b
        LEFT JOIN comments c ON b.id = c.blog_id
        WHERE b.published = true
        GROUP BY b.id
        ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
        LIMIT :limit
        """, nativeQuery = true)
    List<Object[]> findPopularBlogsWithCommentCount(@Param("limit") int limit);
}

// Async Processing Service
@Service
public class AsyncProcessingService {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AsyncProcessingService.class);

    @Async("taskExecutor")
    public CompletableFuture<String> processLargeFile(String filePath) {
        logger.info("Starting async file processing for: {}", filePath);

        return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
            try {
                // Simulate file processing
                Thread.sleep(5000);

                // Actual file processing logic here
                String result = "Processed file: " + filePath;
                logger.info("Completed async file processing for: {}", filePath);

                return result;
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                throw new RuntimeException("File processing interrupted", e);
            }
        });
    }

    @Async("emailExecutor")
    public CompletableFuture<Void> sendEmailAsync(String to, String subject, String content) {
        logger.info("Sending async email to: {}", to);

        return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                // Email sending logic
                emailService.sendEmail(to, subject, content);
                logger.info("Email sent successfully to: {}", to);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logger.error("Failed to send email to: {}", to, e);
                throw new RuntimeException("Email sending failed", e);
            }
        });
    }

    @Async("indexExecutor")
    public CompletableFuture<Void> updateSearchIndexAsync(Long blogId) {
        logger.info("Updating search index for blog: {}", blogId);

        return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                searchService.indexBlog(blogId);
                logger.info("Search index updated for blog: {}", blogId);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logger.error("Failed to update search index for blog: {}", blogId, e);
                throw new RuntimeException("Search index update failed", e);
            }
        });
    }

    @Async("analyticsExecutor")
    public CompletableFuture<Void> trackEventAsync(String eventType, Map<String, Object> properties) {
        return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                analyticsService.trackEvent(eventType, properties);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logger.error("Failed to track analytics event: {}", eventType, e);
            }
        });
    }
}

// Database Optimization Service
@Service
public class DatabaseOptimizationService {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DatabaseOptimizationService.class);

    @Autowired
    private EntityManager entityManager;

    @Autowired
    private DataSource dataSource;

    @Scheduled(cron = "0 0 2 * * ?") // Run at 2 AM daily
    public void optimizeTables() {
        logger.info("Starting database optimization");

        try {
            // Analyze tables
            executeNativeQuery("ANALYZE TABLE blogs, users, projects, comments");

            // Optimize tables
            executeNativeQuery("OPTIMIZE TABLE blogs, users, projects, comments");

            // Update table statistics
            executeNativeQuery("FLUSH TABLES");

            logger.info("Database optimization completed successfully");
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Database optimization failed", e);
        }
    }

    @Scheduled(cron = "0 0 3 * * ?") // Run at 3 AM daily
    public void cleanupOldData() {
        logger.info("Starting database cleanup");

        try {
            // Clean up old sessions
            int deletedSessions = entityManager.createQuery(
                "DELETE FROM UserSession s WHERE s.lastAccessTime < :cutoff")
                .setParameter("cutoff", LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(30))
                .executeUpdate();

            // Clean up old logs
            int deletedLogs = entityManager.createQuery(
                "DELETE FROM AuditLog a WHERE a.createdAt < :cutoff")
                .setParameter("cutoff", LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(90))
                .executeUpdate();

            // Clean up old password reset tokens
            int deletedTokens = entityManager.createQuery(
                "DELETE FROM PasswordResetToken t WHERE t.expiryDate < :now")
                .setParameter("now", LocalDateTime.now())
                .executeUpdate();

            logger.info("Database cleanup completed - Sessions: {}, Logs: {}, Tokens: {}",
                deletedSessions, deletedLogs, deletedTokens);

        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Database cleanup failed", e);
        }
    }

    @EventListener
    @Async
    public void handleSlowQuery(SlowQueryEvent event) {
        if (event.getDuration() > 5000) { // More than 5 seconds
            logger.warn("Very slow query detected: {} took {}ms",
                event.getQuery(), event.getDuration());

            // Analyze query performance
            analyzeQueryPerformance(event.getQuery());

            // Send alert to administrators
            alertService.sendSlowQueryAlert(event);
        }
    }

    private void analyzeQueryPerformance(String query) {
        try {
            // Use EXPLAIN to analyze query
            String explainQuery = "EXPLAIN " + query;
            List<Object[]> results = entityManager.createNativeQuery(explainQuery).getResultList();

            logger.info("Query analysis for slow query:");
            for (Object[] row : results) {
                logger.info("  {}", Arrays.toString(row));
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("Failed to analyze query performance", e);
        }
    }

    private void executeNativeQuery(String sql) {
        entityManager.createNativeQuery(sql).executeUpdate();
    }

    public DatabaseStats getDatabaseStats() {
        try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
            DatabaseMetaData metaData = connection.getMetaData();

            // Get table sizes
            Map<String, Long> tableSizes = getTableSizes();

            // Get index usage
            Map<String, Object> indexStats = getIndexStats();

            return DatabaseStats.builder()
                .tableSizes(tableSizes)
                .indexStats(indexStats)
                .connectionPoolStats(getConnectionPoolStats())
                .build();

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            logger.error("Failed to get database stats", e);
            return DatabaseStats.empty();
        }
    }

    private Map<String, Long> getTableSizes() {
        String query = """
            SELECT table_name,
                   ROUND(((data_length + index_length) / 1024 / 1024), 2) AS size_mb
            FROM information_schema.tables
            WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()
            ORDER BY size_mb DESC
            """;

        List<Object[]> results = entityManager.createNativeQuery(query).getResultList();

        return results.stream()
            .collect(Collectors.toMap(
                row -> (String) row[0],
                row -> ((Number) row[1]).longValue()
            ));
    }

    private Map<String, Object> getIndexStats() {
        // Implementation to get index usage statistics
        return new HashMap<>();
    }

    private Map<String, Object> getConnectionPoolStats() {
        if (dataSource instanceof HikariDataSource) {
            HikariDataSource hikariDS = (HikariDataSource) dataSource;
            HikariPoolMXBean poolBean = hikariDS.getHikariPoolMXBean();

            Map<String, Object> stats = new HashMap<>();
            stats.put("activeConnections", poolBean.getActiveConnections());
            stats.put("idleConnections", poolBean.getIdleConnections());
            stats.put("totalConnections", poolBean.getTotalConnections());
            stats.put("threadsAwaitingConnection", poolBean.getThreadsAwaitingConnection());

            return stats;
        }

        return new HashMap<>();
    }
}

// CDN Integration Service
@Service
public class CDNService {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CDNService.class);

    @Value("${cdn.base-url:}")
    private String cdnBaseUrl;

    @Value("${cdn.enabled:false}")
    private boolean cdnEnabled;

    @Value("${cdn.api-key:}")
    private String cdnApiKey;

    public String getCDNUrl(String path) {
        if (!cdnEnabled || cdnBaseUrl.isEmpty()) {
            return path;
        }

        // Remove leading slash if present
        if (path.startsWith("/")) {
            path = path.substring(1);
        }

        return cdnBaseUrl + "/" + path;
    }

    public String getOptimizedImageUrl(String imagePath, int width, int height, String format) {
        if (!cdnEnabled) {
            return imagePath;
        }

        // Use CDN image optimization parameters
        return String.format("%s/%s?w=%d&h=%d&f=%s&q=80",
            cdnBaseUrl, imagePath, width, height, format);
    }

    public String getOptimizedImageUrl(String imagePath, ImageOptimizationOptions options) {
        if (!cdnEnabled) {
            return imagePath;
        }

        StringBuilder url = new StringBuilder(cdnBaseUrl + "/" + imagePath + "?");

        if (options.getWidth() > 0) {
            url.append("w=").append(options.getWidth()).append("&");
        }

        if (options.getHeight() > 0) {
            url.append("h=").append(options.getHeight()).append("&");
        }

        if (options.getFormat() != null) {
            url.append("f=").append(options.getFormat()).append("&");
        }

        if (options.getQuality() > 0) {
            url.append("q=").append(options.getQuality()).append("&");
        }

        if (options.isWebpEnabled()) {
            url.append("auto=webp&");
        }

        // Remove trailing &
        String result = url.toString();
        if (result.endsWith("&")) {
            result = result.substring(0, result.length() - 1);
        }

        return result;
    }

    @Async
    public CompletableFuture<Void> purgeCache(String path) {
        if (!cdnEnabled) {
            return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(null);
        }

        return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                // Implementation to purge CDN cache
                RestTemplate restTemplate = new RestTemplate();
                HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();
                headers.set("Authorization", "Bearer " + cdnApiKey);
                headers.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON);

                Map<String, Object> purgeRequest = Map.of(
                    "files", List.of(path)
                );

                HttpEntity<Map<String, Object>> request = new HttpEntity<>(purgeRequest, headers);

                ResponseEntity<String> response = restTemplate.postForEntity(
                    cdnBaseUrl + "/purge", request, String.class);

                if (response.getStatusCode().is2xxSuccessful()) {
                    logger.info("Successfully purged CDN cache for: {}", path);
                } else {
                    logger.warn("Failed to purge CDN cache for: {} - Status: {}",
                        path, response.getStatusCode());
                }

            } catch (Exception e) {
                logger.error("Error purging CDN cache for: {}", path, e);
            }
        });
    }

    @Async
    public CompletableFuture<Void> preloadContent(List<String> paths) {
        if (!cdnEnabled) {
            return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(null);
        }

        return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            for (String path : paths) {
                try {
                    // Preload content to CDN
                    RestTemplate restTemplate = new RestTemplate();
                    restTemplate.getForEntity(getCDNUrl(path), String.class);

                    logger.debug("Preloaded content to CDN: {}", path);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    logger.warn("Failed to preload content to CDN: {}", path, e);
                }
            }
        });
    }
}
```

```yaml
# application-prod.yml
spring:
  datasource:
    url: ${DATABASE_URL}
    username: ${DATABASE_USERNAME}
    password: ${DATABASE_PASSWORD}
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      connection-timeout: 30000
      idle-timeout: 600000
      max-lifetime: 1800000

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: validate
    show-sql: false
    properties:
      hibernate:
        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect
        format_sql: false

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          google:
            client-id: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}
            client-secret: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET}
          facebook:
            client-id: ${FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID}
            client-secret: ${FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET}

  mail:
    host: ${MAIL_HOST}
    port: ${MAIL_PORT}
    username: ${MAIL_USERNAME}
    password: ${MAIL_PASSWORD}
    properties:
      mail:
        smtp:
          auth: true
          starttls:
            enable: true

app:
  jwt:
    secret: ${JWT_SECRET}
    expiration: 86400000
  upload:
    dir: ${UPLOAD_DIR:/app/uploads}
    max-size: 10485760
  mail:
    from: ${MAIL_FROM}

logging:
  level:
    dev.cuonghoang: INFO
    org.springframework.security: WARN
  file:
    name: /app/logs/cuonghoang-dev.log
  pattern:
    file: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n"

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized
```

```dockerfile
# Dockerfile
FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy Maven wrapper and pom.xml
COPY .mvn/ .mvn
COPY mvnw pom.xml ./

# Download dependencies
RUN ./mvnw dependency:go-offline

# Copy source code
COPY src ./src

# Build application
RUN ./mvnw clean package -DskipTests

# Create uploads directory
RUN mkdir -p /app/uploads

# Expose port
EXPOSE 8080

# Set environment variables
ENV SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod

# Run application
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "target/cuonghoang-dev-1.0.0.jar"]
```

```yaml
      - MAIL_HOST=smtp.gmail.com

      - MAIL_PASSWORD=${MAIL_PASSWORD}
    depends_on:
      - db

      - uploads:/app/uploads

      - "3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql

volumes:
  mysql_data:
  uploads:
  logs:
```
