### **Tuần 24: CI/CD Pipeline**
**Ngày 162-165: GitHub Actions Setup**
```yaml
# .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8.0
        env:
          MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
          MYSQL_DATABASE: cuonghoang_dev_test
        ports:
          - 3306:3306
        options: --health-cmd="mysqladmin ping" --health-interval=10s --health-timeout=5s --health-retries=3

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '17'
        distribution: 'temurin'

    - name: Cache Maven packages
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-m2

    - name: Run tests
      run: ./mvnw clean test
      env:
        SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: test
        DATABASE_URL: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/cuonghoang_dev_test
        DATABASE_USERNAME: root
        DATABASE_PASSWORD: rootpassword

    - name: Generate test report
      uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
      if: success() || failure()
      with:
        name: Maven Tests
        path: target/surefire-reports/*.xml
        reporter: java-junit

  build-and-deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '17'
        distribution: 'temurin'

    - name: Build with Maven
      run: ./mvnw clean package -DskipTests

    - name: Build Docker image
      run: docker build -t cuonghoang-dev:latest .

    - name: Deploy to Heroku
      uses: akhileshns/heroku-deploy@v3.12.12
      with:
        heroku_api_key: ${{secrets.HEROKU_API_KEY}}
        heroku_app_name: "cuonghoang-dev"
        heroku_email: "your-email@example.com"
        usedocker: true
```

**Ngày 166-168: Deployment Scripts & Database Migration**
```bash
#!/bin/bash
# deploy.sh - Deployment script

set -e

echo "🚀 Starting deployment process..."

# Build application
echo "📦 Building application..."
./mvnw clean package -DskipTests

# Build Docker image
echo "🐳 Building Docker image..."
docker build -t cuonghoang-dev:latest .

# Tag for registry
docker tag cuonghoang-dev:latest registry.heroku.com/cuonghoang-dev/web

# Push to Heroku registry
echo "📤 Pushing to Heroku registry..."
docker push registry.heroku.com/cuonghoang-dev/web

# Release the image
echo "🎯 Releasing to Heroku..."
heroku container:release web -a cuonghoang-dev

# Run database migrations
echo "🗄️ Running database migrations..."
heroku run java -cp target/classes:target/dependency/* org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher --spring.profiles.active=prod --spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate -a cuonghoang-dev

echo "✅ Deployment completed successfully!"
```

```sql
-- V1__Initial_Schema.sql (Flyway migration)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS roles (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(255),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    provider VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'LOCAL',
    provider_id VARCHAR(100),
    avatar_url VARCHAR(500),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_roles (
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    role_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blogs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    excerpt TEXT,
    content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    image_url VARCHAR(500),
    published BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    author_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50),
    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_blog_slug (slug),
    INDEX idx_blog_category (category),
    INDEX idx_blog_published (published),
    INDEX idx_blog_created_at (created_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blog_tags (
    blog_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (blog_id, tag),
    FOREIGN KEY (blog_id) REFERENCES blogs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Insert default data
INSERT INTO roles (name, description) VALUES
('ROLE_USER', 'Standard user role'),
('ROLE_ADMIN', 'Administrator role'),
('ROLE_MODERATOR', 'Moderator role');

-- V2__Add_Projects_Table.sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description TEXT,
    content LONGTEXT,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    github_url VARCHAR(500),
    live_url VARCHAR(500),
    image_url VARCHAR(500),
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'COMPLETED',
    featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    start_date DATE,
    end_date DATE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50),
    INDEX idx_project_slug (slug),
    INDEX idx_project_category (category),
    INDEX idx_project_featured (featured)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_technologies (
    project_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    technology VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (project_id, technology),
    FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_images (
    project_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    image_url VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (project_id, image_url),
    FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
```

```yaml
# docker-compose.prod.yml
version: '3.8'

services:
  app:
    image: cuonghoang-dev:latest
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod
      - DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL}
      - DATABASE_USERNAME=${DATABASE_USERNAME}
      - DATABASE_PASSWORD=${DATABASE_PASSWORD}
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}
      - GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}
      - GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET}
      - MAIL_HOST=${MAIL_HOST}
      - MAIL_USERNAME=${MAIL_USERNAME}
      - MAIL_PASSWORD=${MAIL_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - uploads:/app/uploads
      - logs:/app/logs
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
      - uploads:/var/www/uploads
    depends_on:
      - app
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  uploads:
  logs:
```

**Ngày 176-178: Complete SEO Implementation**
```html
<!-- templates/layout/seo-head.html -->
<head th:fragment="seo-head(pageTitle, pageDescription, pageKeywords, pageImage, pageUrl, structuredData)">
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <!-- Primary Meta Tags -->
    <title th:text="${pageTitle} + ' - CuongHoang Dev'">CuongHoang Dev</title>
    <meta name="title" th:content="${pageTitle} + ' - CuongHoang Dev'">
    <meta name="description" th:content="${pageDescription}">
    <meta name="keywords" th:content="${pageKeywords}">
    <meta name="author" content="CuongHoang Dev">
    <meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
    <meta name="language" content="English">
    <meta name="revisit-after" content="7 days">

    <!-- Canonical URL -->
    <link rel="canonical" th:href="${pageUrl}">

    <!-- Open Graph / Facebook -->
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:url" th:content="${pageUrl}">
    <meta property="og:title" th:content="${pageTitle}">
    <meta property="og:description" th:content="${pageDescription}">
    <meta property="og:image" th:content="${pageImage}">
    <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
    <meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
    <meta property="og:image:alt" th:content="${pageTitle}">
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="CuongHoang Dev">
    <meta property="og:locale" content="en_US">

    <!-- Twitter -->
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:url" th:content="${pageUrl}">
    <meta name="twitter:title" th:content="${pageTitle}">
    <meta name="twitter:description" th:content="${pageDescription}">
    <meta name="twitter:image" th:content="${pageImage}">
    <meta name="twitter:image:alt" th:content="${pageTitle}">
    <meta name="twitter:creator" content="@cuonghoangdev">
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@cuonghoangdev">

    <!-- Structured Data -->
    <script type="application/ld+json" th:utext="${structuredData}"></script>

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/favicon.ico">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="/img/favicon-16x16.png">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="/img/favicon-32x32.png">
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/img/apple-touch-icon.png">
    <link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">

    <!-- Preconnect to external domains -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>

    <!-- Hreflang for internationalization -->
    <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" th:href="${pageUrl}">
    <link rel="alternate" hreflang="vi" th:href="${pageUrl} + '?lang=vi'">
    <link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" th:href="${pageUrl}">
</head>
```

```java
// Enhanced SEOService.java
@Service
public class SEOService {

    private final SitemapGenerator sitemapGenerator;
    private final StructuredDataService structuredDataService;

    @Value("${app.base-url}")
    private String baseUrl;

    public SEOData generateSEOData(String pageType, Object entity, HttpServletRequest request) {
        String currentUrl = getCurrentUrl(request);

        return switch (pageType) {
            case "home" -> generateHomeSEO(currentUrl);
            case "blog" -> generateBlogSEO((Blog) entity, currentUrl);
            case "project" -> generateProjectSEO((Project) entity, currentUrl);
            case "about" -> generateAboutSEO(currentUrl);
            case "contact" -> generateContactSEO(currentUrl);
            default -> generateDefaultSEO(currentUrl);
        };
    }

    private SEOData generateHomeSEO(String currentUrl) {
        String structuredData = structuredDataService.generateWebsiteSchema();

        return SEOData.builder()
            .pageTitle("Full-Stack Developer & Software Engineer")
            .pageDescription("Professional portfolio of CuongHoang - Full-Stack Developer specializing in Java, Spring Boot, React, and modern web technologies.")
            .pageKeywords("Full-Stack Developer, Java Developer, Spring Boot, React, Web Development, Software Engineer, Portfolio")
            .pageImage(baseUrl + "/img/og-home.jpg")
            .pageUrl(currentUrl)
            .structuredData(structuredData)
            .build();
    }

    private SEOData generateBlogSEO(Blog blog, String currentUrl) {
        String structuredData = structuredDataService.generateBlogPostSchema(blog);

        return SEOData.builder()
            .pageTitle(blog.getTitle())
            .pageDescription(blog.getExcerpt())
            .pageKeywords(String.join(", ", blog.getTags()))
            .pageImage(blog.getFeaturedImage() != null ? blog.getFeaturedImage() : baseUrl + "/img/og-blog.jpg")
            .pageUrl(currentUrl)
            .structuredData(structuredData)
            .build();
    }

    public void generateSitemap() {
        List<SitemapEntry> entries = new ArrayList<>();

        // Add static pages
        entries.add(new SitemapEntry("/", LocalDateTime.now(), "daily", 1.0));
        entries.add(new SitemapEntry("/about", LocalDateTime.now(), "monthly", 0.8));
        entries.add(new SitemapEntry("/contact", LocalDateTime.now(), "monthly", 0.7));
        entries.add(new SitemapEntry("/portfolio", LocalDateTime.now(), "weekly", 0.9));
        entries.add(new SitemapEntry("/blog", LocalDateTime.now(), "daily", 0.9));

        // Add blog posts
        List<Blog> publishedBlogs = blogRepository.findByPublishedTrueOrderByCreatedAtDesc();
        for (Blog blog : publishedBlogs) {
            entries.add(new SitemapEntry(
                "/blog/" + blog.getSlug(),
                blog.getUpdatedAt(),
                "weekly",
                0.8
            ));
        }

        // Add portfolio projects
        List<Project> projects = projectRepository.findByFeaturedTrueOrderByCreatedAtDesc();
        for (Project project : projects) {
            entries.add(new SitemapEntry(
                "/portfolio/" + project.getSlug(),
                project.getUpdatedAt(),
                "monthly",
                0.7
            ));
        }

        sitemapGenerator.generateSitemap(entries);
    }
}

// StructuredDataService.java
@Service
public class StructuredDataService {

    @Value("${app.base-url}")
    private String baseUrl;

    public String generateWebsiteSchema() {
        Map<String, Object> schema = new HashMap<>();
        schema.put("@context", "https://schema.org");
        schema.put("@type", "WebSite");
        schema.put("name", "CuongHoang Dev");
        schema.put("description", "Professional portfolio of CuongHoang - Full-Stack Developer");
        schema.put("url", baseUrl);
        schema.put("author", Map.of(
            "@type", "Person",
            "name", "CuongHoang",
            "jobTitle", "Full-Stack Developer",
            "url", baseUrl + "/about"
        ));
        schema.put("potentialAction", Map.of(
            "@type", "SearchAction",
            "target", Map.of(
                "@type", "EntryPoint",
                "urlTemplate", baseUrl + "/search?q={search_term_string}"
            ),
            "query-input", "required name=search_term_string"
        ));

        return convertToJson(schema);
    }

    public String generateBlogPostSchema(Blog blog) {
        Map<String, Object> schema = new HashMap<>();
        schema.put("@context", "https://schema.org");
        schema.put("@type", "BlogPosting");
        schema.put("headline", blog.getTitle());
        schema.put("description", blog.getExcerpt());
        schema.put("image", blog.getFeaturedImage());
        schema.put("author", Map.of(
            "@type", "Person",
            "name", blog.getAuthor().getFullName(),
            "url", baseUrl + "/about"
        ));
        schema.put("publisher", Map.of(
            "@type", "Organization",
            "name", "CuongHoang Dev",
            "logo", Map.of(
                "@type", "ImageObject",
                "url", baseUrl + "/img/logo.png"
            )
        ));
        schema.put("datePublished", blog.getCreatedAt().toString());
        schema.put("dateModified", blog.getUpdatedAt().toString());
        schema.put("mainEntityOfPage", Map.of(
            "@type", "WebPage",
            "@id", baseUrl + "/blog/" + blog.getSlug()
        ));

        return convertToJson(schema);
    }

    private String convertToJson(Map<String, Object> schema) {
        try {
            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
            return mapper.writeValueAsString(schema);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to convert schema to JSON", e);
            return "{}";
        }
    }
}
```

**Ngày 180-182: Production Best Practices**

**📊 Advanced Logging & Monitoring:**
```java
// LoggingConfig.java
@Configuration
public class LoggingConfig {

    @Bean
    public Logger structuredLogger() {
        LoggerContext context = (LoggerContext) LoggerFactory.getILoggerFactory();

        // JSON Encoder for structured logging
        JsonEncoder jsonEncoder = new JsonEncoder();
        jsonEncoder.setContext(context);
        jsonEncoder.start();

        // Console Appender with JSON format
        ConsoleAppender<ILoggingEvent> consoleAppender = new ConsoleAppender<>();
        consoleAppender.setContext(context);
        consoleAppender.setEncoder(jsonEncoder);
        consoleAppender.start();

        // File Appender with rotation
        RollingFileAppender<ILoggingEvent> fileAppender = new RollingFileAppender<>();
        fileAppender.setContext(context);
        fileAppender.setFile("logs/application.log");

        TimeBasedRollingPolicy<ILoggingEvent> rollingPolicy = new TimeBasedRollingPolicy<>();
        rollingPolicy.setContext(context);
        rollingPolicy.setParent(fileAppender);
        rollingPolicy.setFileNamePattern("logs/application.%d{yyyy-MM-dd}.%i.log.gz");
        rollingPolicy.setMaxHistory(30);

        SizeBasedTriggeringPolicy<ILoggingEvent> triggeringPolicy = new SizeBasedTriggeringPolicy<>();
        triggeringPolicy.setMaxFileSize(FileSize.valueOf("100MB"));

        rollingPolicy.setTimeBasedFileNamingAndTriggeringPolicy(triggeringPolicy);
        rollingPolicy.start();

        fileAppender.setRollingPolicy(rollingPolicy);
        fileAppender.setEncoder(jsonEncoder);
        fileAppender.start();

        ch.qos.logback.classic.Logger rootLogger = context.getLogger(Logger.ROOT_LOGGER_NAME);
        rootLogger.addAppender(consoleAppender);
        rootLogger.addAppender(fileAppender);
        rootLogger.setLevel(Level.INFO);

        return rootLogger;
    }
}

// Custom Logging Aspects
@Aspect
@Component
@Slf4j
public class LoggingAspect {

    @Around("@annotation(Loggable)")
    public Object logExecutionTime(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {
        String methodName = joinPoint.getSignature().getName();
        String className = joinPoint.getTarget().getClass().getSimpleName();

        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();

        try {
            Object result = joinPoint.proceed();
            long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();

            log.info("Method executed successfully: {}.{} in {}ms",
                className, methodName, (endTime - startTime));

            return result;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();

            log.error("Method execution failed: {}.{} in {}ms - Error: {}",
                className, methodName, (endTime - startTime), e.getMessage(), e);

            throw e;
        }
    }

    @AfterThrowing(pointcut = "@annotation(Loggable)", throwing = "exception")
    public void logException(JoinPoint joinPoint, Exception exception) {
        String methodName = joinPoint.getSignature().getName();
        String className = joinPoint.getTarget().getClass().getSimpleName();

        log.error("Exception in {}.{}: {}", className, methodName, exception.getMessage(), exception);
    }
}

// Health Check Implementation
@Component
public class CustomHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

    private final DataSource dataSource;
    private final RedisTemplate<String, String> redisTemplate;
    private final RestTemplate restTemplate;

    @Override
    public Health health() {
        Health.Builder builder = new Health.Builder();

        try {
            // Check database
            checkDatabase(builder);

            // Check Redis
            checkRedis(builder);

            // Check external services
            checkExternalServices(builder);

            // Check disk space
            checkDiskSpace(builder);

            // Check memory usage
            checkMemoryUsage(builder);

            return builder.up().build();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return builder.down(e).build();
        }
    }

    private void checkDatabase(Health.Builder builder) {
        try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
            if (connection.isValid(1)) {
                builder.withDetail("database", Map.of(
                    "status", "UP",
                    "database", connection.getMetaData().getDatabaseProductName(),
                    "version", connection.getMetaData().getDatabaseProductVersion()
                ));
            } else {
                builder.withDetail("database", Map.of("status", "DOWN"));
            }
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            builder.withDetail("database", Map.of(
                "status", "DOWN",
                "error", e.getMessage()
            ));
        }
    }

    private void checkRedis(Health.Builder builder) {
        try {
            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set("health-check", "OK", Duration.ofSeconds(10));
            String result = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get("health-check");

            if ("OK".equals(result)) {
                builder.withDetail("redis", Map.of("status", "UP"));
            } else {
                builder.withDetail("redis", Map.of("status", "DOWN"));
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            builder.withDetail("redis", Map.of(
                "status", "DOWN",
                "error", e.getMessage()
            ));
        }
    }

    private void checkExternalServices(Health.Builder builder) {
        Map<String, Object> externalServices = new HashMap<>();

        // Check email service
        try {
            ResponseEntity<String> response = restTemplate.getForEntity(
                "https://api.mailgun.net/v3/domains", String.class);
            externalServices.put("email", Map.of(
                "status", response.getStatusCode().is2xxSuccessful() ? "UP" : "DOWN"
            ));
        } catch (Exception e) {
            externalServices.put("email", Map.of("status", "DOWN", "error", e.getMessage()));
        }

        builder.withDetail("externalServices", externalServices);
    }

    private void checkDiskSpace(Health.Builder builder) {
        File uploadDir = new File("uploads");
        long freeSpace = uploadDir.getFreeSpace();
        long totalSpace = uploadDir.getTotalSpace();
        double freePercentage = (double) freeSpace / totalSpace * 100;

        builder.withDetail("diskSpace", Map.of(
            "free", freeSpace,
            "total", totalSpace,
            "freePercentage", String.format("%.2f%%", freePercentage),
            "status", freePercentage > 10 ? "UP" : "LOW"
        ));
    }

    private void checkMemoryUsage(Health.Builder builder) {
        Runtime runtime = Runtime.getRuntime();
        long maxMemory = runtime.maxMemory();
        long totalMemory = runtime.totalMemory();
        long freeMemory = runtime.freeMemory();
        long usedMemory = totalMemory - freeMemory;
        double usedPercentage = (double) usedMemory / maxMemory * 100;

        builder.withDetail("memory", Map.of(
            "max", maxMemory,
            "total", totalMemory,
            "used", usedMemory,
            "free", freeMemory,
            "usedPercentage", String.format("%.2f%%", usedPercentage),
            "status", usedPercentage < 80 ? "UP" : "HIGH"
        ));
    }
}
```

**🔍 Error Tracking & Performance Analytics:**
```java
// ErrorTrackingConfig.java
@Configuration
public class ErrorTrackingConfig {

    @Bean
    @ConditionalOnProperty(name = "app.error-tracking.enabled", havingValue = "true")
    public SentryClientFactory sentryClientFactory() {
        return new SentryClientFactory();
    }
}

// CustomErrorController.java
@RestController
public class CustomErrorController implements ErrorController {

    private final ErrorAttributes errorAttributes;
    private final SentryClient sentryClient;

    @RequestMapping("/error")
    public ResponseEntity<ApiResponse<Void>> handleError(HttpServletRequest request) {
        WebRequest webRequest = new ServletWebRequest(request);
        Map<String, Object> errorDetails = errorAttributes.getErrorAttributes(webRequest, ErrorAttributeOptions.defaults());

        int status = (Integer) errorDetails.get("status");
        String message = (String) errorDetails.get("message");
        String path = (String) errorDetails.get("path");

        // Log error to Sentry
        if (sentryClient != null && status >= 500) {
            sentryClient.sendException(new RuntimeException(message));
        }

        // Log error details
        log.error("Error occurred - Status: {}, Message: {}, Path: {}", status, message, path);

        return ResponseEntity.status(status)
            .body(ApiResponse.error("An error occurred: " + message));
    }
}

// PerformanceMetrics.java
@Component
public class PerformanceMetrics {

    private final MeterRegistry meterRegistry;
    private final Timer requestTimer;
    private final Counter errorCounter;
    private final Gauge activeUsers;

    public PerformanceMetrics(MeterRegistry meterRegistry) {
        this.meterRegistry = meterRegistry;
        this.requestTimer = Timer.builder("http.requests")
            .description("HTTP request duration")
            .register(meterRegistry);
        this.errorCounter = Counter.builder("http.errors")
            .description("HTTP error count")
            .register(meterRegistry);
        this.activeUsers = Gauge.builder("users.active")
            .description("Number of active users")
            .register(meterRegistry, this, PerformanceMetrics::getActiveUserCount);
    }

    public Timer.Sample startTimer() {
        return Timer.start(meterRegistry);
    }

    public void recordError(String errorType) {
        errorCounter.increment(Tags.of("type", errorType));
    }

    private double getActiveUserCount() {
        // Implementation to get active user count
        return 0.0; // Placeholder
    }
}

// ApplicationHealthIndicator.java
@Component
public class ApplicationHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator {

    private final DataSource dataSource;
    private final RedisTemplate<String, String> redisTemplate;

    @Override
    public Health health() {
        Health.Builder builder = new Health.Builder();

        try {
            // Check database connectivity
            checkDatabase(builder);

            // Check Redis connectivity
            checkRedis(builder);

            // Check disk space
            checkDiskSpace(builder);

            return builder.up().build();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return builder.down(e).build();
        }
    }

    private void checkDatabase(Health.Builder builder) {
        try (Connection connection = dataSource.getConnection()) {
            if (connection.isValid(1)) {
                builder.withDetail("database", "UP");
            } else {
                builder.withDetail("database", "DOWN");
            }
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            builder.withDetail("database", "DOWN - " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    private void checkRedis(Health.Builder builder) {
        try {
            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set("health-check", "OK");
            String result = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get("health-check");
            if ("OK".equals(result)) {
                builder.withDetail("redis", "UP");
            } else {
                builder.withDetail("redis", "DOWN");
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            builder.withDetail("redis", "DOWN - " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    private void checkDiskSpace(Health.Builder builder) {
        File uploadDir = new File("/app/uploads");
        long freeSpace = uploadDir.getFreeSpace();
        long totalSpace = uploadDir.getTotalSpace();
        double freePercentage = (double) freeSpace / totalSpace * 100;

        if (freePercentage > 10) {
            builder.withDetail("diskSpace", "UP - " + String.format("%.2f%% free", freePercentage));
        } else {
            builder.withDetail("diskSpace", "LOW - " + String.format("%.2f%% free", freePercentage));
        }
    }
}
```

```yaml
# application-prod.yml - Monitoring additions
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus,loggers
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized
      show-components: always
    metrics:
      enabled: true
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 1m
      simple:
        enabled: false
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        http.server.requests: true
      percentiles:
        http.server.requests: 0.5, 0.95, 0.99
      sla:
        http.server.requests: 100ms, 500ms, 1s

logging:
  level:
    dev.cuonghoang: INFO
    org.springframework.web: DEBUG
    org.springframework.security: WARN
    org.hibernate.SQL: WARN
  pattern:
    console: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level [%X{traceId},%X{spanId}] %logger{36} - %msg%n"
    file: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level [%X{traceId},%X{spanId}] %logger{36} - %msg%n"
  file:
    name: /app/logs/cuonghoang-dev.log
    max-size: 100MB
    max-history: 30

app:
  error-tracking:
    enabled: true
    sentry-dsn: ${SENTRY_DSN:}
  monitoring:
    enabled: true
    metrics-interval: 60s
```

```javascript
// public/js/analytics.js - Client-side analytics
const Analytics = {
    init() {
        this.initGoogleAnalytics();
        this.trackPageViews();
        this.trackUserInteractions();
        this.trackPerformance();
        this.trackErrors();
    },

    initGoogleAnalytics() {
        if (window.gtag) {
            gtag('config', 'GA_MEASUREMENT_ID', {
                page_title: document.title,
                page_location: window.location.href
            });
        }
    },

    trackPageViews() {
        // Track page views
        if (window.gtag) {
            gtag('event', 'page_view', {
                page_title: document.title,
                page_location: window.location.href,
                page_path: window.location.pathname
            });
        }
    },

    trackUserInteractions() {
        // Track button clicks
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.matches('button, .btn, a[href]')) {
                this.trackEvent('click', {
                    element_type: e.target.tagName.toLowerCase(),
                    element_text: e.target.textContent.trim(),
                    element_class: e.target.className
                });
            }
        });

        // Track form submissions
        document.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
            this.trackEvent('form_submit', {
                form_id: e.target.id,
                form_action: e.target.action
            });
        });
    },

    trackPerformance() {
        // Track Core Web Vitals
        if ('PerformanceObserver' in window) {
            // Largest Contentful Paint
            const lcpObserver = new PerformanceObserver((entryList) => {
                const entries = entryList.getEntries();
                const lastEntry = entries[entries.length - 1];
                this.trackEvent('performance', {
                    metric: 'LCP',
                    value: Math.round(lastEntry.startTime)
                });
            });
            lcpObserver.observe({ entryTypes: ['largest-contentful-paint'] });

            // First Input Delay
            const fidObserver = new PerformanceObserver((entryList) => {
                const entries = entryList.getEntries();
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    const fid = entry.processingStart - entry.startTime;
                    this.trackEvent('performance', {
                        metric: 'FID',
                        value: Math.round(fid)
                    });
                });
            });
            fidObserver.observe({ entryTypes: ['first-input'] });
        }
    },

    trackErrors() {
        window.addEventListener('error', (e) => {
            this.trackEvent('javascript_error', {
                error_message: e.message,
                error_filename: e.filename,
                error_lineno: e.lineno,
                error_colno: e.colno
            });
        });

        window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e) => {
            this.trackEvent('promise_rejection', {
                error_message: e.reason.toString()
            });
        });
    },

    trackEvent(eventName, parameters) {
        if (window.gtag) {
            gtag('event', eventName, parameters);
        }

        // Also send to custom analytics endpoint
        fetch('/api/analytics/events', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                event: eventName,
                parameters: parameters,
                timestamp: Date.now(),
                url: window.location.href,
                userAgent: navigator.userAgent
            })
        }).catch(error => {
            console.warn('Failed to send analytics event:', error);
        });
    }
};

// Initialize analytics when DOM is loaded
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    Analytics.init();
});
```

---

# 🏗️ **4. KIẾN TRÚC HỆ THỐNG & LUỒNG XỬ LÝ** {#architecture-flow}

## **🎯 TỔNG QUAN KIẾN TRÚC 3-TIER**

```
┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐
│   FRONTEND      │    │    BACKEND      │    │    DATABASE     │
│   (Client)      │◄──►│   (Server)      │◄──►│   (Storage)     │
│                 │    │                 │    │                 │
│ • Thymeleaf     │    │ • Spring Boot   │    │ • MySQL         │
│ • HTML5         │    │ • Spring MVC    │    │ • JPA/Hibernate │
│ • CSS3          │    │ • Spring Sec    │    │ • Redis Cache   │
│ • JavaScript    │    │ • Spring Data   │    │ • File Storage  │
│ • Bootstrap     │    │ • REST API      │    │ • Backup        │
└─────────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └─────────────────┘
```

## **🎨 FRONTEND (Presentation Layer)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **Thymeleaf** - Template engine (thay thế HTML tĩnh)
- **HTML5** - Cấu trúc trang web semantic
- **CSS3** - Trang trí và layout responsive
- **JavaScript** - Tương tác động và AJAX
- **Bootstrap** - Framework CSS (responsive grid)
- **PWA** - Progressive Web App features

### **📱 Frontend Components:**
```
├── 🏠 Home Page (Trang chủ)
│   ├── Hero Section với animations
│   ├── Featured Projects showcase
│   ├── Latest Blog posts preview
│   └── Contact CTA section
├── 👤 About Page (Giới thiệu)
│   ├── Personal story & background
│   ├── Skills & technologies
│   ├── Experience timeline
│   └── Achievements & certifications
├── 💼 Portfolio Page (Dự án)
│   ├── Project grid với filters
│   ├── Project detail modals
│   ├── Technology tags
│   └── Live demo links
├── 📝 Blog Page (Bài viết)
│   ├── Blog listing với pagination
│   ├── Category filters
│   ├── Search functionality
│   └── Blog detail với comments
├── 🛒 Shop Page (Cửa hàng)
│   ├── Product catalog
│   ├── Shopping cart
│   ├── Checkout process
│   └── Payment integration
├── 🎮 Game Page (Game)
│   ├── Game reviews
│   ├── Game screenshots
│   ├── Rating system
│   └── Download links
├── 📞 Contact Page (Liên hệ)
│   ├── Contact form với validation
│   ├── Social media links
│   ├── Location map
│   └── Business hours
└── 🔐 Auth Pages (Đăng nhập/Đăng ký)
    ├── Login form
    ├── Registration form
    ├── Password reset
    └── OAuth2 integration
```

## **⚙️ BACKEND (Business Logic Layer)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **Spring Boot** - Framework chính (Auto-configuration)
- **Spring MVC** - Xử lý HTTP requests/responses
- **Spring Security** - Bảo mật và authentication
- **Spring Data JPA** - Tương tác database ORM
- **Maven** - Quản lý dependencies và build

### **🔧 Backend Layers:**
```
├── 🎮 Controller Layer (Presentation)
│   ├── Web Controllers (Thymeleaf views)
│   ├── REST API Controllers (JSON responses)
│   ├── Admin Controllers (Management)
│   └── Exception Handlers (Error handling)
├── 🏢 Service Layer (Business Logic)
│   ├── User Service (User management)
│   ├── Blog Service (Content management)
│   ├── Auth Service (Authentication)
│   ├── Email Service (Communication)
│   └── File Service (Upload/Download)
├── 🗄️ Repository Layer (Data Access)
│   ├── JPA Repositories (CRUD operations)
│   ├── Custom Queries (Complex searches)
│   ├── Specifications (Dynamic queries)
│   └── Transactions (Data consistency)
├── 🏛️ Entity Layer (Data Model)
│   ├── User Entity (User information)
│   ├── Blog Entity (Blog posts)
│   ├── Project Entity (Portfolio items)
│   └── Audit Entities (Tracking changes)
└── 🛡️ Security Layer (Protection)
    ├── JWT Token Provider
    ├── User Details Service
    ├── Password Encoder
    └── Access Control
```

## **🌐 API (Application Programming Interface)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **REST API** - Chuẩn giao tiếp RESTful
- **JSON** - Định dạng dữ liệu lightweight
- **Spring Web** - Tạo API endpoints
- **OpenAPI/Swagger** - API documentation

### **🔗 API Endpoints:**
```
├── 👤 /api/users - Quản lý người dùng
│   ├── GET /api/users - Lấy danh sách users
│   ├── GET /api/users/{id} - Lấy user theo ID
│   ├── POST /api/users - Tạo user mới
│   ├── PUT /api/users/{id} - Cập nhật user
│   └── DELETE /api/users/{id} - Xóa user
├── 📝 /api/blogs - Quản lý bài viết
│   ├── GET /api/blogs - Lấy danh sách blogs
│   ├── GET /api/blogs/{slug} - Lấy blog theo slug
│   ├── POST /api/blogs - Tạo blog mới
│   ├── PUT /api/blogs/{id} - Cập nhật blog
│   └── DELETE /api/blogs/{id} - Xóa blog
├── 💼 /api/projects - Quản lý dự án
│   ├── GET /api/projects - Lấy danh sách projects
│   ├── GET /api/projects/{id} - Lấy project detail
│   ├── POST /api/projects - Tạo project mới
│   └── PUT /api/projects/{id} - Cập nhật project
├── 🛒 /api/products - Quản lý sản phẩm
│   ├── GET /api/products - Lấy catalog sản phẩm
│   ├── GET /api/products/{id} - Chi tiết sản phẩm
│   ├── POST /api/cart - Thêm vào giỏ hàng
│   └── POST /api/orders - Đặt hàng
└── 📁 /api/files - Quản lý file
    ├── POST /api/files/upload - Upload file
    ├── GET /api/files/{id} - Download file
    ├── DELETE /api/files/{id} - Xóa file
    └── GET /api/files/metadata - File info
```

## **🗄️ DATABASE (Data Persistence Layer)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **MySQL/PostgreSQL** - Database chính (RDBMS)
- **JPA/Hibernate** - ORM (Object-Relational Mapping)
- **Spring Data JPA** - Repository pattern implementation
- **Redis** - Caching layer (In-memory)

### **🗃️ Database Tables:**
```
├── 👤 users - Thông tin người dùng
│   ├── id, username, email, password
│   ├── enabled, created_at, updated_at
│   └── Relationships: roles, blogs, projects
├── 📝 blogs - Bài viết blog
│   ├── id, title, slug, content, excerpt
│   ├── category, published, featured
│   └── author_id, view_count, tags
├── 💼 projects - Dự án portfolio
│   ├── id, title, description, content
│   ├── github_url, live_url, image_url
│   └── technologies, status, featured
├── 🛒 products - Sản phẩm shop
│   ├── id, name, description, price
│   ├── category, stock, available
│   └── image_url, download_url
├── 🎮 games - Game reviews
│   ├── id, title, description, rating
│   ├── genre, platform, release_date
│   └── screenshots, review_content
├── 📁 files - File metadata
│   ├── id, file_name, file_path, file_type
│   ├── file_size, mime_type, upload_date
│   └── uploaded_by, download_count
└── 📞 feedback - Phản hồi liên hệ
    ├── id, name, email, subject, message
    ├── category, status, priority
    └── admin_reply, created_at
```

## **🔐 SECURITY (Bảo mật)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **Spring Security** - Framework bảo mật enterprise
- **JWT** - JSON Web Token (Stateless authentication)
- **BCrypt** - Mã hóa mật khẩu (One-way hashing)
- **OAuth2** - Đăng nhập bằng Google/Facebook/GitHub

### **🔐 Security Features:**
```
├── 🔑 Authentication (Xác thực)
│   ├── Username/Password login
│   ├── JWT Token generation
│   ├── OAuth2 social login
│   └── Remember me functionality
├── 🎭 Authorization (Phân quyền)
│   ├── Role-based access (ADMIN, USER, MODERATOR)
│   ├── Method-level security (@PreAuthorize)
│   ├── URL-based permissions
│   └── Resource ownership checks
├── 🔒 Password Security (Bảo mật mật khẩu)
│   ├── BCrypt hashing (Salt + Hash)
│   ├── Password strength validation
│   ├── Password reset functionality
│   └── Account lockout mechanism
├── 🛡️ CSRF Protection (Chống tấn công)
│   ├── CSRF tokens for forms
│   ├── SameSite cookie attributes
│   ├── XSS protection headers
│   └── Content Security Policy
└── 🎫 JWT Token Management
    ├── Access token (Short-lived)
    ├── Refresh token (Long-lived)
    ├── Token blacklisting
    └── Automatic token refresh
```

## **📁 FILE MANAGEMENT (Quản lý file)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **Spring Multipart** - Upload file handling
- **Apache Commons IO** - File utilities
- **ImageIO** - Image processing
- **Apache Tika** - File type detection

### **📂 File Management Features:**
```
├── 📤 File Upload (Tải file lên)
│   ├── Multiple file upload
│   ├── Drag & drop interface
│   ├── Progress indicators
│   └── File type validation
├── 🖼️ Image Processing (Xử lý hình ảnh)
│   ├── Image resizing/thumbnails
│   ├── Format conversion (JPEG, PNG, WebP)
│   ├── Image optimization
│   └── Watermark addition
├── 📄 Document Management (Quản lý tài liệu)
│   ├── PDF generation
│   ├── Document preview
│   ├── Version control
│   └── Access permissions
└── 🎵 Media Upload (Tải media)
    ├── Audio file support
    ├── Video file handling
    ├── Streaming capabilities
    └── Metadata extraction
```

## **📧 COMMUNICATION (Giao tiếp)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **JavaMail API** - Email sending
- **Thymeleaf** - Email templates
- **Spring Boot Mail** - Mail configuration
- **WebSocket** - Real-time communication

### **📧 Communication Features:**
```
├── 📮 Email Service (Gửi email)
│   ├── Welcome emails
│   ├── Password reset emails
│   ├── Newsletter subscriptions
│   └── Notification emails
├── 🔔 Notification System (Thông báo)
│   ├── In-app notifications
│   ├── Push notifications
│   ├── Email notifications
│   └── SMS notifications (optional)
├── 💬 Feedback System (Hệ thống phản hồi)
│   ├── Contact form submissions
│   ├── Bug report system
│   ├── Feature requests
│   └── Customer support tickets
└── 📞 Contact Features (Tính năng liên hệ)
    ├── Contact form validation
    ├── Auto-reply messages
    ├── Admin notification
    └── Response tracking
```

## **🧪 TESTING (Kiểm thử)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **JUnit 5** - Unit testing framework
- **Mockito** - Mock objects for testing
- **Spring Boot Test** - Integration testing
- **TestContainers** - Database testing

### **🔬 Testing Types:**
```
├── 🔬 Unit Tests (Test từng method)
│   ├── Service layer testing
│   ├── Repository testing
│   ├── Utility class testing
│   └── Mock dependencies
├── 🔗 Integration Tests (Test kết nối)
│   ├── Controller integration
│   ├── Database integration
│   ├── External API testing
│   └── End-to-end workflows
├── 🛡️ Security Tests (Test bảo mật)
│   ├── Authentication testing
│   ├── Authorization testing
│   ├── CSRF protection testing
│   └── SQL injection prevention
└── ⚡ Performance Tests (Test hiệu suất)
    ├── Load testing
    ├── Stress testing
    ├── Memory usage testing
    └── Database performance
```

## **🚀 DEPLOYMENT (Triển khai)**

### **Công nghệ sử dụng:**
- **Docker** - Containerization platform
- **Heroku/AWS** - Cloud hosting services
- **GitHub Actions** - CI/CD automation
- **Nginx** - Reverse proxy server

### **🛠️ Deployment Process:**
```
├── 📦 Build Application (Đóng gói)
│   ├── Maven build process
│   ├── JAR file generation
│   ├── Static resource optimization
│   └── Environment configuration
├── 🐳 Docker Container (Container hóa)
│   ├── Dockerfile creation
│   ├── Multi-stage builds
│   ├── Image optimization
│   └── Container orchestration
├── ☁️ Cloud Deployment (Triển khai cloud)
│   ├── Heroku deployment
│   ├── AWS EC2/ECS deployment
│   ├── Database migration
│   └── Environment variables
└── 🔄 CI/CD Pipeline (Tự động hóa)
    ├── Automated testing
    ├── Code quality checks
    ├── Security scanning
    └── Automatic deployment
```

# 🔄 **5. LUỒNG XỬ LÝ CHI TIẾT** {#detailed-flow}

## **📋 LUỒNG XỬ LÝ REQUEST TỔNG QUÁT**

```
1. 👤 User truy cập website (Frontend)
   ↓
2. 🎮 Controller nhận request (HTTP)
   ↓
3. 🛡️ Security filter xác thực (Authentication)
   ↓
4. 🏢 Service xử lý logic nghiệp vụ (Business Logic)
   ↓
5. 🗄️ Repository truy vấn database (Data Access)
   ↓
6. 💾 Database trả về dữ liệu (Data)
   ↓
7. 🔄 Service xử lý và format dữ liệu (Processing)
   ↓
8. 🎮 Controller trả về response (HTTP Response)
   ↓
9. 🎨 Frontend hiển thị kết quả (UI Update)
```

## **🔐 LUỒNG XỬ LÝ AUTHENTICATION (Xác thực)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   LOGIN     │    │ SECURITY    │    │   SERVICE   │    │  DATABASE   │
│   FORM      │    │  FILTER     │    │   LAYER     │    │   LAYER     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. User Input ──────────────┤                   │                   │
   (username/password)      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. HTTP POST ───────────────┤                   │                   │
   /api/auth/login          │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Security Filter ─────────┤                   │                   │
   validates request        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. AuthController ──────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   receives request         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. AuthService ─────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   authenticate user        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. UserRepository ──────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   findByUsername()         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. Database Query ──────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   SELECT * FROM users      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
8. Password Validation ─────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   BCrypt.matches()         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
9. JWT Token Generation ────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   JwtTokenProvider         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
10. Response with Token ────┤                   │                   │
    {"token": "jwt...",     │                   │                   │
     "user": {...}}         │                   │                   │
```

## **📝 LUỒNG XỬ LÝ BLOG CREATION (Tạo bài viết)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│  FRONTEND   │    │ CONTROLLER  │    │   SERVICE   │    │  DATABASE   │
│   FORM      │    │   LAYER     │    │   LAYER     │    │   LAYER     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. User fills form ─────────┤                   │                   │
   (title, content, etc.)   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Form validation ─────────┤                   │                   │
   (client-side JS)         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. AJAX POST request ───────┤                   │                   │
   /api/blogs               │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. JWT Token validation ────┤                   │                   │
   Authorization header     │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. BlogController ──────────┤                   │                   │
   @PostMapping("/blogs")   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Request validation ──────┤                   │                   │
   @Valid BlogRequestDto    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. BlogService ─────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   createBlog(request)      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
8. Slug generation ─────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   SlugUtils.generateSlug() │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
9. Entity mapping ──────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   BlogMapper.toEntity()    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
10. BlogRepository ─────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    save(blog)              │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
11. Database INSERT ────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    INSERT INTO blogs...    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
12. Event publishing ───────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    BlogCreatedEvent        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
13. Response mapping ───────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    BlogMapper.toResponse() │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
14. JSON Response ──────────┤                   │                   │
    {"id": 1, "title":...}  │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
15. Frontend update ────────┤                   │                   │
    Success notification    │                   │                   │
```

## **🛒 LUỒNG XỬ LÝ E-COMMERCE (Mua hàng)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│  SHOPPING   │    │   ORDER     │    │  PAYMENT    │    │  DATABASE   │
│    CART     │    │ CONTROLLER  │    │  SERVICE    │    │   LAYER     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. Add to cart ─────────────┤                   │                   │
   Product selection        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Cart validation ─────────┤                   │                   │
   Stock availability       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Checkout process ────────┤                   │                   │
   /api/checkout            │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. Order creation ──────────┤                   │                   │
   OrderController          │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. Inventory check ─────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   ProductRepository        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Payment processing ──────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   PaymentService           │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. External payment ────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Stripe/PayPal API        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
8. Order confirmation ──────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   INSERT INTO orders       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
9. Stock update ────────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   UPDATE products SET...   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
10. Email notification ─────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    EmailService            │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
11. Order confirmation ─────┤                   │                   │
    Success page            │                   │                   │
```

## **📁 LUỒNG XỬ LÝ FILE UPLOAD (Tải file)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   FILE      │    │   FILE      │    │   STORAGE   │    │  DATABASE   │
│  UPLOAD     │    │ CONTROLLER  │    │  SERVICE    │    │   LAYER     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. File selection ──────────┤                   │                   │
   Drag & drop interface    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Client validation ───────┤                   │                   │
   File type, size check    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Upload progress ─────────┤                   │                   │
   Progress bar update      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. Multipart request ───────┤                   │                   │
   POST /api/files/upload   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. FileController ──────────┤                   │                   │
   @PostMapping upload      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. File validation ─────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Size, type, virus scan   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. File processing ─────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Image resize, optimize   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
8. Storage save ────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Local/Cloud storage      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
9. Metadata save ───────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   FileRepository.save()    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
10. Database INSERT ────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    INSERT INTO files...    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
11. Response with URL ──────┤                   │                   │
    {"url": "/files/123"}   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
12. Frontend update ────────┤                   │                   │
    Display uploaded file   │                   │                   │
```

## **🚀 ADVANCED BACKEND FEATURES (Tính năng nâng cao)**

### **📊 CACHING STRATEGY (Chiến lược Cache)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   CLIENT    │    │   SPRING    │    │    REDIS    │    │  DATABASE   │
│  REQUEST    │    │    BOOT     │    │   CACHE     │    │   LAYER     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. GET /api/blogs ──────────┤                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. @Cacheable check ────────┤                   │                   │
   Cache key: "blogs"       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Redis lookup ────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   GET blogs                │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4a. Cache HIT ──────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    Return cached data      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4b. Cache MISS ─────────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    Query database          │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. Database query ──────────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   SELECT * FROM blogs      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Cache result ────────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   SET blogs data TTL=30m   │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. Return response ─────────┤                   │                   │
   JSON data                │                   │                   │

Cache Levels:
├── L1: Application Cache (@Cacheable)
├── L2: Redis Cache (Distributed)
├── L3: Database Query Cache
└── L4: CDN Cache (Static resources)
```

### **📨 EVENT-DRIVEN ARCHITECTURE (Kiến trúc hướng sự kiện)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   BLOG      │    │   EVENT     │    │  LISTENER   │    │  EXTERNAL   │
│  SERVICE    │    │ PUBLISHER   │    │  SERVICES   │    │  SERVICES   │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. Blog created ────────────┤                   │                   │
   blogService.create()     │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Publish event ───────────┤                   │                   │
   BlogCreatedEvent         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Event distribution ──────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   @EventListener           │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4a. Email notification ─────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    @Async emailService     │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4b. Search indexing ────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
    @Async searchService    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4c. Social media post ──────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    @Async socialService    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4d. Analytics tracking ─────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
    @Async analyticsService │                   │                   │

Event Types:
├── BlogCreatedEvent
├── BlogPublishedEvent
├── UserRegisteredEvent
├── OrderCompletedEvent
└── FileUploadedEvent
```

### **🔄 MESSAGE QUEUE SYSTEM (Hệ thống hàng đợi)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│  PRODUCER   │    │   RABBITMQ  │    │  CONSUMER   │    │  EXTERNAL   │
│  SERVICE    │    │   BROKER    │    │  SERVICE    │    │   API       │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. Heavy task ──────────────┤                   │                   │
   Email sending            │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Queue message ───────────┤                   │                   │
   email.queue              │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Message stored ──────────┤                   │                   │
   Persistent storage       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. Immediate response ──────┤                   │                   │
   "Email queued"           │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. Consumer polling ────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   @RabbitListener          │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Process message ─────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   EmailService.send()      │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. External API call ───────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   SMTP server              │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
8. Acknowledge message ─────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Message removed          │                   │                   │

Queue Types:
├── email.queue (Email notifications)
├── image.processing.queue (Image resize)
├── report.generation.queue (PDF reports)
└── backup.queue (Database backup)
```

### **🏗️ MICROSERVICES ARCHITECTURE (Kiến trúc vi dịch vụ)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   API       │    │    USER     │    │    BLOG     │    │   PRODUCT   │
│  GATEWAY    │    │  SERVICE    │    │  SERVICE    │    │  SERVICE    │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. Client request ──────────┤                   │                   │
   /api/users/profile       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Route to service ────────┤                   │                   │
   Load balancing           │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Service processing ──────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   UserService.getProfile() │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. Inter-service call ──────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   GET /blogs/by-author     │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. Service response ────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   User's blog list         │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Aggregate response ──────┤                   │                   │
   Complete user profile    │                   │                   │

Service Communication:
├── Synchronous: REST API calls
├── Asynchronous: Message queues
├── Service Discovery: Eureka
└── Circuit Breaker: Hystrix
```

### **📈 MONITORING & OBSERVABILITY (Giám sát & Quan sát)**

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│APPLICATION  │    │  METRICS    │    │   LOGGING   │    │  ALERTING   │
│  SERVICES   │    │ COLLECTOR   │    │ AGGREGATOR  │    │  SYSTEM     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │                   │
1. Application metrics ─────┤                   │                   │
   CPU, Memory, Requests    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
2. Custom metrics ──────────┤                   │                   │
   Business KPIs            │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
3. Log generation ──────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   Structured logging       │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
4. Metrics aggregation ─────┤                   │                   │
   Prometheus/Micrometer    │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
5. Log aggregation ─────────┼───────────────────┤                   │
   ELK Stack/Fluentd        │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
6. Threshold monitoring ────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   Alert rules              │                   │                   │
       │                   │                   │                   │
7. Alert notifications ─────┼───────────────────┼───────────────────┤
   Email/Slack/PagerDuty    │                   │                   │

Monitoring Stack:
├── Metrics: Prometheus + Grafana
├── Logging: ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana)
├── Tracing: Jaeger/Zipkin
└── APM: New Relic/DataDog
```

## **📋 BACKEND TECHNOLOGY STACK SUMMARY**

### **🎯 CƠ BẢN (BASIC LEVEL)**
```
├── 🏗️ Framework Core
│   ├── Spring Boot 3.x (Auto-configuration)
│   ├── Spring MVC (Web layer)
│   ├── Spring Data JPA (Data access)
│   └── Maven (Build tool)
├── 🗄️ Database
│   ├── MySQL/PostgreSQL (RDBMS)
│   ├── JPA/Hibernate (ORM)
│   ├── JDBC (Database connectivity)
│   └── H2 (Testing database)
├── 🔐 Security Basic
│   ├── Spring Security (Authentication)
│   ├── BCrypt (Password hashing)
│   ├── Session management
│   └── CSRF protection
└── 🧪 Testing Basic
    ├── JUnit 5 (Unit testing)
    ├── Mockito (Mocking)
    ├── Spring Boot Test
    └── @DataJpaTest
```

│   ├── REST API design
│   ├── JSON serialization
│   ├── OpenAPI/Swagger
│   └── API versioning
├── 📁 File Management

│   ├── Image processing

│   └── Storage strategies

│   ├── Notification system

│   └── Event publishing
└── 🔧 Configuration
    ├── Profiles (dev/prod)
    ├── External configuration
    ├── Environment variables
    └── Property validation
```

### **⚡ NÂNG CAO (ADVANCED LEVEL)**

├── 🚀 Performance
│   ├── Redis caching
│   ├── Database optimization
│   ├── Connection pooling
│   └── Async processing
├── 🏗️ Architecture

│   └── Clean architecture
├── 🔒 Security Advanced
│   ├── JWT tokens
│   ├── OAuth2 integration
│   ├── Method-level security
│   └── CORS configuration
└── 📊 Monitoring
    ├── Actuator endpoints

    └── Distributed tracing
```

### **🎓 CHUYÊN GIA (EXPERT LEVEL)**

├── 🌐 Microservices
│   ├── Service discovery
│   ├── Circuit breaker
│   ├── API Gateway
│   └── Distributed config
├── 📨 Message Queues
