## **🎯 MỤC ĐÍCH SỬ DỤNG TỪNG CÔNG NGHỆ**

| Công nghệ | Mục đích | Cấp độ | Thay thế cho |
|-----------|----------|---------|--------------|
| **Spring Boot** | Framework chính, auto-configuration | Cơ bản | Manual Spring config |
| **Spring MVC** | Xử lý HTTP requests/responses | Cơ bản | Servlet API |
| **Spring Security** | Authentication & Authorization | Cơ bản | Manual security |
| **Spring Data JPA** | Database abstraction layer | Cơ bản | JDBC boilerplate |
| **Thymeleaf** | Server-side template engine | Cơ bản | JSP |
| **MySQL** | Primary database storage | Cơ bản | File storage |
| **Redis** | Caching & session storage | Trung cấp | In-memory cache |
| **JWT** | Stateless authentication | Trung cấp | Session-based auth |
| **RabbitMQ** | Asynchronous messaging | Nâng cao | Synchronous processing |
| **Docker** | Application containerization | Nâng cao | Manual deployment |
| **Prometheus** | Metrics collection | Chuyên gia | Manual monitoring |

**🎉 Với kiến trúc này, bạn có thể xây dựng một ứng dụng web enterprise-grade hoàn chỉnh từ cơ bản đến nâng cao!**

---

# 🌐 **6. HƯỚNG DẪN DEPLOYMENT & MAINTENANCE** {#deployment-guide}

## **🚀 BƯỚC 1: CHUẨN BỊ DEPLOYMENT**

### **📋 Pre-Deployment Checklist:**
```
✅ Code hoàn thiện và tested
✅ Database schema finalized
✅ Environment variables configured
✅ SSL certificate ready
✅ Domain name purchased
✅ Hosting service selected
✅ Backup strategy planned
✅ Monitoring setup ready
```

### **🔧 Production Configuration:**
```yaml
# application-prod.yml
spring:
  profiles:
    active: prod

  datasource:
    url: ${DATABASE_URL}
    username: ${DATABASE_USERNAME}
    password: ${DATABASE_PASSWORD}
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      connection-timeout: 30000

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: validate  # NEVER use 'update' in production
    show-sql: false

  security:
    require-ssl: true

server:
  port: ${PORT:8080}
  compression:
    enabled: true
  ssl:
    enabled: true
    key-store: ${SSL_KEYSTORE_PATH}
    key-store-password: ${SSL_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}

logging:
  level:
    dev.cuonghoang: INFO
    org.springframework: WARN
  file:
    name: /var/log/cuonghoang-dev.log
    max-size: 100MB
    max-history: 30

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized
```

## **🌍 BƯỚC 2: DOMAIN & HOSTING SETUP**

### **🏷️ DOMAIN NAME (Tên miền)**

#### **Nhà cung cấp domain phổ biến:**
| Nhà cung cấp | Giá/năm (.com) | Ưu điểm | Nhược điểm |
|--------------|----------------|---------|------------|
| **Namecheap** | $8.88 - $12.98 | Giá rẻ, UI đẹp, Free WhoisGuard | Support chậm |
| **GoDaddy** | $11.99 - $19.99 | Nổi tiếng, Support 24/7 | Đắt, Upsell nhiều |
| **Cloudflare** | $8.03 - $9.15 | Giá gốc, Free CDN, Security | Ít tính năng |
| **Google Domains** | $12.00 | Tích hợp Google, Đơn giản | Ít option |
| **Porkbun** | $8.14 - $10.89 | Giá tốt, Free SSL, API | Mới, ít biết |

#### **Bước mua domain:**
```
1. Chọn nhà cung cấp (Recommend: Namecheap hoặc Cloudflare)
2. Search tên domain mong muốn
3. Chọn extension (.com, .dev, .io, .tech)
4. Add to cart và checkout
5. Setup DNS records (sẽ hướng dẫn bên dưới)

💡 Tips:
- Chọn .com nếu có thể (SEO tốt nhất)
- Tránh số và dấu gạch ngang
- Ngắn gọn, dễ nhớ
- Check trademark trước khi mua
```

### **☁️ HOSTING OPTIONS (Lựa chọn hosting)**

#### **1. FREE HOSTING (Miễn phí - Cho học tập)**

**🆓 Heroku (Recommended cho beginners):**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Hoàn toàn miễn phí (với giới hạn)
- Deploy dễ dàng với Git
- Tự động scale
- Add-ons phong phú (Database, Redis, etc.)
- SSL miễn phí

❌ Nhược điểm:
- App sleep sau 30 phút không hoạt động
- 550 giờ/tháng (~ 22 ngày)
- Performance hạn chế
- Không custom domain miễn phí

💰 Chi phí:
- Free tier: $0/tháng
- Hobby: $7/tháng (no sleep, custom domain)
- Standard: $25/tháng (better performance)
```

**🆓 Railway:**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- $5 credit miễn phí/tháng
- Không sleep
- Deploy từ GitHub
- Database included

❌ Nhược điểm:
- Credit hạn chế
- Ít add-ons

💰 Chi phí:
- Free: $5 credit/tháng
- Pro: $20/tháng
```

**🆓 Render:**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Free tier không sleep
- SSL miễn phí
- Auto-deploy từ Git

❌ Nhược điểm:
- Slow cold starts
- Limited resources

💰 Chi phí:
- Free: $0/tháng
- Starter: $7/tháng
```

#### **2. PAID HOSTING (Trả phí - Cho production)**

**☁️ DigitalOcean (Recommended):**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Performance tốt
- Giá cả hợp lý
- Documentation xuất sắc
- 1-click apps
- Backup tự động

💰 Chi phí:
- Basic Droplet: $4-6/tháng (1GB RAM)
- Standard: $12/tháng (2GB RAM)
- Database: $15/tháng (1GB RAM)
- Load Balancer: $12/tháng
- Backup: 20% của droplet cost

🎁 Bonus: $200 credit cho 60 ngày đầu
```

**☁️ AWS (Amazon Web Services):**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Scalability vô hạn
- Services đa dạng
- Global infrastructure
- Enterprise-grade

❌ Nhược điểm:
- Phức tạp cho beginners
- Billing có thể bất ngờ

💰 Chi phí:
- EC2 t3.micro: $8.5/tháng
- RDS db.t3.micro: $13/tháng
- Application Load Balancer: $16/tháng
- Route 53: $0.5/tháng

🎁 Free tier: 12 tháng đầu
```

**☁️ Linode:**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Performance/price ratio tốt
- Simple pricing
- Excellent support

💰 Chi phí:
- Nanode 1GB: $5/tháng
- Linode 2GB: $10/tháng
- Database: $15/tháng
```

**☁️ Vultr:**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Giá rẻ
- Global locations
- High performance

💰 Chi phí:
- Regular: $2.5-6/tháng
- High Frequency: $6-12/tháng
```

#### **3. MANAGED HOSTING (Quản lý hoàn toàn)**

**🚀 Vercel (Cho frontend + serverless):**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Deploy cực nhanh
- Global CDN
- Serverless functions
- Git integration

💰 Chi phí:
- Hobby: Free
- Pro: $20/tháng
- Team: $99/tháng
```

**🚀 Netlify (Cho static sites):**
```
✅ Ưu điểm:
- Free tier generous
- Form handling
- Identity service

💰 Chi phí:
- Starter: Free
- Pro: $19/tháng
```

### **💾 DATABASE HOSTING**

#### **Free Database Options:**
```
🆓 PlanetScale (MySQL):
- Free: 1 database, 1GB storage, 1 billion reads
- Scaler: $29/tháng

🆓 Supabase (PostgreSQL):
- Free: 500MB database, 2GB bandwidth
- Pro: $25/tháng

🆓 MongoDB Atlas:
- Free: 512MB storage
- Shared: $9/tháng

🆓 Firebase (NoSQL):
- Spark: Free với limits
- Blaze: Pay-as-you-go
```

#### **Paid Database Options:**
```
💰 AWS RDS:
- db.t3.micro: $13/tháng (MySQL/PostgreSQL)
- Multi-AZ: $26/tháng

💰 DigitalOcean Managed Database:
- Basic: $15/tháng (1GB RAM)
- Standard: $60/tháng (4GB RAM)

💰 Google Cloud SQL:
- db-f1-micro: $7/tháng
- db-g1-small: $25/tháng
```

## **🚀 BƯỚC 3: DEPLOYMENT PROCESS**

### **📦 OPTION 1: HEROKU DEPLOYMENT (Recommended cho beginners)**

#### **Bước 1: Chuẩn bị project:**
```bash
# 1. Tạo Procfile trong root directory
echo "web: java -Dserver.port=\$PORT -jar target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar" > Procfile

# 2. Tạo system.properties
echo "java.runtime.version=17" > system.properties

# 3. Update application.yml
# Thêm profile production
```

#### **Bước 2: Deploy lên Heroku:**
```bash
# 1. Install Heroku CLI
# Windows: Download từ https://devcenter.heroku.com/articles/heroku-cli
# macOS: brew install heroku/brew/heroku
# Linux: curl https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install.sh | sh

# 2. Login Heroku
heroku login

# 3. Tạo Heroku app
heroku create cuonghoang-dev

# 4. Set environment variables
heroku config:set SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod
heroku config:set DATABASE_URL=your_database_url
heroku config:set JWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret

# 5. Add database addon
heroku addons:create heroku-postgresql:mini

# 6. Deploy
git add .
git commit -m "Prepare for Heroku deployment"
git push heroku main

# 7. Run database migrations
heroku run java -cp target/classes:target/dependency/* org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher --spring.profiles.active=prod

# 8. Open app
heroku open
```

#### **Bước 3: Setup custom domain:**
```bash
# 1. Add domain to Heroku
heroku domains:add www.cuonghoang.dev

# 2. Get DNS target
heroku domains

# 3. Update DNS records tại nhà cung cấp domain:
# CNAME: www -> your-app-name.herokuapp.com
# A: @ -> Heroku IP (nếu có)
```

### **📦 OPTION 2: DIGITALOCEAN DEPLOYMENT**

#### **Bước 1: Tạo Droplet:**
```bash
# 1. Tạo account DigitalOcean
# 2. Create Droplet:
#    - Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
#    - Basic plan: $6/month (1GB RAM)
#    - Add SSH key
#    - Enable monitoring

# 3. Connect to server
ssh root@your_server_ip
```

#### **Bước 2: Setup server:**
```bash
# Update system
apt update && apt upgrade -y

# Install Java 17
apt install openjdk-17-jdk -y

# Install Nginx
apt install nginx -y

# Install MySQL
apt install mysql-server -y
mysql_secure_installation

# Create database
mysql -u root -p
CREATE DATABASE cuonghoang_dev;
CREATE USER 'cuonghoang'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'strong_password';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON cuonghoang_dev.* TO 'cuonghoang'@'localhost';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
EXIT;

# Create app user
adduser cuonghoang
usermod -aG sudo cuonghoang

# Create app directory
mkdir -p /opt/cuonghoang-dev
chown cuonghoang:cuonghoang /opt/cuonghoang-dev
```

#### **Bước 3: Deploy application:**
```bash
# Switch to app user
su - cuonghoang

# Clone repository
cd /opt/cuonghoang-dev
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/cuonghoang-dev.git .

# Build application
./mvnw clean package -DskipTests

# Create systemd service
sudo nano /etc/systemd/system/cuonghoang-dev.service
```

```ini
[Unit]
Description=CuongHoang Dev Application
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=cuonghoang
WorkingDirectory=/opt/cuonghoang-dev
ExecStart=/usr/bin/java -jar /opt/cuonghoang-dev/target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Environment=SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod
Environment=DATABASE_URL=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/cuonghoang_dev
Environment=DATABASE_USERNAME=cuonghoang
Environment=DATABASE_PASSWORD=strong_password
Environment=JWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
```

```bash
# Start service
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable cuonghoang-dev
sudo systemctl start cuonghoang-dev
sudo systemctl status cuonghoang-dev
```

#### **Bước 4: Setup Nginx reverse proxy:**
```bash
sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/cuonghoang-dev
```

```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name cuonghoang.dev www.cuonghoang.dev;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://localhost:8080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }

    # Static files
    location /css/ {
        alias /opt/cuonghoang-dev/src/main/resources/static/css/;
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
    }

    location /js/ {
        alias /opt/cuonghoang-dev/src/main/resources/static/js/;
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
    }

    location /img/ {
        alias /opt/cuonghoang-dev/src/main/resources/static/img/;
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
    }
}
```

```bash
# Enable site
sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/cuonghoang-dev /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl restart nginx
```

#### **Bước 5: Setup SSL với Let's Encrypt:**
```bash
# Install Certbot
sudo apt install certbot python3-certbot-nginx -y

# Get SSL certificate
sudo certbot --nginx -d cuonghoang.dev -d www.cuonghoang.dev

# Test auto-renewal
sudo certbot renew --dry-run
```

### **📦 OPTION 3: DOCKER DEPLOYMENT**

#### **Dockerfile:**
```dockerfile
# Multi-stage build
FROM maven:3.9-openjdk-17 AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY pom.xml .
COPY src ./src
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests

FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar

# Create non-root user
RUN addgroup --system spring && adduser --system spring --ingroup spring
USER spring:spring

EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]
```

#### **docker-compose.yml:**
```yaml
version: '3.8'

services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod
      - DATABASE_URL=jdbc:mysql://db:3306/cuonghoang_dev
      - DATABASE_USERNAME=cuonghoang
      - DATABASE_PASSWORD=password
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis
    restart: unless-stopped

  db:
    image: mysql:8.0
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: cuonghoang_dev
      MYSQL_USER: cuonghoang
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
    restart: unless-stopped

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
    depends_on:
      - app
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  mysql_data:
```

#### **Deploy với Docker:**
```bash
# Build and run
docker-compose up -d

# Check logs
docker-compose logs -f app

# Scale application
docker-compose up -d --scale app=3
```

## **🌐 BƯỚC 4: DNS CONFIGURATION**

### **📋 DNS Records Setup:**

#### **Tại nhà cung cấp domain (Namecheap/Cloudflare):**
```
Record Type | Name | Value | TTL
------------|------|-------|----
A           | @    | your_server_ip | 300
A           | www  | your_server_ip | 300
CNAME       | api  | cuonghoang.dev | 300
CNAME       | admin| cuonghoang.dev | 300
MX          | @    | mail.cuonghoang.dev | 300
TXT         | @    | "v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ~all" | 300

# Nếu dùng Cloudflare CDN:
CNAME       | @    | your-app.herokuapp.com | 1 (Auto)
CNAME       | www  | your-app.herokuapp.com | 1 (Auto)
```

#### **Cloudflare Setup (Recommended):**
```
1. Add site to Cloudflare (Free plan)
2. Update nameservers tại domain provider:
   - NS1: eva.ns.cloudflare.com
   - NS2: walt.ns.cloudflare.com
3. Configure DNS records
4. Enable SSL/TLS (Full Strict)
5. Enable Always Use HTTPS
6. Setup Page Rules:
   - www.cuonghoang.dev/* → https://cuonghoang.dev/$1 (301 Redirect)
7. Enable Brotli compression
8. Setup Caching rules
```

### **🔒 SSL Certificate Setup:**

#### **Option 1: Let's Encrypt (Free):**
```bash
# Automatic với Certbot
sudo certbot --nginx -d cuonghoang.dev -d www.cuonghoang.dev

# Manual renewal test
sudo certbot renew --dry-run

# Auto-renewal cron job
echo "0 12 * * * /usr/bin/certbot renew --quiet" | sudo crontab -
```

#### **Option 2: Cloudflare SSL (Free):**
```
1. Cloudflare Dashboard → SSL/TLS
2. Choose "Full (Strict)"
3. Enable "Always Use HTTPS"
4. Enable "Automatic HTTPS Rewrites"
5. Setup Origin Certificates cho server
```

#### **Option 3: Paid SSL Certificate:**
```
Nhà cung cấp SSL:
- Sectigo: $8-50/năm
- DigiCert: $175-595/năm
- GlobalSign: $249-1,499/năm

Wildcard SSL (*.cuonghoang.dev):
- Let's Encrypt: Free
- Sectigo: $69/năm
- DigiCert: $595/năm
```

## **🔄 BƯỚC 5: POST-DEPLOYMENT TASKS**

### **📊 Monitoring Setup:**

#### **Application Monitoring:**
```bash
# 1. Setup Actuator endpoints
# application-prod.yml
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized

# 2. Setup external monitoring
# UptimeRobot (Free): https://uptimerobot.com
# - Monitor: https://cuonghoang.dev/actuator/health
# - Interval: 5 minutes
# - Notifications: Email, SMS, Slack

# 3. Setup error tracking
# Sentry (Free tier): https://sentry.io
# - 5,000 errors/month free
# - Real-time error tracking
# - Performance monitoring
```

#### **Server Monitoring:**
```bash
# Install monitoring tools
sudo apt install htop iotop nethogs -y

# Setup log rotation
sudo nano /etc/logrotate.d/cuonghoang-dev
```

```
/var/log/cuonghoang-dev/*.log {
    daily
    missingok
    rotate 30
    compress
    delaycompress
    notifempty
    create 644 cuonghoang cuonghoang
    postrotate
        systemctl reload cuonghoang-dev
    endscript
}
```

### **🔐 Security Hardening:**

#### **Server Security:**
```bash
# 1. Setup firewall
sudo ufw enable
sudo ufw allow ssh
sudo ufw allow 80
sudo ufw allow 443

# 2. Disable root login
sudo nano /etc/ssh/sshd_config
# PermitRootLogin no
# PasswordAuthentication no
sudo systemctl restart ssh

# 3. Setup fail2ban
sudo apt install fail2ban -y
sudo systemctl enable fail2ban

# 4. Regular updates
echo "0 2 * * * apt update && apt upgrade -y" | sudo crontab -
```

#### **Application Security:**
```yaml
# Security headers trong Nginx
add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
add_header Referrer-Policy "no-referrer-when-downgrade" always;
add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self' http: https: data: blob: 'unsafe-inline'" always;
add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" always;
```

### **💾 Backup Strategy:**

#### **Database Backup:**
```bash
# 1. Create backup script
nano /home/cuonghoang/backup-db.sh
```

```bash
#!/bin/bash
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
BACKUP_DIR="/home/cuonghoang/backups"
DB_NAME="cuonghoang_dev"
DB_USER="cuonghoang"
DB_PASS="your_password"

# Create backup directory
mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR

# Create database backup
mysqldump -u $DB_USER -p$DB_PASS $DB_NAME > $BACKUP_DIR/db_backup_$DATE.sql

# Compress backup
gzip $BACKUP_DIR/db_backup_$DATE.sql

# Keep only last 7 days
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "db_backup_*.sql.gz" -mtime +7 -delete

# Upload to cloud storage (optional)
# aws s3 cp $BACKUP_DIR/db_backup_$DATE.sql.gz s3://your-bucket/backups/
```

```bash
# Make executable and schedule
chmod +x /home/cuonghoang/backup-db.sh
echo "0 2 * * * /home/cuonghoang/backup-db.sh" | crontab -
```

#### **Application Backup:**
```bash
# 1. Code backup (Git repository)
git remote add backup https://github.com/yourusername/cuonghoang-dev-backup.git
git push backup main

# 2. Files backup
rsync -av /opt/cuonghoang-dev/uploads/ /home/cuonghoang/backups/uploads/

# 3. Configuration backup
cp /etc/nginx/sites-available/cuonghoang-dev /home/cuonghoang/backups/
cp /etc/systemd/system/cuonghoang-dev.service /home/cuonghoang/backups/
```

## **🔧 BƯỚC 6: MAINTENANCE & UPDATES**

### **📝 Update Process (Khi cần update code):**

#### **Development Workflow:**
```bash
# 1. Local development
git checkout -b feature/new-feature
# ... make changes ...
git add .
git commit -m "Add new feature"
git push origin feature/new-feature

# 2. Create Pull Request
# Review code trên GitHub
# Merge vào main branch

# 3. Deploy to staging (optional)
git checkout staging
git merge main
git push origin staging
# Test trên staging environment

# 4. Deploy to production
```

#### **Production Deployment:**
```bash
# Option 1: Heroku (Automatic)
git push heroku main
# Heroku tự động build và deploy

# Option 2: Manual server deployment
ssh cuonghoang@your_server_ip

# Pull latest code
cd /opt/cuonghoang-dev
git pull origin main

# Build application
./mvnw clean package -DskipTests

# Backup current version
cp target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar target/cuonghoang-dev-backup.jar

# Stop service
sudo systemctl stop cuonghoang-dev

# Database migration (if needed)
java -jar target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --spring.profiles.active=prod --spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate

# Start service
sudo systemctl start cuonghoang-dev

# Check status
sudo systemctl status cuonghoang-dev
curl -f http://localhost:8080/actuator/health

# If error, rollback
# sudo systemctl stop cuonghoang-dev
# cp target/cuonghoang-dev-backup.jar target/cuonghoang-dev-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar
# sudo systemctl start cuonghoang-dev
```

#### **Zero-Downtime Deployment:**
```bash
# Using Blue-Green deployment
# 1. Setup load balancer (Nginx)
upstream backend {
    server 127.0.0.1:8080;  # Blue
    server 127.0.0.1:8081;  # Green
}

# 2. Deploy to Green environment
java -jar app.jar --server.port=8081 &

# 3. Health check Green
curl -f http://localhost:8081/actuator/health

# 4. Switch traffic to Green
# Update Nginx config
# Reload Nginx

# 5. Stop Blue environment
```

### **🛠️ Adding New Features:**

#### **Feature Development Process:**
```bash
# 1. Plan the feature
# - Write requirements
# - Design database changes
# - Plan API endpoints
# - Design UI mockups

# 2. Create feature branch
git checkout -b feature/user-dashboard

# 3. Implement feature
# - Backend: Controller, Service, Repository
# - Frontend: Templates, CSS, JavaScript
# - Tests: Unit tests, Integration tests

# 4. Test locally
./mvnw test
./mvnw spring-boot:run

# 5. Commit and push
git add .
git commit -m "Add user dashboard feature"
git push origin feature/user-dashboard

# 6. Create Pull Request
# 7. Code review
# 8. Merge to main
# 9. Deploy to production
```

#### **Database Schema Changes:**
```sql
-- Create migration script: V2__Add_User_Dashboard.sql
CREATE TABLE user_dashboard_settings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    theme VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'light',
    language VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'en',
    notifications_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Run migration
java -jar app.jar --spring.profiles.active=prod --spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate
```

### **🐛 Bug Fixes & Hotfixes:**

#### **Emergency Hotfix Process:**
```bash
# 1. Create hotfix branch from main
git checkout main
git pull origin main
git checkout -b hotfix/critical-security-fix

# 2. Fix the issue
# Make minimal changes
# Focus only on the critical issue

# 3. Test the fix
./mvnw test
# Manual testing

# 4. Deploy immediately
git add .
git commit -m "Fix critical security vulnerability"
git push origin hotfix/critical-security-fix

# 5. Merge to main
git checkout main
git merge hotfix/critical-security-fix
git push origin main

# 6. Deploy to production immediately
# Follow production deployment process

# 7. Create post-mortem document
# - What happened?
# - Why did it happen?
# - How was it fixed?
# - How to prevent it in the future?
```

## **🚨 TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE**

### **🔍 Common Issues & Solutions:**

#### **Application Won't Start:**
```bash
# Check logs
sudo journalctl -u cuonghoang-dev -f

# Common issues:
1. Port already in use
   - sudo lsof -i :8080
   - kill -9 <PID>

2. Database connection failed
   - Check DATABASE_URL
   - Test connection: mysql -h host -u user -p

3. Out of memory
   - Check: free -h
   - Increase JVM heap: -Xmx512m

4. Permission denied
   - Check file ownership: ls -la
   - Fix permissions: chown cuonghoang:cuonghoang /opt/cuonghoang-dev
```

#### **Website Not Accessible:**
```bash
# Check DNS
nslookup cuonghoang.dev
dig cuonghoang.dev

# Check Nginx
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl status nginx

# Check SSL
openssl s_client -connect cuonghoang.dev:443

# Check firewall
sudo ufw status
```

#### **Performance Issues:**
```bash
# Check server resources
htop
iotop
df -h

# Check application metrics
curl http://localhost:8080/actuator/metrics

# Check database performance
SHOW PROCESSLIST;
SHOW STATUS LIKE 'Slow_queries';

# Check logs for errors
tail -f /var/log/cuonghoang-dev.log
```

#### **Database Issues:**
```bash
# Check database status
sudo systemctl status mysql

# Check connections
SHOW STATUS LIKE 'Threads_connected';

# Check slow queries
SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'slow_query_log';

# Optimize tables
OPTIMIZE TABLE blogs;
ANALYZE TABLE users;
```

## **📊 PACKAGE STRUCTURE & CHỨC NĂNG**

### **Config Package**
- **SecurityConfig**: Cấu hình bảo mật, URL permissions
- **DatabaseConfig**: Connection pooling, transaction management
- **WebConfig**: MVC configuration, CORS, interceptors
- **MailConfig**: SMTP configuration, email templates

### **Controller Package**
- **Web Controllers**: User-facing pages, form handling
- **API Controllers**: RESTful endpoints, JSON responses
- **Admin Controllers**: Management interfaces
- **Auth Controllers**: Login, register, OAuth2

### **Service Package**
- **User Services**: User management, authentication
- **Content Services**: Blog, portfolio, product management
- **File Services**: Upload, processing, storage
- **Communication Services**: Email, notifications

### **Repository Package**
- **Data Access Layer**: Database queries, custom methods
- **Pagination Support**: Page, Sort, Pageable
- **Custom Queries**: @Query, native SQL

### **Entity Package**
- **Domain Models**: Business objects, relationships
- **Audit Support**: Created/updated timestamps
- **Validation**: Bean validation annotations

## **🔍 TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE**

### **Database Issues**
```bash
# Check database connection
mysql -h localhost -u cuonghoang -p cuonghoang_dev

# Check table structure
DESCRIBE users;
SHOW CREATE TABLE blogs;

# Check indexes
SHOW INDEX FROM blogs;

# Optimize queries
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM blogs WHERE category = 'Technology';
```

### **Application Startup Issues**
```bash
# Check logs
tail -f /app/logs/cuonghoang-dev.log

# Check port availability
netstat -tulpn | grep :8080

# Check Java process
ps aux | grep java

# Check memory usage
free -h
df -h
```

### **Performance Issues**
```bash
# Check JVM memory
jstat -gc [PID]

# Check database performance
SHOW PROCESSLIST;
SHOW STATUS LIKE 'Slow_queries';

# Check file system
iostat -x 1

# Check network
netstat -i
```

## **🚨 COMMON PITFALLS & SOLUTIONS**

### **Development Issues**
1. **Database Connection Problems**
   - Check connection strings
   - Verify credentials
   - Ensure database is running
   - Check firewall settings

2. **Authentication Failures**
   - Verify JWT secret configuration
   - Check token expiration
   - Validate user roles
   - Debug security filters

3. **File Upload Issues**
   - Check file size limits
   - Verify upload directory permissions
   - Validate file types
   - Handle storage exceptions

### **Performance Issues**
1. **Slow Database Queries**
   - Add proper indexes
   - Optimize N+1 queries
   - Use pagination
   - Implement caching

2. **Memory Leaks**
   - Close resources properly
   - Avoid circular references
   - Monitor heap usage
   - Use profiling tools

3. **Frontend Performance**
   - Optimize images
   - Minify CSS/JS
   - Implement lazy loading
   - Use CDN for static assets

### **Deployment Issues**
1. **Environment Configuration**
   - Use environment variables
   - Separate configs per environment
   - Validate configurations
   - Test in staging first

2. **SSL/HTTPS Problems**
   - Verify certificate validity
   - Check domain configuration
   - Update security headers
   - Test mixed content issues

3. **Database Migration**
   - Backup before migration
   - Test migration scripts
   - Plan rollback strategy
   - Monitor during deployment

## **🎖️ SUCCESS METRICS**

### **Technical Metrics**
- **Code Coverage**: > 80%
- **Performance**: Page load < 3 seconds
- **Security**: No critical vulnerabilities
- **Uptime**: > 99.5%
- **Response Time**: API < 500ms

# 📊 **APPENDIX: DETAILED SPECIFICATIONS**

## **🗄️ DATABASE SCHEMA COMPLETE**

### **Core Tables**
```sql
-- Users and Authentication
CREATE TABLE users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    provider VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'LOCAL',
    provider_id VARCHAR(100),
    avatar_url VARCHAR(500),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50),
    INDEX idx_user_email (email),
    INDEX idx_user_username (username),
    INDEX idx_user_enabled (enabled)
);

CREATE TABLE roles (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(255),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE user_roles (
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    role_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Content Management
CREATE TABLE blogs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    excerpt TEXT,
    content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    image_url VARCHAR(500),
    published BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    author_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50),
    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_blog_slug (slug),
    INDEX idx_blog_category (category),
    INDEX idx_blog_published (published),
    INDEX idx_blog_featured (featured),
    INDEX idx_blog_created_at (created_at),
    FULLTEXT idx_blog_search (title, content)
);

CREATE TABLE projects (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description TEXT,
    content LONGTEXT,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    github_url VARCHAR(500),
    live_url VARCHAR(500),
    image_url VARCHAR(500),
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'COMPLETED',
    featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    start_date DATE,
    end_date DATE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(50),
    updated_by VARCHAR(50),
    INDEX idx_project_slug (slug),
    INDEX idx_project_category (category),
    INDEX idx_project_status (status),
    INDEX idx_project_featured (featured)
);

-- E-commerce
CREATE TABLE products (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description TEXT,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'DIGITAL',
    image_url VARCHAR(500),
    available BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    stock INT DEFAULT 0,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    download_url VARCHAR(500),
    license_key VARCHAR(255),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_product_slug (slug),
    INDEX idx_product_category (category),
    INDEX idx_product_available (available)
);

-- File Management
CREATE TABLE file_metadata (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    original_file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    file_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    file_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    mime_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    file_size BIGINT NOT NULL,
    file_url VARCHAR(500),
    thumbnail_url VARCHAR(500),
    category VARCHAR(50),
    uploaded_by VARCHAR(50),
    download_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    width INT,
    height INT,
    page_count INT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_file_category (category),
    INDEX idx_file_type (file_type),
    INDEX idx_file_uploaded_by (uploaded_by)
);

-- Communication
CREATE TABLE notifications (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'INFO',
    category VARCHAR(50),
    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_global BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    action_url VARCHAR(500),
    action_text VARCHAR(100),
    icon_class VARCHAR(50),
    scheduled_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    read_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    priority VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_notification_user_id (user_id),
    INDEX idx_notification_is_read (is_read),
    INDEX idx_notification_is_global (is_global),
    INDEX idx_notification_scheduled_at (scheduled_at)
);

CREATE TABLE feedbacks (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    phone_number VARCHAR(20),
    subject VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'GENERAL',
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'NEW',
    priority VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    admin_reply TEXT,
    replied_by VARCHAR(50),
    replied_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    rating INT,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_feedback_status (status),
    INDEX idx_feedback_category (category),
    INDEX idx_feedback_is_read (is_read),
    INDEX idx_feedback_created_at (created_at)
);
```

## **🔧 CONFIGURATION TEMPLATES**

### **Complete application.yml**
```yaml
spring:
  application:
    name: cuonghoang-dev

  profiles:
    active: ${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:dev}

  datasource:
    url: ${DATABASE_URL:jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/cuonghoang_dev}
    username: ${DATABASE_USERNAME:cuonghoang}
    password: ${DATABASE_PASSWORD:password}
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      connection-timeout: 30000
      idle-timeout: 600000
      max-lifetime: 1800000
      leak-detection-threshold: 60000

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: ${DDL_AUTO:update}
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.hibernate.boot.model.naming.PhysicalNamingStrategyStandardImpl
    show-sql: ${SHOW_SQL:false}
    properties:
      hibernate:
        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect
        format_sql: true
        use_sql_comments: true
        jdbc:
          batch_size: 20
        order_inserts: true
        order_updates: true
        cache:
          use_second_level_cache: true
          use_query_cache: true
          region:
            factory_class: org.hibernate.cache.jcache.JCacheRegionFactory

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          google:
            client-id: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:}
            client-secret: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:}
            scope:
              - email
              - profile
          facebook:
            client-id: ${FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID:}
            client-secret: ${FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET:}
            scope:
              - email
              - public_profile
          github:
            client-id: ${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:}
            client-secret: ${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:}
            scope:
              - user:email
              - read:user

  mail:
    host: ${MAIL_HOST:smtp.gmail.com}
    port: ${MAIL_PORT:587}
    username: ${MAIL_USERNAME:}
    password: ${MAIL_PASSWORD:}
    properties:
      mail:
        smtp:
          auth: true
          starttls:
            enable: true
            required: true
          connectiontimeout: 5000
          timeout: 3000
          writetimeout: 5000

  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: ${MAX_FILE_SIZE:10MB}
      max-request-size: ${MAX_REQUEST_SIZE:50MB}
      file-size-threshold: 2KB

  thymeleaf:
    cache: ${THYMELEAF_CACHE:false}
    encoding: UTF-8
    mode: HTML
    prefix: classpath:/templates/
    suffix: .html

  web:
    resources:
      static-locations: classpath:/static/
      cache:
        period: ${STATIC_CACHE_PERIOD:3600}

server:
  port: ${PORT:8080}
  servlet:
    context-path: ${CONTEXT_PATH:}
    session:
      timeout: ${SESSION_TIMEOUT:30m}
  compression:
    enabled: true
    mime-types: text/html,text/xml,text/plain,text/css,text/javascript,application/javascript,application/json
    min-response-size: 1024
  http2:
    enabled: true

app:
  jwt:
    secret: ${JWT_SECRET:mySecretKey}
    expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}
    refresh-expiration: ${JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRATION:604800000}

  upload:
    dir: ${UPLOAD_DIR:uploads}
    max-size: ${UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE:10485760}
    allowed-types: ${ALLOWED_TYPES:jpg,jpeg,png,gif,pdf,doc,docx,txt}

  mail:
    from: ${MAIL_FROM:noreply@cuonghoang.dev}
    from-name: ${MAIL_FROM_NAME:CuongHoang Dev}

  cors:
    allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:3000,https://cuonghoang.dev}
    allowed-methods: ${CORS_ALLOWED_METHODS:GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS}
    allowed-headers: ${CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS:*}
    allow-credentials: ${CORS_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS:true}

  cache:
    enabled: ${CACHE_ENABLED:true}
    ttl: ${CACHE_TTL:3600}

  rate-limit:
    enabled: ${RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED:true}
    requests-per-minute: ${RATE_LIMIT_RPM:60}

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus,loggers,env
      base-path: /actuator
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when-authorized
      show-components: always
    metrics:
      enabled: true
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 1m
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        http.server.requests: true
      percentiles:
        http.server.requests: 0.5, 0.95, 0.99
      sla:
        http.server.requests: 100ms, 500ms, 1s
  info:
    env:
      enabled: true
    java:
      enabled: true
    os:
      enabled: true

logging:
  level:
    dev.cuonghoang: ${LOG_LEVEL:INFO}
    org.springframework.web: ${WEB_LOG_LEVEL:WARN}
    org.springframework.security: ${SECURITY_LOG_LEVEL:WARN}
    org.hibernate.SQL: ${SQL_LOG_LEVEL:WARN}
    org.hibernate.type.descriptor.sql.BasicBinder: ${SQL_PARAM_LOG_LEVEL:WARN}
  pattern:
    console: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level [%X{traceId},%X{spanId}] %logger{36} - %msg%n"
    file: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level [%X{traceId},%X{spanId}] %logger{36} - %msg%n"
  file:
    name: ${LOG_FILE:logs/cuonghoang-dev.log}
    max-size: ${LOG_MAX_SIZE:100MB}
    max-history: ${LOG_MAX_HISTORY:30}
```

## **🚀 PHASE 11: ADVANCED ENTERPRISE FEATURES (Tuần 27-32)**

### **Tuần 27: Animations & Micro-Interactions**

**Ngày 183-185: Advanced Animation System**
```css
/* css/animations/core-animations.css */

/* Advanced Animation Library */
:root {
    /* Animation timing functions */
    --ease-in-quad: cubic-bezier(0.55, 0.085, 0.68, 0.53);
    --ease-in-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.55, 0.055, 0.675, 0.19);
    --ease-out-quad: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
    --ease-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1);
    --ease-in-out-quad: cubic-bezier(0.455, 0.03, 0.515, 0.955);
    --ease-in-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);

    /* Animation durations */
    --duration-fast: 150ms;
    --duration-normal: 300ms;
    --duration-slow: 500ms;
    --duration-slower: 800ms;
}

/* Entrance Animations */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInUp {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInDown {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes scaleIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.9);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes rotateIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: rotate(-200deg);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: rotate(0);
    }
}

@keyframes flipInX {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: perspective(400px) rotateX(90deg);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: perspective(400px) rotateX(0deg);
    }
}

@keyframes flipInY {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: perspective(400px) rotateY(90deg);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: perspective(400px) rotateY(0deg);
    }
}

/* Attention Seekers */
@keyframes bounce {
    0%, 20%, 53%, 80%, 100% {
        transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
    }
    40%, 43% {
        transform: translate3d(0, -30px, 0);
    }
    70% {
        transform: translate3d(0, -15px, 0);
    }
    90% {
        transform: translate3d(0, -4px, 0);
    }
}

@keyframes flash {
    0%, 50%, 100% {
        opacity: 1;
    }
    25%, 75% {
        opacity: 0;
    }
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0% {
        transform: scale(1);
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.05);
    }
    100% {
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes rubberBand {
    0% {
        transform: scale(1);
    }
    30% {
        transform: scaleX(1.25) scaleY(0.75);
    }
    40% {
        transform: scaleX(0.75) scaleY(1.25);
    }
    50% {
        transform: scaleX(1.15) scaleY(0.85);
    }
    65% {
        transform: scaleX(0.95) scaleY(1.05);
    }
    75% {
        transform: scaleX(1.05) scaleY(0.95);
    }
    100% {
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes shake {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
    10%, 30%, 50%, 70%, 90% {
        transform: translateX(-10px);
    }
    20%, 40%, 60%, 80% {
        transform: translateX(10px);
    }
}

@keyframes swing {
    20% {
        transform: rotate(15deg);
    }
    40% {
        transform: rotate(-10deg);
    }
    60% {
        transform: rotate(5deg);
    }
    80% {
        transform: rotate(-5deg);
    }
    100% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
}

@keyframes tada {
    0% {
        transform: scale(1);
    }
    10%, 20% {
        transform: scale(0.9) rotate(-3deg);
    }
    30%, 50%, 70%, 90% {
        transform: scale(1.1) rotate(3deg);
    }
    40%, 60%, 80% {
        transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-3deg);
    }
    100% {
        transform: scale(1) rotate(0);
    }
}

@keyframes wobble {
    0% {
        transform: translateX(0%);
    }
    15% {
        transform: translateX(-25%) rotate(-5deg);
    }
    30% {
        transform: translateX(20%) rotate(3deg);
    }
    45% {
        transform: translateX(-15%) rotate(-3deg);
    }
    60% {
        transform: translateX(10%) rotate(2deg);
    }
    75% {
        transform: translateX(-5%) rotate(-1deg);
    }
    100% {
        transform: translateX(0%);
    }
}

/* Loading Animations */
@keyframes spin {
    to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
}

@keyframes dots {
    0%, 20% {
        color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
        text-shadow: 0.25em 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0),
                     0.5em 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
    }
    40% {
        color: var(--primary-500);
        text-shadow: 0.25em 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0),
                     0.5em 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
    }
    60% {
        text-shadow: 0.25em 0 0 var(--primary-500),
                     0.5em 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
    }
    80%, 100% {
        text-shadow: 0.25em 0 0 var(--primary-500),
                     0.5em 0 0 var(--primary-500);
    }
}

@keyframes typing {
    from {
        width: 0;
    }
    to {
        width: 100%;
    }
}

@keyframes blink-caret {
    from, to {
        border-color: transparent;
    }
    50% {
        border-color: var(--primary-500);
    }
}

/* Micro-interactions */
.hover-lift {
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic),
                box-shadow var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-lift:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
}

.hover-grow {
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-grow:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.hover-shrink {
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-shrink:hover {
    transform: scale(0.95);
}

.hover-rotate {
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-rotate:hover {
    transform: rotate(5deg);
}

.hover-skew {
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-skew:hover {
    transform: skew(-5deg);
}

.hover-glow {
    transition: box-shadow var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-glow:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--primary-200);
}

.hover-shadow {
    transition: box-shadow var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.hover-shadow:hover {
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-2xl);
}

/* Click Effects */
.click-ripple {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.click-ripple::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: width 0.6s, height 0.6s;
}

.click-ripple:active::after {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
}

.click-bounce {
    transition: transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.click-bounce:active {
    transform: scale(0.95);
}

/* Scroll Animations */
.scroll-fade-in {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: all var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.scroll-fade-in.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
}

.scroll-slide-left {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(-50px);
    transition: all var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.scroll-slide-left.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
}

.scroll-slide-right {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(50px);
    transition: all var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.scroll-slide-right.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
}

.scroll-scale-in {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
    transition: all var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.scroll-scale-in.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

/* Typing Animation */
.typing-animation {
    overflow: hidden;
    border-right: 2px solid var(--primary-500);
    white-space: nowrap;
    animation: typing 3.5s steps(40, end), blink-caret 0.75s step-end infinite;
}

/* Staggered Animations */
.stagger-item {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(20px);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic);
}

.stagger-item.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
}

.stagger-item:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0ms; }
.stagger-item:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 100ms; }
.stagger-item:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 200ms; }
.stagger-item:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 300ms; }
.stagger-item:nth-child(5) { transition-delay: 400ms; }
.stagger-item:nth-child(6) { transition-delay: 500ms; }

/* Animation Classes */
.animate-fade-in { animation: fadeIn var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-slide-in-left { animation: slideInLeft var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-slide-in-right { animation: slideInRight var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-slide-in-up { animation: slideInUp var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-slide-in-down { animation: slideInDown var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-scale-in { animation: scaleIn var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-rotate-in { animation: rotateIn var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-flip-in-x { animation: flipInX var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }
.animate-flip-in-y { animation: flipInY var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-cubic); }

.animate-bounce { animation: bounce 1s; }
.animate-flash { animation: flash 2s infinite; }
.animate-pulse { animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
.animate-rubber-band { animation: rubberBand 1s; }
.animate-shake { animation: shake 0.8s; }
.animate-swing { animation: swing 1s; }
.animate-tada { animation: tada 1s; }
.animate-wobble { animation: wobble 1s; }

.animate-spin { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }
.animate-dots { animation: dots 1.4s infinite; }

/* Reduced Motion */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    *,
    *::before,
    *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
    }
}
```

**Ngày 186-189: Animation Controller & Micro-Interactions**
```javascript
// js/animations/animation-controller.js

class AnimationController {
    constructor() {
        this.observerOptions = {
            threshold: 0.1,
            rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
        };
        this.animations = new Map();
        this.init();
    }

    init() {
        this.setupScrollAnimations();
        this.setupHoverAnimations();
        this.setupClickAnimations();
        this.setupStaggeredAnimations();
        this.setupParallaxAnimations();
        this.setupTypingAnimations();
        this.setupCounterAnimations();
        this.setupProgressAnimations();
    }

    setupScrollAnimations() {
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.classList.add('visible');

                    // Trigger custom animation if specified
                    const animationType = entry.target.dataset.animation;
                    if (animationType) {
                        this.triggerAnimation(entry.target, animationType);
                    }
                }
            });
        }, this.observerOptions);

        // Observe all scroll animation elements
        const scrollElements = document.querySelectorAll(
            '.scroll-fade-in, .scroll-slide-left, .scroll-slide-right, .scroll-scale-in, [data-animation]'
        );

        scrollElements.forEach(el => {
            observer.observe(el);
        });
    }

    setupHoverAnimations() {
        // Enhanced hover effects
        document.querySelectorAll('.hover-lift').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                el.style.transform = 'translateY(-4px)';
                el.style.boxShadow = 'var(--shadow-xl)';
            });

            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                el.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                el.style.boxShadow = '';
            });
        });

        // Magnetic effect
        document.querySelectorAll('.magnetic').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;

                el.style.transform = `translate(${x * 0.1}px, ${y * 0.1}px)`;
            });

            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                el.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)';
            });
        });

        // Tilt effect
        document.querySelectorAll('.tilt').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;

                const centerX = rect.width / 2;
                const centerY = rect.height / 2;

                const rotateX = (y - centerY) / centerY * -10;
                const rotateY = (x - centerX) / centerX * 10;

                el.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${rotateX}deg) rotateY(${rotateY}deg)`;
            });

            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                el.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg)';
            });
        });
    }

    setupClickAnimations() {
        // Enhanced ripple effect
        document.querySelectorAll('.click-ripple').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const ripple = document.createElement('span');
                const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height);
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - size / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - size / 2;

                ripple.style.cssText = `
                    position: absolute;
                    width: ${size}px;
                    height: ${size}px;
                    left: ${x}px;
                    top: ${y}px;
                    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
                    border-radius: 50%;
                    transform: scale(0);
                    animation: ripple 0.6s linear;
                    pointer-events: none;
                `;

                el.appendChild(ripple);

                setTimeout(() => {
                    ripple.remove();
                }, 600);
            });
        });

        // Button press effect
        document.querySelectorAll('.btn, button').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
                btn.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)';
            });

            btn.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                btn.style.transform = '';
            });

            btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                btn.style.transform = '';
            });
        });
    }

    setupStaggeredAnimations() {
        const staggerGroups = document.querySelectorAll('[data-stagger]');

        staggerGroups.forEach(group => {
            const items = group.querySelectorAll('.stagger-item');
            const delay = parseInt(group.dataset.stagger) || 100;

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        items.forEach((item, index) => {
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                item.classList.add('visible');
                            }, index * delay);
                        });
                        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            }, this.observerOptions);

            observer.observe(group);
        });
    }

    setupParallaxAnimations() {
        const parallaxElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-parallax]');

        if (parallaxElements.length > 0) {
            window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                const scrolled = window.pageYOffset;

                parallaxElements.forEach(el => {
                    const rate = scrolled * (parseFloat(el.dataset.parallax) || 0.5);
                    el.style.transform = `translateY(${rate}px)`;
                });
            });
        }
    }

    setupTypingAnimations() {
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-typing]').forEach(el => {
            const text = el.textContent;
            const speed = parseInt(el.dataset.typingSpeed) || 50;

            el.textContent = '';
            el.style.borderRight = '2px solid var(--primary-500)';

            let i = 0;
            const typeWriter = () => {
                if (i < text.length) {
                    el.textContent += text.charAt(i);
                    i++;
                    setTimeout(typeWriter, speed);
                } else {
                    // Blinking cursor
                    setInterval(() => {
                        el.style.borderRight = el.style.borderRight === 'none'
                            ? '2px solid var(--primary-500)'
                            : 'none';
                    }, 500);
                }
            };

            // Start typing when element is visible
            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        typeWriter();
                        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            });

            observer.observe(el);
        });
    }

    setupCounterAnimations() {
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-counter]').forEach(el => {
            const target = parseInt(el.dataset.counter);
            const duration = parseInt(el.dataset.counterDuration) || 2000;

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        this.animateCounter(el, 0, target, duration);
                        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            });

            observer.observe(el);
        });
    }

    setupProgressAnimations() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.progress-bar').forEach(bar => {
            const progress = bar.querySelector('.progress-fill');
            const percentage = parseInt(bar.dataset.progress) || 0;

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        progress.style.width = `${percentage}%`;
                        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            });

            observer.observe(bar);
        });
    }

    triggerAnimation(element, animationType) {
        element.classList.add(`animate-${animationType}`);

        // Remove animation class after completion
        element.addEventListener('animationend', () => {
            element.classList.remove(`animate-${animationType}`);
        }, { once: true });
    }

    animateCounter(element, start, end, duration) {
        const startTime = performance.now();

        const updateCounter = (currentTime) => {
            const elapsed = currentTime - startTime;
            const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);

            const current = Math.floor(start + (end - start) * this.easeOutQuart(progress));
            element.textContent = current.toLocaleString();

            if (progress < 1) {
                requestAnimationFrame(updateCounter);
            }
        };

        requestAnimationFrame(updateCounter);
    }

    easeOutQuart(t) {
        return 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 4);
    }

    // Public API methods
    fadeIn(element, duration = 300) {
        element.style.opacity = '0';
        element.style.transition = `opacity ${duration}ms ease-out`;

        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            element.style.opacity = '1';
        });
    }

    slideIn(element, direction = 'up', duration = 300) {
        const transforms = {
            up: 'translateY(20px)',
            down: 'translateY(-20px)',
            left: 'translateX(20px)',
            right: 'translateX(-20px)'
        };

        element.style.opacity = '0';
        element.style.transform = transforms[direction];
        element.style.transition = `all ${duration}ms ease-out`;

        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            element.style.opacity = '1';
            element.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)';
        });
    }

    bounce(element) {
        element.classList.add('animate-bounce');

        element.addEventListener('animationend', () => {
            element.classList.remove('animate-bounce');
        }, { once: true });
    }

    shake(element) {
        element.classList.add('animate-shake');

        element.addEventListener('animationend', () => {
            element.classList.remove('animate-shake');
        }, { once: true });
    }

    pulse(element) {
        element.classList.add('animate-pulse');

        setTimeout(() => {
            element.classList.remove('animate-pulse');
        }, 2000);
    }
}

// CSS for ripple effect
const rippleCSS = `
@keyframes ripple {
    to {
        transform: scale(4);
        opacity: 0;
    }
}
`;

// Add CSS to document
const style = document.createElement('style');
style.textContent = rippleCSS;
document.head.appendChild(style);

// Initialize Animation Controller
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    window.animationController = new AnimationController();
});

// Export for use in other modules
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
    module.exports = AnimationController;
}
```

### **Tuần 28: Search & Filtering System**

**Ngày 190-192: Advanced Search Implementation**
```java
// Enhanced SearchService.java
@Service
public class SearchService {

    @Autowired
    private BlogRepository blogRepository;

    @Autowired
    private ProjectRepository projectRepository;

    @Autowired
    private UserRepository userRepository;

    @Autowired
    private ElasticsearchTemplate elasticsearchTemplate;

    @Autowired
    private RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;

    private static final String SEARCH_CACHE_PREFIX = "search:";
    private static final int CACHE_TTL = 300; // 5 minutes

    public SearchResult search(SearchRequest request) {
        // Check cache first
        String cacheKey = generateCacheKey(request);
        SearchResult cachedResult = getCachedResult(cacheKey);
        if (cachedResult != null) {
            return cachedResult;
        }

        SearchResult result = performSearch(request);

        // Cache the result
        cacheResult(cacheKey, result);

        return result;
    }

    private SearchResult performSearch(SearchRequest request) {
        switch (request.getType().toLowerCase()) {
            case "blog":
                return searchBlogs(request);
            case "project":
                return searchProjects(request);
            case "user":
                return searchUsers(request);
            case "all":
                return searchAll(request);
            default:
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid search type: " + request.getType());
        }
    }

    private SearchResult searchBlogs(SearchRequest request) {
        Pageable pageable = PageRequest.of(
            request.getPage(),
            request.getSize(),
            Sort.by(getSortDirection(request.getSortOrder()), request.getSortBy())
        );

        Page<Blog> blogs;

        if (request.isUseFullTextSearch()) {
            blogs = blogRepository.searchBlogsFullText(request.getQuery(), pageable);
        } else {
            blogs = blogRepository.searchBlogs(request.getQuery(), request.getFilters(), pageable);
        }

        List<SearchResultItem> items = blogs.getContent().stream()
            .map(this::mapBlogToSearchItem)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());

        return SearchResult.builder()
            .type("blog")
            .query(request.getQuery())
            .totalResults(blogs.getTotalElements())
            .totalPages(blogs.getTotalPages())
            .currentPage(request.getPage())
            .items(items)
            .facets(generateBlogFacets(request))
            .suggestions(generateSuggestions(request.getQuery(), "blog"))
            .build();
    }

    private SearchResult searchProjects(SearchRequest request) {
        Pageable pageable = PageRequest.of(
            request.getPage(),
            request.getSize(),
            Sort.by(getSortDirection(request.getSortOrder()), request.getSortBy())
        );

        Page<Project> projects = projectRepository.searchProjects(
            request.getQuery(),
            request.getFilters(),
            pageable
        );

        List<SearchResultItem> items = projects.getContent().stream()
            .map(this::mapProjectToSearchItem)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());

        return SearchResult.builder()
            .type("project")
            .query(request.getQuery())
            .totalResults(projects.getTotalElements())
            .totalPages(projects.getTotalPages())
            .currentPage(request.getPage())
            .items(items)
            .facets(generateProjectFacets(request))
            .suggestions(generateSuggestions(request.getQuery(), "project"))
            .build();
    }

    private SearchResult searchAll(SearchRequest request) {
        // Parallel search across all types
        CompletableFuture<SearchResult> blogsFuture = CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
            SearchRequest blogRequest = request.toBuilder().type("blog").build();
            return searchBlogs(blogRequest);
        });

        CompletableFuture<SearchResult> projectsFuture = CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
            SearchRequest projectRequest = request.toBuilder().type("project").build();
            return searchProjects(projectRequest);
        });

        try {
            SearchResult blogResults = blogsFuture.get();
            SearchResult projectResults = projectsFuture.get();

            List<SearchResultItem> allItems = new ArrayList<>();
            allItems.addAll(blogResults.getItems());
            allItems.addAll(projectResults.getItems());

            // Sort combined results by relevance
            allItems.sort((a, b) -> Float.compare(b.getScore(), a.getScore()));

            return SearchResult.builder()
                .type("all")
                .query(request.getQuery())
                .totalResults(blogResults.getTotalResults() + projectResults.getTotalResults())
                .items(allItems.stream().limit(request.getSize()).collect(Collectors.toList()))
                .facets(combineFacets(blogResults.getFacets(), projectResults.getFacets()))
                .suggestions(generateSuggestions(request.getQuery(), "all"))
                .build();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new SearchException("Failed to perform combined search", e);
        }
    }

    private SearchResultItem mapBlogToSearchItem(Blog blog) {
        return SearchResultItem.builder()
            .id(blog.getId().toString())
            .type("blog")
            .title(blog.getTitle())
            .description(blog.getExcerpt())
            .url("/blog/" + blog.getSlug())
            .imageUrl(blog.getFeaturedImage())
            .author(blog.getAuthor().getFullName())
            .publishedDate(blog.getCreatedAt())
            .tags(blog.getTags())
            .category(blog.getCategory().getName())
            .score(calculateRelevanceScore(blog))
            .build();
    }

    private SearchResultItem mapProjectToSearchItem(Project project) {
        return SearchResultItem.builder()
            .id(project.getId().toString())
            .type("project")
            .title(project.getTitle())
            .description(project.getDescription())
            .url("/portfolio/" + project.getSlug())
            .imageUrl(project.getFeaturedImage())
            .author(project.getAuthor().getFullName())
            .publishedDate(project.getCreatedAt())
            .tags(project.getTechnologies())
            .category(project.getCategory())
            .score(calculateRelevanceScore(project))
            .build();
    }

    private float calculateRelevanceScore(Object entity) {
        // Implement relevance scoring algorithm
        // Consider factors like: recency, popularity, exact matches, etc.
        return 1.0f;
    }

    private List<SearchFacet> generateBlogFacets(SearchRequest request) {
        List<SearchFacet> facets = new ArrayList<>();

        // Category facet
        List<FacetItem> categories = blogRepository.findCategoryFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("category", "Category", categories));

        // Author facet
        List<FacetItem> authors = blogRepository.findAuthorFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("author", "Author", authors));

        // Date range facet
        List<FacetItem> dateRanges = blogRepository.findDateRangeFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("dateRange", "Date Range", dateRanges));

        // Tags facet
        List<FacetItem> tags = blogRepository.findTagFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("tags", "Tags", tags));

        return facets;
    }

    private List<SearchFacet> generateProjectFacets(SearchRequest request) {
        List<SearchFacet> facets = new ArrayList<>();

        // Technology facet
        List<FacetItem> technologies = projectRepository.findTechnologyFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("technology", "Technology", technologies));

        // Category facet
        List<FacetItem> categories = projectRepository.findCategoryFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("category", "Category", categories));

        // Status facet
        List<FacetItem> statuses = projectRepository.findStatusFacets(request.getQuery());
        facets.add(new SearchFacet("status", "Status", statuses));

        return facets;
    }

    private List<String> generateSuggestions(String query, String type) {
        // Implement suggestion algorithm
        // Could use Elasticsearch suggestions, Levenshtein distance, etc.
        List<String> suggestions = new ArrayList<>();

        if (query.length() >= 3) {
            // Get suggestions from cache or generate new ones
            String suggestionKey = "suggestions:" + type + ":" + query.toLowerCase();
            List<String> cachedSuggestions = (List<String>) redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(suggestionKey);

            if (cachedSuggestions != null) {
                return cachedSuggestions;
            }

            // Generate suggestions based on popular searches, content analysis, etc.
            suggestions = generateDynamicSuggestions(query, type);

            // Cache suggestions
            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(suggestionKey, suggestions, Duration.ofHours(1));
        }

        return suggestions;
    }

    private List<String> generateDynamicSuggestions(String query, String type) {
        // Implement dynamic suggestion generation
        return Arrays.asList(
            query + " tutorial",
            query + " guide",
            query + " example",
            "best " + query,
            query + " tips"
        );
    }

    private String generateCacheKey(SearchRequest request) {
        return SEARCH_CACHE_PREFIX +
               request.getType() + ":" +
               request.getQuery() + ":" +
               request.getPage() + ":" +
               request.getSize() + ":" +
               request.getSortBy() + ":" +
               request.getSortOrder() + ":" +
               request.getFilters().hashCode();
    }

    private SearchResult getCachedResult(String cacheKey) {
        return (SearchResult) redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(cacheKey);
    }

    private void cacheResult(String cacheKey, SearchResult result) {
        redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(cacheKey, result, Duration.ofSeconds(CACHE_TTL));
    }

    private Sort.Direction getSortDirection(String sortOrder) {
        return "desc".equalsIgnoreCase(sortOrder) ? Sort.Direction.DESC : Sort.Direction.ASC;
    }

    private List<SearchFacet> combineFacets(List<SearchFacet> facets1, List<SearchFacet> facets2) {
        Map<String, SearchFacet> combinedFacets = new HashMap<>();

        facets1.forEach(facet -> combinedFacets.put(facet.getKey(), facet));
        facets2.forEach(facet -> {
            if (combinedFacets.containsKey(facet.getKey())) {
                // Merge facet items
                SearchFacet existing = combinedFacets.get(facet.getKey());
                List<FacetItem> mergedItems = new ArrayList<>(existing.getItems());
                mergedItems.addAll(facet.getItems());
                combinedFacets.put(facet.getKey(),
                    new SearchFacet(facet.getKey(), facet.getLabel(), mergedItems));
            } else {
                combinedFacets.put(facet.getKey(), facet);
            }
        });

        return new ArrayList<>(combinedFacets.values());
    }

    // Auto-complete functionality
    public List<String> getAutocompleteSuggestions(String query, String type, int limit) {
        if (query.length() < 2) {
            return Collections.emptyList();
        }

        String cacheKey = "autocomplete:" + type + ":" + query.toLowerCase();
        List<String> cached = (List<String>) redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(cacheKey);

        if (cached != null) {
            return cached.stream().limit(limit).collect(Collectors.toList());
        }

        List<String> suggestions = new ArrayList<>();

        switch (type.toLowerCase()) {
            case "blog":
                suggestions = blogRepository.findTitleSuggestions(query, limit);
                break;
            case "project":
                suggestions = projectRepository.findTitleSuggestions(query, limit);
                break;
            case "all":
                suggestions.addAll(blogRepository.findTitleSuggestions(query, limit / 2));
                suggestions.addAll(projectRepository.findTitleSuggestions(query, limit / 2));
                break;
        }

        // Cache for 1 hour
        redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(cacheKey, suggestions, Duration.ofHours(1));

        return suggestions.stream().limit(limit).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    // Search analytics
    public void trackSearch(String query, String type, int resultsCount, String userId) {
        SearchAnalytics analytics = SearchAnalytics.builder()
            .query(query)
            .type(type)
            .resultsCount(resultsCount)
            .userId(userId)
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .build();

        // Save to database for analytics
        searchAnalyticsRepository.save(analytics);

        // Update popular searches cache
        updatePopularSearches(query, type);
    }

    private void updatePopularSearches(String query, String type) {
        String key = "popular_searches:" + type;
        redisTemplate.opsForZSet().incrementScore(key, query, 1);
        redisTemplate.expire(key, Duration.ofDays(7));
    }

    public List<String> getPopularSearches(String type, int limit) {
        String key = "popular_searches:" + type;
        Set<String> popular = redisTemplate.opsForZSet().reverseRange(key, 0, limit - 1);
        return new ArrayList<>(popular);
    }
}
```

**Ngày 193-196: Frontend Search Controller**
```javascript
// js/search/search-controller.js

class SearchController {
    constructor() {
        this.searchInput = document.getElementById('search-input');
        this.searchResults = document.getElementById('search-results');
        this.searchType = document.getElementById('search-type');
        this.searchFilters = document.getElementById('search-filters');
        this.searchSuggestions = document.getElementById('search-suggestions');
        this.searchStats = document.getElementById('search-stats');
        this.loadingIndicator = document.getElementById('search-loading');

        this.debounceTimer = null;
        this.currentQuery = '';
        this.currentPage = 0;
        this.currentFilters = {};
        this.isLoading = false;
        this.hasMoreResults = true;

        this.init();
    }

    init() {
        this.setupEventListeners();
        this.setupFilters();
        this.setupInfiniteScroll();
        this.setupKeyboardNavigation();
        this.loadPopularSearches();
    }

    setupEventListeners() {
        // Search input with debouncing
        this.searchInput?.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);
            this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                this.handleSearchInput(e.target.value);
            }, 300);
        });

        // Search type change
        this.searchType?.addEventListener('change', () => {
            this.resetSearch();
            this.performSearch(this.currentQuery);
        });

        // Enter key to search
        this.searchInput?.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                e.preventDefault();
                this.performSearch(e.target.value);
            }
        });

        // Clear search
        document.getElementById('clear-search')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            this.clearSearch();
        });

        // Voice search (if supported)
        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window) {
            this.setupVoiceSearch();
        }
    }

    setupFilters() {
        // Category filters
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-category').forEach(filter => {
            filter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.updateFilter('category', e.target.value, e.target.checked);
            });
        });

        // Date range filters
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-date').forEach(filter => {
            filter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.updateFilter('dateRange', e.target.value, e.target.checked);
            });
        });

        // Tag filters
        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-tag').forEach(filter => {
            filter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.updateFilter('tags', e.target.value, e.target.checked);
            });
        });

        // Sort options
        document.getElementById('search-sort')?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            this.updateSort(e.target.value);
        });

        // Clear all filters
        document.getElementById('clear-filters')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            this.clearFilters();
        });
    }

    setupInfiniteScroll() {
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting && this.hasMoreResults && !this.isLoading) {
                    this.loadMoreResults();
                }
            });
        }, {
            rootMargin: '100px'
        });

        const sentinel = document.getElementById('search-sentinel');
        if (sentinel) {
            observer.observe(sentinel);
        }
    }

    setupKeyboardNavigation() {
        let selectedIndex = -1;

        this.searchInput?.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            const suggestions = document.querySelectorAll('.search-suggestion');

            switch (e.key) {
                case 'ArrowDown':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    selectedIndex = Math.min(selectedIndex + 1, suggestions.length - 1);
                    this.highlightSuggestion(suggestions, selectedIndex);
                    break;

                case 'ArrowUp':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    selectedIndex = Math.max(selectedIndex - 1, -1);
                    this.highlightSuggestion(suggestions, selectedIndex);
                    break;

                case 'Enter':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (selectedIndex >= 0 && suggestions[selectedIndex]) {
                        const suggestion = suggestions[selectedIndex].textContent;
                        this.searchInput.value = suggestion;
                        this.performSearch(suggestion);
                        this.hideSuggestions();
                    } else {
                        this.performSearch(this.searchInput.value);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'Escape':
                    this.hideSuggestions();
                    selectedIndex = -1;
                    break;
            }
        });
    }

    setupVoiceSearch() {
        const recognition = new webkitSpeechRecognition();
        recognition.continuous = false;
```
