```javascript
        recognition.interimResults = false;
        recognition.lang = 'en-US';

        const voiceButton = document.getElementById('voice-search');
        if (voiceButton) {
            voiceButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                recognition.start();
                voiceButton.classList.add('listening');
            });

            recognition.onresult = (event) => {
                const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
                this.searchInput.value = transcript;
                this.performSearch(transcript);
                voiceButton.classList.remove('listening');
            };

            recognition.onerror = () => {
                voiceButton.classList.remove('listening');
            };
        }
    }

    async handleSearchInput(query) {
        this.currentQuery = query;

        if (query.length < 2) {
            this.hideSuggestions();
            this.clearResults();
            return;
        }

        // Show autocomplete suggestions
        await this.showAutocompleteSuggestions(query);

        // Perform search if query is substantial
        if (query.length >= 3) {
            this.resetSearch();
            await this.performSearch(query);
        }
    }

    async showAutocompleteSuggestions(query) {
        try {
            const type = this.searchType?.value || 'all';
            const response = await fetch(`/api/search/autocomplete?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&type=${type}&limit=5`);
            const suggestions = await response.json();

            this.displaySuggestions(suggestions);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to fetch suggestions:', error);
        }
    }

    displaySuggestions(suggestions) {
        if (!this.searchSuggestions || suggestions.length === 0) {
            this.hideSuggestions();
            return;
        }

        this.searchSuggestions.innerHTML = suggestions.map(suggestion => `
            <div class="search-suggestion" data-suggestion="${suggestion}">
                <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                <span>${this.highlightQuery(suggestion, this.currentQuery)}</span>
            </div>
        `).join('');

        // Add click handlers
        this.searchSuggestions.querySelectorAll('.search-suggestion').forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const suggestion = item.dataset.suggestion;
                this.searchInput.value = suggestion;
                this.performSearch(suggestion);
                this.hideSuggestions();
            });
        });

        this.searchSuggestions.style.display = 'block';
    }

    hideSuggestions() {
        if (this.searchSuggestions) {
            this.searchSuggestions.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    highlightSuggestion(suggestions, index) {
        suggestions.forEach((item, i) => {
            item.classList.toggle('highlighted', i === index);
        });
    }

    async performSearch(query, page = 0) {
        if (this.isLoading) return;

        this.isLoading = true;
        this.showLoading();

        try {
            const searchParams = {
                q: query,
                type: this.searchType?.value || 'all',
                page: page,
                size: 10,
                sortBy: this.getSortBy(),
                sortOrder: this.getSortOrder(),
                filters: this.currentFilters
            };

            const response = await fetch('/api/search', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(searchParams)
            });

            if (!response.ok) {
                throw new Error(`Search failed: ${response.status}`);
            }

            const data = await response.json();

            if (page === 0) {
                this.displayResults(data);
            } else {
                this.appendResults(data);
            }

            this.updateSearchStats(data);
            this.updateFilters(data.facets);
            this.hideSuggestions();

            // Track search analytics
            this.trackSearch(query, data.totalResults);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Search error:', error);
            this.showError('Search failed. Please try again.');
        } finally {
            this.isLoading = false;
            this.hideLoading();
        }
    }

    displayResults(data) {
        if (!this.searchResults) return;

        this.searchResults.innerHTML = '';

        if (data.items.length === 0) {
            this.showNoResults(data.query);
            return;
        }

        data.items.forEach(item => {
            const resultElement = this.createResultElement(item);
            this.searchResults.appendChild(resultElement);
        });

        this.hasMoreResults = data.currentPage < data.totalPages - 1;
        this.currentPage = data.currentPage;

        // Animate results
        this.animateResults();
    }

    appendResults(data) {
        if (!this.searchResults) return;

        data.items.forEach(item => {
            const resultElement = this.createResultElement(item);
            this.searchResults.appendChild(resultElement);
        });

        this.hasMoreResults = data.currentPage < data.totalPages - 1;
        this.currentPage = data.currentPage;

        // Animate new results
        this.animateNewResults();
    }

    createResultElement(item) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'search-result-item fade-in';

        const typeIcon = this.getTypeIcon(item.type);
        const formattedDate = this.formatDate(item.publishedDate);

        div.innerHTML = `
            <div class="result-header">
                <div class="result-type">
                    <i class="${typeIcon}"></i>
                    <span>${item.type}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="result-score">${Math.round(item.score * 100)}% match</div>
            </div>

            <div class="result-content">
                ${item.imageUrl ? `<img src="${item.imageUrl}" alt="${item.title}" class="result-image">` : ''}

                <div class="result-text">
                    <h3 class="result-title">
                        <a href="${item.url}">${this.highlightQuery(item.title, this.currentQuery)}</a>
                    </h3>

                    <p class="result-description">
                        ${this.highlightQuery(item.description, this.currentQuery)}
                    </p>

                    <div class="result-meta">
                        <span class="result-author">By ${item.author}</span>
                        <span class="result-date">${formattedDate}</span>
                        ${item.category ? `<span class="result-category">${item.category}</span>` : ''}
                    </div>

                    ${item.tags && item.tags.length > 0 ? `
                        <div class="result-tags">
                            ${item.tags.map(tag => `<span class="tag">${tag}</span>`).join('')}
                        </div>
                    ` : ''}
                </div>
            </div>
        `;

        return div;
    }

    highlightQuery(text, query) {
        if (!query || !text) return text;

        const regex = new RegExp(`(${query.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')})`, 'gi');
        return text.replace(regex, '<mark>$1</mark>');
    }

    getTypeIcon(type) {
        const icons = {
            blog: 'fas fa-blog',
            project: 'fas fa-code',
            user: 'fas fa-user',
            page: 'fas fa-file-alt'
        };
        return icons[type] || 'fas fa-search';
    }

    formatDate(dateString) {
        const date = new Date(dateString);
        return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
            year: 'numeric',
            month: 'short',
            day: 'numeric'
        });
    }

    updateSearchStats(data) {
        if (this.searchStats) {
            const stats = `Found ${data.totalResults.toLocaleString()} results in ${data.searchTime || 0}ms`;
            this.searchStats.textContent = stats;
        }
    }

    updateFilters(facets) {
        if (!facets || !this.searchFilters) return;

        facets.forEach(facet => {
            const filterGroup = this.searchFilters.querySelector(`[data-filter="${facet.key}"]`);
            if (filterGroup) {
                this.updateFilterGroup(filterGroup, facet);
            }
        });
    }

    updateFilterGroup(filterGroup, facet) {
        const filterList = filterGroup.querySelector('.filter-list');
        if (!filterList) return;

        filterList.innerHTML = facet.items.map(item => `
            <label class="filter-item">
                <input type="checkbox" value="${item.value}" ${this.isFilterSelected(facet.key, item.value) ? 'checked' : ''}>
                <span>${item.label}</span>
                <span class="filter-count">(${item.count})</span>
            </label>
        `).join('');

        // Add event listeners
        filterList.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(checkbox => {
            checkbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.updateFilter(facet.key, e.target.value, e.target.checked);
            });
        });
    }

    updateFilter(filterType, value, checked) {
        if (!this.currentFilters[filterType]) {
            this.currentFilters[filterType] = [];
        }

        if (checked) {
            if (!this.currentFilters[filterType].includes(value)) {
                this.currentFilters[filterType].push(value);
            }
        } else {
            this.currentFilters[filterType] = this.currentFilters[filterType].filter(v => v !== value);
            if (this.currentFilters[filterType].length === 0) {
                delete this.currentFilters[filterType];
            }
        }

        this.resetSearch();
        this.performSearch(this.currentQuery);
    }

    isFilterSelected(filterType, value) {
        return this.currentFilters[filterType] && this.currentFilters[filterType].includes(value);
    }

    clearFilters() {
        this.currentFilters = {};

        // Uncheck all filter checkboxes
        this.searchFilters?.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(checkbox => {
            checkbox.checked = false;
        });

        this.resetSearch();
        this.performSearch(this.currentQuery);
    }

    updateSort(sortValue) {
        this.resetSearch();
        this.performSearch(this.currentQuery);
    }

    getSortBy() {
        const sortSelect = document.getElementById('search-sort');
        const value = sortSelect?.value || 'relevance';
        return value.split('-')[0];
    }

    getSortOrder() {
        const sortSelect = document.getElementById('search-sort');
        const value = sortSelect?.value || 'relevance';
        return value.includes('-desc') ? 'desc' : 'asc';
    }

    async loadMoreResults() {
        if (this.hasMoreResults && !this.isLoading) {
            await this.performSearch(this.currentQuery, this.currentPage + 1);
        }
    }

    resetSearch() {
        this.currentPage = 0;
        this.hasMoreResults = true;
    }

    clearSearch() {
        this.searchInput.value = '';
        this.currentQuery = '';
        this.clearResults();
        this.hideSuggestions();
        this.clearFilters();
    }

    clearResults() {
        if (this.searchResults) {
            this.searchResults.innerHTML = '';
        }
        if (this.searchStats) {
            this.searchStats.textContent = '';
        }
    }

    showLoading() {
        if (this.loadingIndicator) {
            this.loadingIndicator.style.display = 'block';
        }
    }

    hideLoading() {
        if (this.loadingIndicator) {
            this.loadingIndicator.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    showError(message) {
        if (this.searchResults) {
            this.searchResults.innerHTML = `
                <div class="search-error">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
                    <p>${message}</p>
                </div>
            `;
        }
    }

    showNoResults(query) {
        if (this.searchResults) {
            this.searchResults.innerHTML = `
                <div class="no-results">
                    <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
                    <h3>No results found</h3>
                    <p>We couldn't find anything matching "${query}"</p>
                    <div class="search-suggestions">
                        <p>Try:</p>
                        <ul>
                            <li>Checking your spelling</li>
                            <li>Using different keywords</li>
                            <li>Using more general terms</li>
                            <li>Removing filters</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }
    }

    animateResults() {
        const items = this.searchResults.querySelectorAll('.search-result-item');
        items.forEach((item, index) => {
            item.style.animationDelay = `${index * 50}ms`;
            item.classList.add('animate-fade-in');
        });
    }

    animateNewResults() {
        const items = this.searchResults.querySelectorAll('.search-result-item:not(.animated)');
        items.forEach((item, index) => {
            item.style.animationDelay = `${index * 50}ms`;
            item.classList.add('animate-fade-in', 'animated');
        });
    }

    async loadPopularSearches() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/search/popular');
            const popularSearches = await response.json();

            this.displayPopularSearches(popularSearches);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to load popular searches:', error);
        }
    }

    displayPopularSearches(searches) {
        const container = document.getElementById('popular-searches');
        if (!container || searches.length === 0) return;

        container.innerHTML = `
            <h4>Popular Searches</h4>
            <div class="popular-search-tags">
                ${searches.map(search => `
                    <button class="popular-search-tag" data-search="${search}">
                        ${search}
                    </button>
                `).join('')}
            </div>
        `;

        // Add click handlers
        container.querySelectorAll('.popular-search-tag').forEach(tag => {
            tag.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const search = tag.dataset.search;
                this.searchInput.value = search;
                this.performSearch(search);
            });
        });
    }

    trackSearch(query, resultsCount) {
        // Track search analytics
        fetch('/api/analytics/search', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                query: query,
                type: this.searchType?.value || 'all',
                resultsCount: resultsCount,
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
            })
        }).catch(error => {
            console.error('Failed to track search:', error);
        });
    }
}

// Initialize search controller
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    window.searchController = new SearchController();
});
```

### **Tuần 29: Analytics & Tracking System**

**Ngày 197-199: Comprehensive Analytics Implementation**
```java
// AnalyticsService.java - Enhanced Analytics System
@Service
public class AnalyticsService {

    @Autowired
    private AnalyticsEventRepository analyticsEventRepository;

    @Autowired
    private UserSessionRepository userSessionRepository;

    @Autowired
    private PageViewRepository pageViewRepository;

    @Autowired
    private ConversionEventRepository conversionEventRepository;

    @Autowired
    private RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;

    @Autowired
    private MeterRegistry meterRegistry;

    @Value("${analytics.google.tracking-id}")
    private String googleTrackingId;

    @Value("${analytics.facebook.pixel-id}")
    private String facebookPixelId;

    private static final String ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX = "analytics:";

    // Page View Tracking
    public void trackPageView(PageViewEvent event) {
        // Save to database
        PageView pageView = PageView.builder()
            .url(event.getUrl())
            .title(event.getTitle())
            .referrer(event.getReferrer())
            .userAgent(event.getUserAgent())
            .ipAddress(event.getIpAddress())
            .userId(event.getUserId())
            .sessionId(event.getSessionId())
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .loadTime(event.getLoadTime())
            .build();

        pageViewRepository.save(pageView);

        // Update real-time metrics
        updateRealTimeMetrics("page_view", event);

        // Track in external services
        trackExternalPageView(event);

        // Update popular pages cache
        updatePopularPages(event.getUrl());
    }

    // Custom Event Tracking
    public void trackEvent(String eventName, Map<String, Object> properties, String userId, String sessionId) {
        AnalyticsEvent event = AnalyticsEvent.builder()
            .eventName(eventName)
            .properties(properties)
            .userId(userId)
            .sessionId(sessionId)
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .build();

        analyticsEventRepository.save(event);

        // Update metrics
        meterRegistry.counter("custom.events", "event", eventName).increment();

        // Track conversion events
        if (isConversionEvent(eventName)) {
            trackConversion(eventName, properties, userId);
        }

        // Update real-time dashboard
        updateRealTimeMetrics(eventName, properties);
    }

    // User Behavior Tracking
    public void trackUserBehavior(UserBehaviorEvent event) {
        Map<String, Object> properties = Map.of(
            "action", event.getAction(),
            "element", event.getElement(),
            "page", event.getPage(),
            "duration", event.getDuration(),
            "scrollDepth", event.getScrollDepth()
        );

        trackEvent("user_behavior", properties, event.getUserId(), event.getSessionId());

        // Update user engagement metrics
        updateUserEngagement(event);
    }

    // Conversion Tracking
    public void trackConversion(String conversionType, Map<String, Object> properties, String userId) {
        ConversionEvent conversion = ConversionEvent.builder()
            .conversionType(conversionType)
            .properties(properties)
            .userId(userId)
            .value(getConversionValue(properties))
            .timestamp(LocalDateTime.now())
            .build();

        conversionEventRepository.save(conversion);

        // Update conversion metrics
        meterRegistry.counter("conversions", "type", conversionType).increment();

        // Track revenue if applicable
        if (properties.containsKey("revenue")) {
            Double revenue = (Double) properties.get("revenue");
            meterRegistry.gauge("revenue.total", revenue);
        }
    }

    // E-commerce Tracking
    public void trackPurchase(PurchaseEvent event) {
        Map<String, Object> properties = Map.of(
            "orderId", event.getOrderId(),
            "revenue", event.getRevenue(),
            "currency", event.getCurrency(),
            "items", event.getItems(),
            "paymentMethod", event.getPaymentMethod()
        );

        trackConversion("purchase", properties, event.getUserId());

        // Track individual items
        event.getItems().forEach(item -> {
            trackEvent("item_purchase", Map.of(
                "itemId", item.getId(),
                "itemName", item.getName(),
                "category", item.getCategory(),
                "price", item.getPrice(),
                "quantity", item.getQuantity()
            ), event.getUserId(), event.getSessionId());
        });

        // Update e-commerce metrics
        updateEcommerceMetrics(event);
    }

    // Session Tracking
    public void startSession(String sessionId, String userId, String userAgent, String ipAddress) {
        UserSession session = UserSession.builder()
            .sessionId(sessionId)
            .userId(userId)
            .userAgent(userAgent)
            .ipAddress(ipAddress)
            .startTime(LocalDateTime.now())
            .isActive(true)
            .build();

        userSessionRepository.save(session);

        // Update active users count
        updateActiveUsers(userId);
    }

    public void endSession(String sessionId) {
        userSessionRepository.findBySessionId(sessionId).ifPresent(session -> {
            session.setEndTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            session.setIsActive(false);
            session.setDuration(Duration.between(session.getStartTime(), session.getEndTime()));

            userSessionRepository.save(session);

            // Track session metrics
            meterRegistry.timer("session.duration").record(session.getDuration());
        });
    }

    // Real-time Analytics
    private void updateRealTimeMetrics(String eventType, Object eventData) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "realtime:" + eventType;

        // Increment event count
        redisTemplate.opsForValue().increment(key);
        redisTemplate.expire(key, Duration.ofMinutes(5));

        // Update real-time dashboard data
        Map<String, Object> realtimeData = Map.of(
            "eventType", eventType,
            "timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis(),
            "data", eventData
        );

        redisTemplate.opsForList().leftPush(ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "realtime:events", realtimeData);
        redisTemplate.opsForList().trim(ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "realtime:events", 0, 99); // Keep last 100 events
    }

    private void updateActiveUsers(String userId) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "active_users";
        redisTemplate.opsForSet().add(key, userId);
        redisTemplate.expire(key, Duration.ofMinutes(30));
    }

    private void updatePopularPages(String url) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "popular_pages";
        redisTemplate.opsForZSet().incrementScore(key, url, 1);
        redisTemplate.expire(key, Duration.ofDays(1));
    }

    private void updateUserEngagement(UserBehaviorEvent event) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "engagement:" + event.getUserId();

        Map<String, Object> engagement = Map.of(
            "scrollDepth", event.getScrollDepth(),
            "timeOnPage", event.getDuration(),
            "interactions", event.getInteractionCount(),
            "timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis()
        );

        redisTemplate.opsForHash().putAll(key, engagement);
        redisTemplate.expire(key, Duration.ofHours(24));
    }

    private void updateEcommerceMetrics(PurchaseEvent event) {
        // Daily revenue
        String revenueKey = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "revenue:" + LocalDate.now();
        redisTemplate.opsForValue().increment(revenueKey, event.getRevenue());
        redisTemplate.expire(revenueKey, Duration.ofDays(30));

        // Product performance
        event.getItems().forEach(item -> {
            String productKey = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "product:" + item.getId();
            redisTemplate.opsForHash().increment(productKey, "sales", 1);
            redisTemplate.opsForHash().increment(productKey, "revenue", item.getPrice() * item.getQuantity());
            redisTemplate.expire(productKey, Duration.ofDays(30));
        });
    }

    // Analytics Reports
    public AnalyticsReport generateReport(AnalyticsReportRequest request) {
        LocalDateTime startDate = request.getStartDate();
        LocalDateTime endDate = request.getEndDate();

        return AnalyticsReport.builder()
            .period(request.getPeriod())
            .startDate(startDate)
            .endDate(endDate)
            .pageViews(getPageViewStats(startDate, endDate))
            .uniqueVisitors(getUniqueVisitorStats(startDate, endDate))
            .userEngagement(getUserEngagementStats(startDate, endDate))
            .topPages(getTopPages(startDate, endDate, 10))
            .topReferrers(getTopReferrers(startDate, endDate, 10))
            .deviceStats(getDeviceStats(startDate, endDate))
            .locationStats(getLocationStats(startDate, endDate))
            .conversionStats(getConversionStats(startDate, endDate))
            .revenueStats(getRevenueStats(startDate, endDate))
            .build();
    }

    private PageViewStats getPageViewStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long totalViews = pageViewRepository.countByTimestampBetween(start, end);
        List<DailyStats> dailyStats = pageViewRepository.getDailyPageViews(start, end);

        return PageViewStats.builder()
            .totalViews(totalViews)
            .dailyStats(dailyStats)
            .averagePerDay(totalViews / ChronoUnit.DAYS.between(start, end))
            .build();
    }

    private UniqueVisitorStats getUniqueVisitorStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long uniqueVisitors = pageViewRepository.countUniqueVisitorsByTimestampBetween(start, end);
        List<DailyStats> dailyStats = pageViewRepository.getDailyUniqueVisitors(start, end);

        return UniqueVisitorStats.builder()
            .totalUniqueVisitors(uniqueVisitors)
            .dailyStats(dailyStats)
            .averagePerDay(uniqueVisitors / ChronoUnit.DAYS.between(start, end))
            .build();
    }

    private UserEngagementStats getUserEngagementStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Double averageSessionDuration = userSessionRepository.getAverageSessionDuration(start, end);
        Double bounceRate = calculateBounceRate(start, end);
        Double pagesPerSession = calculatePagesPerSession(start, end);

        return UserEngagementStats.builder()
            .averageSessionDuration(averageSessionDuration)
            .bounceRate(bounceRate)
            .pagesPerSession(pagesPerSession)
            .build();
    }

    private List<TopPageStats> getTopPages(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int limit) {
        return pageViewRepository.getTopPages(start, end, PageRequest.of(0, limit));
    }

    private List<ReferrerStats> getTopReferrers(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int limit) {
        return pageViewRepository.getTopReferrers(start, end, PageRequest.of(0, limit));
    }

    private DeviceStats getDeviceStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        return pageViewRepository.getDeviceStats(start, end);
    }

    private LocationStats getLocationStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        return pageViewRepository.getLocationStats(start, end);
    }

    private ConversionStats getConversionStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long totalConversions = conversionEventRepository.countByTimestampBetween(start, end);
        List<ConversionTypeStats> byType = conversionEventRepository.getConversionsByType(start, end);

        return ConversionStats.builder()
            .totalConversions(totalConversions)
            .conversionsByType(byType)
            .conversionRate(calculateConversionRate(start, end))
            .build();
    }

    private RevenueStats getRevenueStats(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Double totalRevenue = conversionEventRepository.getTotalRevenue(start, end);
        List<DailyRevenueStats> dailyRevenue = conversionEventRepository.getDailyRevenue(start, end);

        return RevenueStats.builder()
            .totalRevenue(totalRevenue)
            .dailyRevenue(dailyRevenue)
            .averageOrderValue(calculateAverageOrderValue(start, end))
            .build();
    }

    // Real-time Dashboard Data
    public RealTimeDashboard getRealTimeDashboard() {
        return RealTimeDashboard.builder()
            .activeUsers(getActiveUsersCount())
            .currentPageViews(getCurrentPageViews())
            .recentEvents(getRecentEvents(20))
            .topActivePages(getTopActivePages(10))
            .realtimeConversions(getRealtimeConversions())
            .systemHealth(getSystemHealth())
            .build();
    }

    private Long getActiveUsersCount() {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "active_users";
        return redisTemplate.opsForSet().size(key);
    }

    private Long getCurrentPageViews() {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "realtime:page_view";
        String count = (String) redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);
        return count != null ? Long.parseLong(count) : 0L;
    }

    private List<RealtimeEvent> getRecentEvents(int limit) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "realtime:events";
        List<Object> events = redisTemplate.opsForList().range(key, 0, limit - 1);

        return events.stream()
            .map(event -> (Map<String, Object>) event)
            .map(this::mapToRealtimeEvent)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    private List<TopPageStats> getTopActivePages(int limit) {
        String key = ANALYTICS_CACHE_PREFIX + "popular_pages";
        Set<ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<Object>> pages = redisTemplate.opsForZSet().reverseRangeWithScores(key, 0, limit - 1);

        return pages.stream()
            .map(page -> TopPageStats.builder()
                .url((String) page.getValue())
                .views(page.getScore().longValue())
                .build())
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    // External Service Integration
    private void trackExternalPageView(PageViewEvent event) {
        // Google Analytics
        if (googleTrackingId != null) {
            trackGoogleAnalytics(event);
        }

        // Facebook Pixel
        if (facebookPixelId != null) {
            trackFacebookPixel(event);
        }
    }

    private void trackGoogleAnalytics(PageViewEvent event) {
        // Implementation for Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol
        Map<String, Object> payload = Map.of(
            "client_id", event.getSessionId(),
            "events", List.of(Map.of(
                "name", "page_view",
                "params", Map.of(
                    "page_title", event.getTitle(),
                    "page_location", event.getUrl(),
                    "user_id", event.getUserId()
                )
            ))
        );

        // Send to GA4 via HTTP
        sendToGA4(payload);
    }

    private void trackFacebookPixel(PageViewEvent event) {
        // Implementation for Facebook Conversions API
        Map<String, Object> payload = Map.of(
            "data", List.of(Map.of(
                "event_name", "PageView",
                "event_time", System.currentTimeMillis() / 1000,
                "action_source", "website",
                "event_source_url", event.getUrl(),
                "user_data", Map.of(
                    "client_ip_address", event.getIpAddress(),
                    "client_user_agent", event.getUserAgent()
                )
            ))
        );

        // Send to Facebook
        sendToFacebook(payload);
    }

    // Helper Methods
    private boolean isConversionEvent(String eventName) {
        List<String> conversionEvents = Arrays.asList(
            "purchase", "signup", "subscribe", "download", "contact_form_submit"
        );
        return conversionEvents.contains(eventName);
    }

    private Double getConversionValue(Map<String, Object> properties) {
        return properties.containsKey("value") ? (Double) properties.get("value") : 0.0;
    }

    private Double calculateBounceRate(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long totalSessions = userSessionRepository.countByStartTimeBetween(start, end);
        Long bouncedSessions = userSessionRepository.countBouncedSessions(start, end);

        return totalSessions > 0 ? (double) bouncedSessions / totalSessions * 100 : 0.0;
    }

    private Double calculatePagesPerSession(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long totalPageViews = pageViewRepository.countByTimestampBetween(start, end);
        Long totalSessions = userSessionRepository.countByStartTimeBetween(start, end);

        return totalSessions > 0 ? (double) totalPageViews / totalSessions : 0.0;
    }

    private Double calculateConversionRate(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Long totalVisitors = pageViewRepository.countUniqueVisitorsByTimestampBetween(start, end);
        Long totalConversions = conversionEventRepository.countByTimestampBetween(start, end);

        return totalVisitors > 0 ? (double) totalConversions / totalVisitors * 100 : 0.0;
    }

    private Double calculateAverageOrderValue(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        Double totalRevenue = conversionEventRepository.getTotalRevenue(start, end);
        Long totalOrders = conversionEventRepository.countPurchasesByTimestampBetween(start, end);

        return totalOrders > 0 ? totalRevenue / totalOrders : 0.0;
    }

    private RealtimeEvent mapToRealtimeEvent(Map<String, Object> eventData) {
        return RealtimeEvent.builder()
            .eventType((String) eventData.get("eventType"))
            .timestamp((Long) eventData.get("timestamp"))
            .data(eventData.get("data"))
            .build();
    }

    private void sendToGA4(Map<String, Object> payload) {
        // Async implementation to send data to Google Analytics 4
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                // HTTP client implementation
                RestTemplate restTemplate = new RestTemplate();
                String url = "https://www.google-analytics.com/mp/collect?measurement_id=" + googleTrackingId + "&api_secret=" + getGA4ApiSecret();

                HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();
                headers.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON);

                HttpEntity<Map<String, Object>> request = new HttpEntity<>(payload, headers);
                restTemplate.postForEntity(url, request, String.class);

            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("Failed to send data to Google Analytics", e);
            }
        });
    }

    private void sendToFacebook(Map<String, Object> payload) {
        // Async implementation to send data to Facebook Conversions API
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                RestTemplate restTemplate = new RestTemplate();
                String url = "https://graph.facebook.com/v18.0/" + facebookPixelId + "/events";

                HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();
                headers.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON);
                headers.setBearerAuth(getFacebookAccessToken());

                HttpEntity<Map<String, Object>> request = new HttpEntity<>(payload, headers);
                restTemplate.postForEntity(url, request, String.class);

            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("Failed to send data to Facebook", e);
            }
        });
    }
}
```

**Ngày 200-203: Frontend Analytics Tracking**
```javascript
// js/analytics/analytics-tracker.js - Complete Analytics Implementation
class AnalyticsTracker {
    constructor() {
        this.sessionId = this.generateSessionId();
        this.userId = this.getUserId();
        this.startTime = Date.now();
        this.pageStartTime = Date.now();
        this.scrollDepth = 0;
        this.maxScrollDepth = 0;
        this.interactions = 0;
        this.events = [];

        this.init();
    }

    init() {
        this.trackPageView();
        this.setupEventTracking();
        this.setupPerformanceTracking();
        this.setupUserBehaviorTracking();
        this.setupEcommerceTracking();
        this.setupHeatmapTracking();
        this.setupErrorTracking();
        this.setupFormTracking();
        this.setupVideoTracking();
        this.setupDownloadTracking();
        this.setupExternalLinkTracking();
        this.setupSocialMediaTracking();

        // Send events periodically
        this.startEventBatching();

        // Track session end
        this.setupSessionTracking();
    }

    // Core Tracking Methods
    trackPageView() {
        const pageData = {
            url: window.location.href,
            path: window.location.pathname,
            title: document.title,
            referrer: document.referrer,
            userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
            screenResolution: `${screen.width}x${screen.height}`,
            viewportSize: `${window.innerWidth}x${window.innerHeight}`,
            language: navigator.language,
            timezone: Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone,
            sessionId: this.sessionId,
            userId: this.userId,
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
            loadTime: this.getPageLoadTime()
        };

        this.sendEvent('page_view', pageData);

        // Track to external services
        this.trackGoogleAnalytics('page_view', pageData);
        this.trackFacebookPixel('PageView', pageData);
    }

    trackEvent(eventName, properties = {}) {
        const eventData = {
            event: eventName,
            sessionId: this.sessionId,
            userId: this.userId,
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
            page: window.location.pathname,
            ...properties
        };

        this.sendEvent(eventName, eventData);

        // Track to external services for important events
        if (this.isImportantEvent(eventName)) {
            this.trackGoogleAnalytics(eventName, eventData);
            this.trackFacebookPixel(eventName, eventData);
        }
    }

    // User Behavior Tracking
    setupUserBehaviorTracking() {
        // Scroll tracking
        let scrollTimer;
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            clearTimeout(scrollTimer);
            scrollTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                this.trackScrollDepth();
            }, 100);
        });

        // Click tracking
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            this.trackClick(e);
        });

        // Mouse movement heatmap
        this.setupMouseTracking();

        // Time on page
        this.trackTimeOnPage();

        // Rage clicks detection
        this.setupRageClickDetection();

        // Dead clicks detection
        this.setupDeadClickDetection();
    }

    trackScrollDepth() {
        const scrollPercent = Math.round(
            (window.scrollY / (document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100
        );

        if (scrollPercent > this.maxScrollDepth) {
            this.maxScrollDepth = scrollPercent;

            // Track milestone scrolls
            const milestones = [25, 50, 75, 90, 100];
            milestones.forEach(milestone => {
                if (scrollPercent >= milestone && this.scrollDepth < milestone) {
                    this.trackEvent('scroll_depth', {
                        depth: milestone,
                        page: window.location.pathname
                    });
                }
            });

            this.scrollDepth = scrollPercent;
        }
    }

    trackClick(event) {
        const element = event.target;
        const clickData = {
            elementType: element.tagName.toLowerCase(),
            elementId: element.id,
            elementClass: element.className,
            elementText: element.textContent?.trim().substring(0, 100),
            href: element.href,
            position: {
                x: event.clientX,
                y: event.clientY
            },
            viewport: {
                width: window.innerWidth,
                height: window.innerHeight
            }
        };

        this.trackEvent('click', clickData);
        this.interactions++;

        // Track specific element types
        if (element.matches('button, .btn')) {
            this.trackEvent('button_click', {
                buttonText: element.textContent?.trim(),
                buttonType: element.type,
                ...clickData
            });
        }

        if (element.matches('a')) {
            this.trackEvent('link_click', {
                linkText: element.textContent?.trim(),
                linkUrl: element.href,
                isExternal: this.isExternalLink(element.href),
                ...clickData
            });
        }
    }

    // E-commerce Tracking
    setupEcommerceTracking() {
        // Track add to cart
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.matches('.add-to-cart, [data-action="add-to-cart"]')) {
                this.trackAddToCart(e.target);
            }
        });

        // Track remove from cart
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target.matches('.remove-from-cart, [data-action="remove-from-cart"]')) {
                this.trackRemoveFromCart(e.target);
            }
        });

        // Track purchase
        if (window.location.pathname.includes('/checkout/success')) {
            this.trackPurchase();
        }
    }

    trackAddToCart(element) {
        const productData = this.extractProductData(element);

        this.trackEvent('add_to_cart', {
            item_id: productData.id,
            item_name: productData.name,
            item_category: productData.category,
            price: productData.price,
            quantity: productData.quantity || 1,
            currency: 'USD'
        });

        // Track to external services
        this.trackGoogleAnalytics('add_to_cart', {
            currency: 'USD',
            value: productData.price,
            items: [productData]
        });

        this.trackFacebookPixel('AddToCart', {
            content_ids: [productData.id],
            content_type: 'product',
            value: productData.price,
            currency: 'USD'
        });
    }

    trackPurchase() {
        const orderData = this.extractOrderData();

        this.trackEvent('purchase', {
            transaction_id: orderData.orderId,
            value: orderData.total,
            currency: orderData.currency,
            items: orderData.items,
            payment_method: orderData.paymentMethod
        });

        // Track to external services
        this.trackGoogleAnalytics('purchase', {
            transaction_id: orderData.orderId,
            value: orderData.total,
            currency: orderData.currency,
            items: orderData.items
        });

        this.trackFacebookPixel('Purchase', {
            content_ids: orderData.items.map(item => item.id),
            content_type: 'product',
            value: orderData.total,
            currency: orderData.currency
        });
    }

    // Form Tracking
    setupFormTracking() {
        document.querySelectorAll('form').forEach(form => {
            this.trackFormInteraction(form);
        });
    }

    trackFormInteraction(form) {
        const formId = form.id || form.className || 'unknown';
        let formStarted = false;

        // Track form start
        form.addEventListener('focusin', () => {
            if (!formStarted) {
                formStarted = true;
                this.trackEvent('form_start', {
                    form_id: formId,
                    form_action: form.action,
                    form_method: form.method
                });
            }
        });

        // Track form submission
        form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
            const formData = new FormData(form);
            const fields = {};

            for (let [key, value] of formData.entries()) {
                // Don't track sensitive data
                if (!this.isSensitiveField(key)) {
                    fields[key] = typeof value === 'string' ? value.length : 'file';
                }
            }

            this.trackEvent('form_submit', {
                form_id: formId,
                form_action: form.action,
                fields: Object.keys(fields),
                field_count: Object.keys(fields).length
            });
        });

        // Track form abandonment
        let formTouched = false;
        form.addEventListener('input', () => {
            formTouched = true;
        });

        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
            if (formTouched && formStarted) {
                this.trackEvent('form_abandon', {
                    form_id: formId
                });
            }
        });
    }

    // Performance Tracking
    setupPerformanceTracking() {
        if ('performance' in window) {
            window.addEventListener('load', () => {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    this.trackPerformanceMetrics();
                }, 0);
            });
        }

        // Track Core Web Vitals
        this.trackCoreWebVitals();
    }

    trackPerformanceMetrics() {
        const perfData = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];

        if (perfData) {
            const metrics = {
                dns_lookup: perfData.domainLookupEnd - perfData.domainLookupStart,
                tcp_connect: perfData.connectEnd - perfData.connectStart,
                ssl_negotiation: perfData.secureConnectionStart > 0 ?
                    perfData.connectEnd - perfData.secureConnectionStart : 0,
                ttfb: perfData.responseStart - perfData.requestStart,
                download: perfData.responseEnd - perfData.responseStart,
                dom_processing: perfData.domContentLoadedEventEnd - perfData.responseEnd,
                load_complete: perfData.loadEventEnd - perfData.loadEventStart,
                total_load_time: perfData.loadEventEnd - perfData.navigationStart
            };

            this.trackEvent('performance', metrics);
        }
    }

    trackCoreWebVitals() {
        // Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
        new PerformanceObserver((entryList) => {
            const entries = entryList.getEntries();
            const lastEntry = entries[entries.length - 1];

            this.trackEvent('core_web_vitals', {
                metric: 'LCP',
                value: lastEntry.startTime,
                rating: this.getLCPRating(lastEntry.startTime)
            });
        }).observe({ entryTypes: ['largest-contentful-paint'] });

        // First Input Delay (FID)
        new PerformanceObserver((entryList) => {
            const firstInput = entryList.getEntries()[0];

            this.trackEvent('core_web_vitals', {
                metric: 'FID',
                value: firstInput.processingStart - firstInput.startTime,
                rating: this.getFIDRating(firstInput.processingStart - firstInput.startTime)
            });
        }).observe({ entryTypes: ['first-input'] });

        // Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
        let clsValue = 0;
        new PerformanceObserver((entryList) => {
            for (const entry of entryList.getEntries()) {
                if (!entry.hadRecentInput) {
                    clsValue += entry.value;
                }
            }

            this.trackEvent('core_web_vitals', {
                metric: 'CLS',
                value: clsValue,
                rating: this.getCLSRating(clsValue)
            });
        }).observe({ entryTypes: ['layout-shift'] });
    }

    // Error Tracking
    setupErrorTracking() {
        window.addEventListener('error', (e) => {
            this.trackError({
                type: 'javascript_error',
                message: e.message,
                filename: e.filename,
                line: e.lineno,
                column: e.colno,
                stack: e.error?.stack,
                userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
                url: window.location.href
            });
        });

        window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e) => {
            this.trackError({
                type: 'promise_rejection',
                message: e.reason?.message || 'Unhandled promise rejection',
                stack: e.reason?.stack,
                userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
                url: window.location.href
            });
        });
    }

    trackError(errorData) {
        this.trackEvent('error', errorData);

        // Send immediately for errors
        this.sendEventImmediately('error', errorData);
    }

    // External Service Integration
    trackGoogleAnalytics(eventName, eventData) {
        if (typeof gtag !== 'undefined') {
            gtag('event', eventName, eventData);
        }
    }

    trackFacebookPixel(eventName, eventData) {
        if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
            fbq('track', eventName, eventData);
        }
    }

    // Utility Methods
    generateSessionId() {
        return 'session_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
    }

    getUserId() {
        // Get from localStorage, cookie, or generate anonymous ID
        let userId = localStorage.getItem('analytics_user_id');
        if (!userId) {
            userId = 'user_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
            localStorage.setItem('analytics_user_id', userId);
        }
        return userId;
    }

    getPageLoadTime() {
        if ('performance' in window && performance.timing) {
            return performance.timing.loadEventEnd - performance.timing.navigationStart;
        }
        return null;
    }

    isImportantEvent(eventName) {
        const importantEvents = [
            'purchase', 'signup', 'login', 'add_to_cart', 'form_submit',
            'download', 'video_play', 'error'
        ];
        return importantEvents.includes(eventName);
    }

    isSensitiveField(fieldName) {
        const sensitiveFields = [
            'password', 'credit_card', 'ssn', 'social_security',
            'card_number', 'cvv', 'pin'
        ];
        return sensitiveFields.some(field =>
            fieldName.toLowerCase().includes(field)
        );
    }

    isExternalLink(url) {
        return url && !url.startsWith(window.location.origin);
    }

    // Event Batching
    startEventBatching() {
        setInterval(() => {
            if (this.events.length > 0) {
                this.sendEventBatch();
            }
        }, 5000); // Send every 5 seconds
    }

    sendEvent(eventName, eventData) {
        this.events.push({
            eventName,
            eventData,
            timestamp: Date.now()
        });

        // Send immediately for critical events
        if (this.isCriticalEvent(eventName)) {
            this.sendEventImmediately(eventName, eventData);
        }
    }

    sendEventBatch() {
        if (this.events.length === 0) return;

        const batch = [...this.events];
        this.events = [];

        fetch('/api/analytics/batch', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                sessionId: this.sessionId,
                userId: this.userId,
                events: batch
            })
        }).catch(error => {
            console.error('Failed to send analytics batch:', error);
            // Re-add events to queue for retry
            this.events.unshift(...batch);
        });
    }

    sendEventImmediately(eventName, eventData) {
        fetch('/api/analytics/track', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                eventName,
                eventData,
                sessionId: this.sessionId,
                userId: this.userId
            })
        }).catch(error => {
            console.error('Failed to send analytics event:', error);
        });
    }

    isCriticalEvent(eventName) {
        return ['error', 'purchase', 'signup'].includes(eventName);
    }

    // Core Web Vitals Rating
    getLCPRating(value) {
        if (value <= 2500) return 'good';
        if (value <= 4000) return 'needs_improvement';
        return 'poor';
    }

    getFIDRating(value) {
        if (value <= 100) return 'good';
        if (value <= 300) return 'needs_improvement';
        return 'poor';
    }

    getCLSRating(value) {
        if (value <= 0.1) return 'good';
        if (value <= 0.25) return 'needs_improvement';
        return 'poor';
    }
}

// Initialize analytics
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    window.analyticsTracker = new AnalyticsTracker();
});

// Export for use in other modules
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
    module.exports = AnalyticsTracker;
}
```

**Ngày 204-206: Enterprise Design Patterns**
```java
// 1. FACTORY PATTERN - Object Creation
@Component
public class ServiceFactory {

    @Autowired
    private ApplicationContext context;

    public <T> T createService(Class<T> serviceType, String implementation) {
        switch (implementation.toLowerCase()) {
            case "email":
                return serviceType.cast(context.getBean(EmailNotificationService.class));
            case "sms":
                return serviceType.cast(context.getBean(SmsNotificationService.class));
            case "push":
                return serviceType.cast(context.getBean(PushNotificationService.class));
            default:
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown service implementation: " + implementation);
        }
    }
}

// 2. BUILDER PATTERN - Complex Object Construction
@Component
public class QueryBuilder {

    private StringBuilder query;
    private List<String> conditions;
    private List<String> joins;
    private String orderBy;
    private Integer limit;

    public QueryBuilder() {
        this.query = new StringBuilder();
        this.conditions = new ArrayList<>();
        this.joins = new ArrayList<>();
    }

    public QueryBuilder select(String... fields) {
        query.append("SELECT ").append(String.join(", ", fields));
        return this;
    }

    public QueryBuilder from(String table) {
        query.append(" FROM ").append(table);
        return this;
    }

    public QueryBuilder where(String condition) {
        conditions.add(condition);
        return this;
    }

    public QueryBuilder join(String joinClause) {
        joins.add(joinClause);
        return this;
    }

    public QueryBuilder orderBy(String field, String direction) {
        this.orderBy = field + " " + direction;
        return this;
    }

    public QueryBuilder limit(int limit) {
        this.limit = limit;
        return this;
    }

    public String build() {
        StringBuilder finalQuery = new StringBuilder(query);

        // Add joins
        joins.forEach(join -> finalQuery.append(" ").append(join));

        // Add conditions
        if (!conditions.isEmpty()) {
            finalQuery.append(" WHERE ").append(String.join(" AND ", conditions));
        }

        // Add order by
        if (orderBy != null) {
            finalQuery.append(" ORDER BY ").append(orderBy);
        }

        // Add limit
        if (limit != null) {
            finalQuery.append(" LIMIT ").append(limit);
        }

        return finalQuery.toString();
    }
}

// 3. OBSERVER PATTERN - Event Handling
public interface EventObserver<T> {
    void onEvent(T event);
    boolean supports(Class<?> eventType);
}

@Component
public class EventPublisher {

    private final List<EventObserver<?>> observers = new ArrayList<>();

    public void registerObserver(EventObserver<?> observer) {
        observers.add(observer);
    }

    public void removeObserver(EventObserver<?> observer) {
        observers.remove(observer);
    }

    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    public <T> void publishEvent(T event) {
        observers.stream()
            .filter(observer -> observer.supports(event.getClass()))
            .forEach(observer -> ((EventObserver<T>) observer).onEvent(event));
    }
}

@Component
public class UserRegistrationObserver implements EventObserver<UserRegisteredEvent> {

    @Autowired
    private EmailService emailService;

    @Autowired
    private AnalyticsService analyticsService;

    @Override
    public void onEvent(UserRegisteredEvent event) {
        // Send welcome email
        emailService.sendWelcomeEmail(event.getUser());

        // Track registration
        analyticsService.trackEvent("user_registered", Map.of(
            "userId", event.getUser().getId(),
            "registrationMethod", event.getRegistrationMethod()
        ));

        // Log event
        log.info("User registered: {}", event.getUser().getEmail());
    }

    @Override
    public boolean supports(Class<?> eventType) {
        return UserRegisteredEvent.class.isAssignableFrom(eventType);
    }
}

// 4. STRATEGY PATTERN - Algorithm Selection
public interface PaymentStrategy {
    PaymentResult processPayment(PaymentRequest request);
    boolean supports(PaymentMethod method);
}

@Component
public class CreditCardPaymentStrategy implements PaymentStrategy {

    @Override
    public PaymentResult processPayment(PaymentRequest request) {
        // Credit card processing logic
        return PaymentResult.builder()
            .success(true)
            .transactionId(generateTransactionId())
            .message("Payment processed successfully")
            .build();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean supports(PaymentMethod method) {
        return method == PaymentMethod.CREDIT_CARD;
    }
}

@Component
public class PayPalPaymentStrategy implements PaymentStrategy {

    @Override
    public PaymentResult processPayment(PaymentRequest request) {
        // PayPal processing logic
        return PaymentResult.builder()
            .success(true)
            .transactionId(generatePayPalTransactionId())
            .message("PayPal payment processed successfully")
            .build();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean supports(PaymentMethod method) {
        return method == PaymentMethod.PAYPAL;
    }
}

@Service
public class PaymentService {

    private final List<PaymentStrategy> strategies;

    public PaymentService(List<PaymentStrategy> strategies) {
        this.strategies = strategies;
    }

    public PaymentResult processPayment(PaymentRequest request) {
        PaymentStrategy strategy = strategies.stream()
            .filter(s -> s.supports(request.getPaymentMethod()))
            .findFirst()
            .orElseThrow(() -> new UnsupportedPaymentMethodException(
                "No strategy found for payment method: " + request.getPaymentMethod()
            ));

        return strategy.processPayment(request);
    }
}

// 5. COMMAND PATTERN - Action Encapsulation
public interface Command {
    void execute();
    void undo();
    String getDescription();
}

@Component
public class CreateUserCommand implements Command {

    private final UserService userService;
    private final User user;
    private Long createdUserId;

    public CreateUserCommand(UserService userService, User user) {
        this.userService = userService;
        this.user = user;
    }

    @Override
    public void execute() {
        User createdUser = userService.createUser(user);
        this.createdUserId = createdUser.getId();
    }

    @Override
    public void undo() {
        if (createdUserId != null) {
            userService.deleteUser(createdUserId);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public String getDescription() {
        return "Create user: " + user.getEmail();
    }
}

@Service
public class CommandExecutor {

    private final Stack<Command> executedCommands = new Stack<>();

    public void execute(Command command) {
        try {
            command.execute();
            executedCommands.push(command);
            log.info("Executed command: {}", command.getDescription());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to execute command: {}", command.getDescription(), e);
            throw new CommandExecutionException("Command execution failed", e);
        }
    }

    public void undo() {
        if (!executedCommands.isEmpty()) {
            Command lastCommand = executedCommands.pop();
            try {
                lastCommand.undo();
                log.info("Undid command: {}", lastCommand.getDescription());
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("Failed to undo command: {}", lastCommand.getDescription(), e);
                // Re-add to stack since undo failed
                executedCommands.push(lastCommand);
                throw new CommandUndoException("Command undo failed", e);
            }
        }
    }

    public List<String> getCommandHistory() {
        return executedCommands.stream()
            .map(Command::getDescription)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
}

// 6. REPOSITORY PATTERN - Data Access Abstraction
public interface GenericRepository<T, ID> {
    Optional<T> findById(ID id);
    List<T> findAll();
    List<T> findAll(Specification<T> spec);
    Page<T> findAll(Specification<T> spec, Pageable pageable);
    T save(T entity);
    void deleteById(ID id);
    boolean existsById(ID id);
    long count();
    long count(Specification<T> spec);
}

@Repository
public abstract class BaseRepository<T, ID> implements GenericRepository<T, ID> {

    @PersistenceContext
    protected EntityManager entityManager;

    private final Class<T> entityClass;

    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    public BaseRepository() {
        this.entityClass = (Class<T>) ((ParameterizedType) getClass()
            .getGenericSuperclass()).getActualTypeArguments()[0];
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<T> findById(ID id) {
        T entity = entityManager.find(entityClass, id);
        return Optional.ofNullable(entity);
    }

    @Override
    public List<T> findAll() {
        CriteriaBuilder cb = entityManager.getCriteriaBuilder();
        CriteriaQuery<T> query = cb.createQuery(entityClass);
        Root<T> root = query.from(entityClass);
        query.select(root);

        return entityManager.createQuery(query).getResultList();
    }

    @Override
    public T save(T entity) {
        if (isNew(entity)) {
            entityManager.persist(entity);
            return entity;
        } else {
            return entityManager.merge(entity);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void deleteById(ID id) {
        findById(id).ifPresent(entityManager::remove);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean existsById(ID id) {
        return findById(id).isPresent();
    }

    @Override
    public long count() {
        CriteriaBuilder cb = entityManager.getCriteriaBuilder();
        CriteriaQuery<Long> query = cb.createQuery(Long.class);
        Root<T> root = query.from(entityClass);
        query.select(cb.count(root));

        return entityManager.createQuery(query).getSingleResult();
    }

    protected abstract boolean isNew(T entity);
}

// 7. SPECIFICATION PATTERN - Query Criteria
public class BlogSpecifications {

    public static Specification<Blog> hasTitle(String title) {
        return (root, query, criteriaBuilder) ->
            title == null ? null : criteriaBuilder.like(
                criteriaBuilder.lower(root.get("title")),
                "%" + title.toLowerCase() + "%"
            );
    }

    public static Specification<Blog> hasCategory(String category) {
        return (root, query, criteriaBuilder) ->
            category == null ? null : criteriaBuilder.equal(
                root.get("category").get("name"), category
            );
    }

    public static Specification<Blog> isPublished() {
        return (root, query, criteriaBuilder) ->
            criteriaBuilder.isTrue(root.get("published"));
    }

    public static Specification<Blog> createdAfter(LocalDateTime date) {
        return (root, query, criteriaBuilder) ->
            date == null ? null : criteriaBuilder.greaterThanOrEqualTo(
                root.get("createdAt"), date
            );
    }

    public static Specification<Blog> hasTag(String tag) {
        return (root, query, criteriaBuilder) -> {
            if (tag == null) return null;

            Join<Blog, String> tagsJoin = root.join("tags");
            return criteriaBuilder.equal(tagsJoin, tag);
        };
    }
}

// Usage example
@Service
public class BlogSearchService {

    @Autowired
    private BlogRepository blogRepository;

    public Page<Blog> searchBlogs(BlogSearchCriteria criteria, Pageable pageable) {
        Specification<Blog> spec = Specification.where(BlogSpecifications.isPublished())
            .and(BlogSpecifications.hasTitle(criteria.getTitle()))
            .and(BlogSpecifications.hasCategory(criteria.getCategory()))
            .and(BlogSpecifications.createdAfter(criteria.getFromDate()))
            .and(BlogSpecifications.hasTag(criteria.getTag()));

        return blogRepository.findAll(spec, pageable);
    }
}
```

```java
// 1. CONTRACT TESTING với Pact
@ExtendWith(PactConsumerTestExt.class)
@PactTestFor(providerName = "user-service", port = "8080")
public class UserServiceContractTest {

    @Pact(consumer = "blog-service")
    public RequestResponsePact getUserPact(PactDslWithProvider builder) {
        return builder
            .given("user exists")
            .uponReceiving("a request for user details")
            .path("/api/users/1")
            .method("GET")
            .willRespondWith()
            .status(200)
            .headers(Map.of("Content-Type", "application/json"))
            .body(LambdaDsl.newJsonBody(body -> body
                .numberType("id", 1)
                .stringType("email", "user@example.com")
                .stringType("name", "John Doe")
            ).build())
            .toPact();
    }

    @Test
    @PactTestFor(pactMethod = "getUserPact")
    void testGetUser(MockServer mockServer) {
        // Test implementation
        UserServiceClient client = new UserServiceClient(mockServer.getUrl());
        User user = client.getUser(1L);

        assertThat(user.getId()).isEqualTo(1L);
        assertThat(user.getEmail()).isEqualTo("user@example.com");
        assertThat(user.getName()).isEqualTo("John Doe");
    }
}

// 3. PROPERTY-BASED TESTING với jqwik
@PropertyTest
void userEmailValidation(@ForAll @Email String email) {
    User user = new User();
    user.setEmail(email);

    Set<ConstraintViolation<User>> violations = validator.validate(user);

    // Property: valid emails should not produce violations
    assertThat(violations).isEmpty();
}

@PropertyTest
void passwordStrengthValidation(
    @ForAll @StringLength(min = 8, max = 50) String password,
    @ForAll @IntRange(min = 1, max = 5) int specialChars
) {
    String strongPassword = password + "!".repeat(specialChars);

    boolean isStrong = passwordValidator.isStrong(strongPassword);

    // Property: passwords with special chars should be strong
    assertThat(isStrong).isTrue();
}

// 4. PERFORMANCE TESTING với JMeter Integration
@Component
public class PerformanceTestRunner {

    public void runLoadTest(String testPlan, int users, int rampUp, int duration) {
        try {
            // Initialize JMeter
            JMeterUtils.loadJMeterProperties("jmeter.properties");
            JMeterUtils.setJMeterHome("path/to/jmeter");
            JMeterUtils.initLocale();

            // Load test plan
            HashTree testPlanTree = SaveService.loadTree(new File(testPlan));

            // Configure test parameters
            configureTestPlan(testPlanTree, users, rampUp, duration);

            // Run test
            StandardJMeterEngine jmeter = new StandardJMeterEngine();
            jmeter.configure(testPlanTree);
            jmeter.run();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new PerformanceTestException("Failed to run performance test", e);
        }
    }

    private void configureTestPlan(HashTree testPlan, int users, int rampUp, int duration) {
        // Configure thread group
        testPlan.traverse(new HashTreeTraverser() {
            @Override
            public void addNode(Object node, HashTree subTree) {
                if (node instanceof ThreadGroup) {
                    ThreadGroup tg = (ThreadGroup) node;
                    tg.setNumThreads(users);
                    tg.setRampUp(rampUp);
                    tg.setDuration(duration);
                }
            }
        });
    }
}

// 5. CHAOS ENGINEERING Testing
@Component
public class ChaosTestingService {

    @Autowired
    private ApplicationContext applicationContext;

    public void simulateServiceFailure(String serviceName, Duration duration) {
        Object service = applicationContext.getBean(serviceName);

        // Create proxy that throws exceptions
        Object chaosProxy = Proxy.newProxyInstance(
            service.getClass().getClassLoader(),
            service.getClass().getInterfaces(),
            (proxy, method, args) -> {
                throw new ServiceUnavailableException("Chaos testing: " + serviceName + " is down");
            }
        );

        // Replace service bean temporarily
        ConfigurableApplicationContext configurableContext =
            (ConfigurableApplicationContext) applicationContext;

        DefaultListableBeanFactory beanFactory =
            (DefaultListableBeanFactory) configurableContext.getBeanFactory();

        beanFactory.destroySingleton(serviceName);
        beanFactory.registerSingleton(serviceName, chaosProxy);

        // Schedule restoration
        CompletableFuture.delayedExecutor(duration.toMillis(), TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS)
            .execute(() -> {
                beanFactory.destroySingleton(serviceName);
                beanFactory.registerSingleton(serviceName, service);
            });
    }

    public void simulateNetworkLatency(String endpoint, Duration latency) {
        // Implementation for network latency simulation
        WireMockServer wireMock = new WireMockServer(8089);
        wireMock.start();

        wireMock.stubFor(any(urlMatching(endpoint))
            .willReturn(aResponse()
                .withFixedDelay((int) latency.toMillis())
                .proxiedFrom("http://localhost:8080")));
    }

    public void simulateMemoryPressure(int memoryMB, Duration duration) {
        List<byte[]> memoryHog = new ArrayList<>();

        try {
            // Allocate memory
            for (int i = 0; i < memoryMB; i++) {
                memoryHog.add(new byte[1024 * 1024]); // 1MB chunks
            }

            // Hold memory for specified duration
            Thread.sleep(duration.toMillis());

        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
        } finally {
            // Release memory
            memoryHog.clear();
            System.gc();
        }
    }
}

// 6. INTEGRATION TESTING với TestContainers
@SpringBootTest
@Testcontainers
class BlogServiceIntegrationTest {

    @Container
    static PostgreSQLContainer<?> postgres = new PostgreSQLContainer<>("postgres:13")
        .withDatabaseName("testdb")
        .withUsername("test")
        .withPassword("test");

    @Container
    static GenericContainer<?> redis = new GenericContainer<>("redis:6-alpine")
        .withExposedPorts(6379);

    @DynamicPropertySource
    static void configureProperties(DynamicPropertyRegistry registry) {
        registry.add("spring.datasource.url", postgres::getJdbcUrl);
        registry.add("spring.datasource.username", postgres::getUsername);
        registry.add("spring.datasource.password", postgres::getPassword);
        registry.add("spring.redis.host", redis::getHost);
        registry.add("spring.redis.port", redis::getFirstMappedPort);
    }

    @Autowired
    private BlogService blogService;

    @Test
    void shouldCreateAndRetrieveBlog() {
        // Given
        Blog blog = Blog.builder()
            .title("Test Blog")
            .content("Test content")
            .published(true)
            .build();

        // When
        Blog savedBlog = blogService.createBlog(blog);
        Blog retrievedBlog = blogService.getBlog(savedBlog.getId());

        // Then
        assertThat(retrievedBlog).isNotNull();
        assertThat(retrievedBlog.getTitle()).isEqualTo("Test Blog");
        assertThat(retrievedBlog.getContent()).isEqualTo("Test content");
    }
}

// 7. END-TO-END TESTING với Selenium
@SpringBootTest(webEnvironment = SpringBootTest.WebEnvironment.RANDOM_PORT)
class BlogE2ETest {

    @LocalServerPort
    private int port;

    private WebDriver driver;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        ChromeOptions options = new ChromeOptions();
        options.addArguments("--headless");
        options.addArguments("--no-sandbox");
        options.addArguments("--disable-dev-shm-usage");

        driver = new ChromeDriver(options);
        driver.manage().timeouts().implicitlyWait(Duration.ofSeconds(10));
    }

    @AfterEach
    void tearDown() {
        if (driver != null) {
            driver.quit();
        }
    }

    @Test
    void shouldCreateBlogPost() {
        // Navigate to blog creation page
        driver.get("http://localhost:" + port + "/admin/blogs/new");

        // Fill form
        driver.findElement(By.id("title")).sendKeys("E2E Test Blog");
        driver.findElement(By.id("content")).sendKeys("This is an E2E test blog post");
        driver.findElement(By.id("category")).sendKeys("Technology");

        // Submit form
        driver.findElement(By.id("submit-btn")).click();

        // Verify redirect to blog list
        WebDriverWait wait = new WebDriverWait(driver, Duration.ofSeconds(10));
        wait.until(ExpectedConditions.urlContains("/admin/blogs"));

        // Verify blog appears in list
        WebElement blogTitle = wait.until(
            ExpectedConditions.presenceOfElementLocated(
                By.xpath("//td[contains(text(), 'E2E Test Blog')]")
            )
        );

        assertThat(blogTitle.getText()).isEqualTo("E2E Test Blog");
    }

    @Test
    void shouldSearchBlogs() {
        // Navigate to blog page
        driver.get("http://localhost:" + port + "/blog");

        // Search for blogs
        WebElement searchInput = driver.findElement(By.id("search-input"));
        searchInput.sendKeys("technology");
        searchInput.sendKeys(Keys.ENTER);

        // Wait for results
        WebDriverWait wait = new WebDriverWait(driver, Duration.ofSeconds(10));
        List<WebElement> results = wait.until(
            ExpectedConditions.presenceOfAllElementsLocatedBy(
                By.className("search-result-item")
            )
        );

        assertThat(results).isNotEmpty();
    }
}

// 8. API TESTING với REST Assured
@SpringBootTest(webEnvironment = SpringBootTest.WebEnvironment.RANDOM_PORT)
class BlogApiTest {

    @LocalServerPort
    private int port;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        RestAssured.port = port;
        RestAssured.enableLoggingOfRequestAndResponseIfValidationFails();
    }

    @Test
    void shouldGetAllBlogs() {
        given()
            .when()
                .get("/api/blogs")
            .then()
                .statusCode(200)
                .contentType(ContentType.JSON)
                .body("content", hasSize(greaterThan(0)))
                .body("content[0].title", notNullValue())
                .body("content[0].content", notNullValue());
    }

    @Test
    void shouldCreateBlog() {
        Blog newBlog = Blog.builder()
            .title("API Test Blog")
            .content("Content for API test")
            .published(true)
            .build();

        given()
            .contentType(ContentType.JSON)
            .body(newBlog)
            .when()
                .post("/api/blogs")
            .then()
                .statusCode(201)
                .body("title", equalTo("API Test Blog"))
                .body("content", equalTo("Content for API test"))
                .body("id", notNullValue());
    }

    @Test
    void shouldValidateBlogInput() {
        Blog invalidBlog = Blog.builder()
            .title("") // Invalid: empty title
            .content("Valid content")
            .build();

        given()
            .contentType(ContentType.JSON)
            .body(invalidBlog)
            .when()
                .post("/api/blogs")
            .then()
                .statusCode(400)
                .body("errors", hasSize(greaterThan(0)))
                .body("errors[0].field", equalTo("title"))
                .body("errors[0].message", containsString("must not be blank"));
    }
}

// 9. SECURITY TESTING
@SpringBootTest
class SecurityTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @Test
    void shouldRequireAuthenticationForAdminEndpoints() throws Exception {
        mockMvc.perform(get("/admin/blogs"))
            .andExpect(status().isUnauthorized());
    }

    @Test
    void shouldPreventSQLInjection() throws Exception {
        String maliciousInput = "'; DROP TABLE blogs; --";

        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/blogs/search")
                .param("query", maliciousInput))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.content").isArray());

        // Verify table still exists by making another request
        mockMvc.perform(get("/api/blogs"))
            .andExpect(status().isOk());
    }

    @Test
    void shouldPreventXSS() throws Exception {
        String xssPayload = "<script>alert('XSS')</script>";

        Blog blog = Blog.builder()
            .title(xssPayload)
            .content("Normal content")
            .build();

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/blogs")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(blog)))
            .andExpect(status().isBadRequest())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.errors[0].message").value(containsString("Invalid characters")));
    }
}

// 10. LOAD TESTING với Gatling Integration
public class BlogLoadTest extends Simulation {

    private final HttpProtocolBuilder httpProtocol = http
        .baseUrl("http://localhost:8080")
        .acceptHeader("application/json")
        .contentTypeHeader("application/json");

    private final ScenarioBuilder blogBrowsingScenario = scenario("Blog Browsing")
        .exec(http("Get All Blogs")
            .get("/api/blogs")
            .check(status().is(200)))
        .pause(2)
        .exec(http("Search Blogs")
            .get("/api/blogs/search")
            .queryParam("query", "technology")
            .check(status().is(200)))
        .pause(1)
        .exec(http("Get Blog Details")
            .get("/api/blogs/1")
            .check(status().is(200)));

    private final ScenarioBuilder blogCreationScenario = scenario("Blog Creation")
        .exec(http("Create Blog")
            .post("/api/blogs")
            .body(StringBody("""
                {
                    "title": "Load Test Blog",
                    "content": "Content for load testing",
                    "published": true
                }
                """))
            .check(status().is(201)));

    {
        setUp(
            blogBrowsingScenario.injectOpen(
                rampUsers(100).during(Duration.ofMinutes(5))
            ),
            blogCreationScenario.injectOpen(
                rampUsers(10).during(Duration.ofMinutes(5))
            )
        ).protocols(httpProtocol)
         .assertions(
             global().responseTime().max().lt(2000),
             global().successfulRequests().percent().gt(95.0)
         );
    }
}
```
